DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_all_details`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, sm_employee.FirstName AS sm_fname, sm_employee.LastName AS sm_lname, sm_login.Email AS sm_email, sd_employee.FirstName AS sd_fname, sd_employee.LastName AS sd_lname, sd_login.Email AS sd_email, ssd_employee.FirstName AS ssd_fname, ssd_employee.LastName AS ssd_lname, ssd_login.Email AS ssd_email FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS sm_login ON login00.SM = sm_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS sm_employee ON sm_login.EmployeeNo = sm_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS sd_login ON login00.SD = sd_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS sd_employee ON sd_login.EmployeeNo = sd_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS ssd_login ON login00.SSD = ssd_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS ssd_employee ON ssd_login.EmployeeNo = ssd_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.UserID = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_bycode`(in icode varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM agents WHERE Code = icode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_inactive`()
BEGIN

SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE  login00.Position ="Agent" AND login00.Position2 <> "SSD" AND login00.Position2 <> "BS" AND login00.Deleted = 1  AND login00.Position2 <> "" ORDER BY Position2;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_name`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT EmployeeNo, FirstName, LastName FROM employees WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Department = 'Sales Department'
UNION 
SELECT MPID, firstname, lastname FROM marketing_partner WHERE MPID = iemployeeno AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_pending_liquidation`(in iagent int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM agents_fb_ads LEFT JOIN rfp ON agents_fb_ads.RFP = rfp.RFP WHERE agents_fb_ads.Agent_UserID = iagent AND agents_fb_ads.Liquidated = 0 AND agents_fb_ads.Cancelled = 0 AND agents_fb_ads.Deleted = 0 AND rfp.ForLiquidation = 1 AND rfp.Liquidated = 0 AND rfp.Released = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_agent_position`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT 
	EmployeeNo, 
	FirstName, 
	LastName,
	Position AS ePosition
FROM employees 
WHERE 
	Department = 'Sales Department' 
	AND EmployeeNo = iemployeeno
	AND Active = 1

UNION 

SELECT 
	MPID, 
	firstname, 
	lastname,
	position AS ePosition
FROM marketing_partner 
WHERE 
	MPID = iemployeeno
    AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_all_agents`()
BEGIN
SELECT EmployeeNo, FirstName, LastName FROM employees WHERE Department = 'Sales Department'
UNION 
SELECT MPID, firstname, lastname FROM marketing_partner WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_all_liquidation`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, rfp.Department, rfp.Payee, rfp.Amount, rfp.HandlingFee, rfp.Particulars, rfp.DateCreated as DateRequested, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_all_overtime_workers`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT overtime.EmployeeNo, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.Classification FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = "Approved"  AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND overtime.Date >= idtfrom AND overtime.Date <= idtto AND employees.Department = 'Site Worker'  GROUP BY overtime.EmployeeNo ;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_all_overtime_workers_classification`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(100))
    NO SQL
BEGIN


SELECT overtime.EmployeeNo, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.Classification FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = "Approved"  AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND overtime.Date >= idtfrom AND overtime.Date <= idtto AND employees.Classification = iclassification AND employees.Department = 'Site Worker'  GROUP BY overtime.EmployeeNo ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_all_pasapayroll`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department = 'Pasa Payroll' AND Active = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_amort_amount_due`(in iloanid int, in ipayrolldate date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(MonthlyDue), 0) AS totaldue, IFNULL(SUM(Payment), 0) AS totalpayment FROM loan_amort WHERE LoanID = iloanid AND Date <= ipayrolldate AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_announcement`(IN `icurrdate` DATE)
BEGIN
    SELECT *
    FROM hris_announcement
    WHERE 
   ( Deleted = 0
    AND expdate = '1111-11-11') OR (Deleted = 0 AND expdate >= icurrdate)
    ;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.* FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.rfp = rfp.RFP WHERE liquidation.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND (rfp.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' OR rfp.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND liquidation.UserTypeID <> 37;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_lcc`()
BEGIN 
SELECT liquidation.* FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP WHERE liquidation.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND liquidation.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND (rfp.Department = 'IT Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Executive Department'); 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.* FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE liquidation.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND liquidation.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_saleshead`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.* FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.rfp = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE (liquidation.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department') OR (liquidation.SSDApproval = 'Approved' AND liquidation.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' AND login00.Position = 'Agent');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_ssd`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.* FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.rfp = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE liquidation.SSDApproval = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' AND login00.Position = 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approve_liquidation_count_treasury`()
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM liquidation WHERE ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND TreasuryApproved = 'Pending'; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approved_overtime_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM overtime WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Approval = 'Approved' AND DATE(ApprovedDate) >= idtfrom AND DATE(ApprovedDate) <= idtto AND Date >= idtfrom AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approved_overtime_workers_all`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Date >= idtfrom AND overtime.Date <= idtto AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Department = 'Site Worker' ORDER BY overtime.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_approved_overtime_workers_classification`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Date >= idtfrom AND overtime.Date <= idtto AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Classification = iclassification AND employees.Department = 'Site Worker' ORDER BY overtime.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_accountspayable`(in iapvid int)
BEGIN
SELECT Amount FROM apv_credit WHERE APVID = iapvid AND AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_credit`(IN `iapvid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv_credit WHERE APVID = iapvid ORDER BY id ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_debit`(IN `iapvid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv_debit WHERE APVID = iapvid ORDER BY id asc;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_details`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, prepared_login.DigitalSignature, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, prepared_login.Department, checked_login.DigitalSignature AS checked_signature, checked_employee.FirstName AS checked_firstname, checked_employee.LastName AS checked_lastname, approved_login.DigitalSignature AS approved_signature, approved_employee.FirstName AS appoved_firstname, approved_employee.LastName AS approved_lastname FROM apv 

LEFT JOIN login00 as prepared_login ON apv.LoginID = prepared_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON prepared_login.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 as checked_login ON apv.CheckedID = checked_login.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees AS checked_employee ON checked_login.EmployeeNo = checked_employee.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS approved_login ON apv.ManagerID = approved_login.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees AS approved_employee ON approved_login.EmployeeNo = approved_employee.EmployeeNo 

WHERE apv.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_details_apv`(in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_details_apv_chargeto`(in iapv varchar(50), in ichargeto varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE APV = iapv AND ChargeTo = ichargeto;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_of_rfp`(in irfp varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE RFP LIKE CONCAT('%', irfp, '%') AND Cancelled = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_po_with_check`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT cv.Released, cv.Amount, cv.Cancelled FROM apv LEFT JOIN cv ON apv.CV = cv.CVID WHERE apv.PO = ipo AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.CheckCreated = 1; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apv_transmittal_treasury_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND apv.Received = 0 AND apv.Hold = 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND (SELECT apv_credit.Amount FROM apv_credit WHERE apv_credit.APVID = apv.id AND apv_credit.AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable') > 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_apvid_add`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `apv` WHERE APV = iapv AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

SELECT * FROM `cd_memo` WHERE APV = iapv AND Deleted = 0;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM apv WHERE APV = iapv AND ChargeTo = ichargeto AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_asset_count`(in iassetid int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM assets WHERE AssetID = iassetid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_asset_details`(IN `iasset_tag` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT assets.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, asset_model.Asset FROM assets LEFT JOIN login00 ON assets.DeployedTo = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN asset_model ON assets.AssetID = asset_model.AssetID WHERE assets.AssetTag = iasset_tag;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_assetmodel_details`(in iassetid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM asset_model WHERE AssetID = iassetid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_attendant_payment_details`(in iid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM attendant_payment WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_attendant_total_end_duty_collection`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(ParkingFee), 0) AS totalparkingfee FROM ticket_entry WHERE Parking_Code <> '' AND Attendant_LoginID = iloginid AND EndID = 0 AND Remarks <> 'RUNAWAY' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_balance_table`(IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT DISTINCT supply_request_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty
FROM supply_request_details
LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode
LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON supply_request_details.RequestID = for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID
WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID <> '' AND supply_request_details.LoginID = iloginid AND supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND supply_request_details.Overwritten = 0 AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM deductions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Bank Loan' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_berlito_punchlisting_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = '50' AND (punchlisting.Status = 'For Rectification' OR punchlisting.Status = 'For Rectification (Ongoing)') GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM po WHERE PO = ipo;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_booking_client_agent`(in ivcode varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT agents.Email as agentemail, agents.Name as agentname, booking.FirstName, booking.LastName, booking.Contact, booking.bDate, booking.bTime FROM booking LEFT JOIN agents ON booking.AgentID = agents.id WHERE booking.VerificationCode = ivcode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM elements_booking WHERE bDate = idate AND bTime = itime AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cars_parked`(IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.* FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID WHERE MONTH(parking_end_duty.Date) = imonth AND YEAR(parking_end_duty.Date) = iyear AND Class = 'C' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cd_details`(IN `icdid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT cd_memo.*, apv.Payee, apv.ChargeTo, emp_prep.FirstName AS PrepFirstname, emp_prep.LastName AS PrepLastname, l1.DigitalSignature AS PrepDigitalSignature, emp_app.FirstName AS AppFirstname, emp_app.LastName AS AppLastname, l2.DigitalSignature AS AppDigitalSignature
FROM cd_memo
LEFT JOIN apv ON apv.APV = cd_memo.APV
LEFT JOIN `cd_memo_debit-credit` ON `cd_memo_debit-credit`.cd_memo_id = cd_memo.id
LEFT JOIN login00 AS l1 ON l1.UserID = cd_memo.UserID
LEFT JOIN login00 AS l2 ON l2.UserID = cd_memo.ApprovedBy
LEFT JOIN employees AS emp_prep ON emp_prep.EmployeeNo = l1.EmployeeNo
LEFT JOIN employees AS emp_app ON emp_app.EmployeeNo = l2.EmployeeNo
WHERE cd_memo.id = icdid AND cd_memo.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cd_memo`(IN `icdid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cd_memo WHERE id = icdid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cdmemo_id`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `cd_memo` WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cdmemo_lastid`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500), IN `icv` VARCHAR(500), IN `iuserid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `cd_memo` WHERE APV = iapv AND CV = icv AND UserID = iuserid ORDER BY `cd_memo`.`id` DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_change_order`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname, login00.DigitalSignature, 

employee_docstaff.FirstName AS docstaff_fname, employee_docstaff.LastName AS docstaff_lname, login_docstaff.DigitalSignature AS docstaff_signature, 

employee_dochead.FirstName AS dochead_fname, employee_dochead.LastName AS dochead_lname, login_dochead.DigitalSignature AS dochead_signature,

employee_reservation.FirstName AS reservation_fname, employee_reservation.LastName AS reservation_lname, login_reservation.DigitalSignature AS reservation_signature,

employee_cs.FirstName AS cs_fname, employee_cs.LastName AS cs_lname, login_cs.DigitalSignature AS cs_signature,

employee_cshead.FirstName AS cshead_fname, employee_cshead.LastName AS cshead_lname, login_cshead.DigitalSignature AS cshead_signature,

employee_collection.FirstName AS collection_fname, employee_collection.LastName AS collection_lname, login_collection.DigitalSignature AS collection_signature,

employee_accounting.FirstName AS accounting_fname, employee_accounting.LastName AS accounting_lname, login_accounting.DigitalSignature AS accounting_signature,

employee_sales.FirstName AS sales_fname, employee_sales.LastName AS sales_lname, login_sales.DigitalSignature AS sales_signature, 

employee_saleshead.FirstName AS saleshead_fname, employee_saleshead.LastName AS saleshead_lname, login_saleshead.DigitalSignature AS saleshead_signature, 

employee_marketing.FirstName AS marketing_fname, employee_marketing.LastName AS marketing_lname, login_marketing.DigitalSignature AS marketing_signature,

employee_fund.FirstName AS fund_fname, employee_fund.LastName AS fund_lname, login_fund.DigitalSignature AS fund_signature,

employee_engr.FirstName AS engr_fname, employee_engr.LastName AS engr_lname, login_engr.DigitalSignature AS engr_signature, 

employee_pm.FirstName AS pm_fname, employee_pm.LastName AS pm_lname, login_pm.DigitalSignature AS pm_signature 

FROM change_order 

LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.CLientID 

LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id

LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_docstaff ON change_order.DocStaff_ApproveBy = login_docstaff.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_docstaff ON login_docstaff.EmployeeNo = employee_docstaff.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_dochead ON change_order.DocHead_ApproveBy = login_dochead.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_dochead ON login_dochead.EmployeeNo = employee_dochead.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_reservation ON change_order.Reservation_ApproveBy = login_reservation.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_reservation ON login_reservation.EmployeeNo = employee_reservation.EmployeeNo

left JOIN login00 AS login_cs ON change_order.CS_ApproveBy = login_cs.UserID

left JOIN employees AS employee_cs ON login_cs.EmployeeNo = employee_cs.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_collection ON change_order.Collection_ApproveBy = login_collection.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_collection ON login_collection.EmployeeNo = employee_collection.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_accounting ON change_order.Accounting_ApproveBy = login_accounting.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_accounting ON login_accounting.EmployeeNo = employee_accounting.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sales ON change_order.Sales_ApproveBy = login_sales.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_sales ON login_sales.EmployeeNo = employee_sales.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_saleshead ON change_order.SalesHead_ApproveBy = login_saleshead.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_saleshead ON login_saleshead.EmployeeNo = employee_saleshead.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_marketing ON change_order.Marketing_ApproveBy = login_marketing.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_marketing ON login_marketing.EmployeeNo = employee_marketing.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_fund ON change_order.Fund_ApproveBy = login_fund.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_fund ON login_fund.EmployeeNo = employee_fund.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_engr ON change_order.Engr_ApprovedBy = login_engr.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_engr ON login_engr.EmployeeNo = employee_engr.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_cshead ON change_order.CSHead_ApprovedBy = login_cshead.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_cshead ON login_cshead.EmployeeNo = employee_cshead.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_pm ON change_order.PM_ApprovedBy = login_pm.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees AS employee_pm ON login_pm.EmployeeNo = employee_pm.EmployeeNo

WHERE change_order.ID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_change_order_dev`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM change_order_dev WHERE ID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_change_order_remarks`(in iid int)
BEGIN
SELECT change_order_remarks.Remarks, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM change_order_remarks LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order_remarks.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE change_order_remarks.Change_Order_ID = iid ORDER BY change_order_remarks.id ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
SELECT change_order_seibu.*, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname 

FROM change_order_seibu 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order_seibu.CreatedBy = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE change_order_seibu.ID = iid AND change_order_seibu.Deleted = 0;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_apv_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Pending' AND apv.Type = 'Standard' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND apv.Hold = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_checklist_count`()

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM unit_checklist_monitoring WHERE CheckStatus = 'Completed' AND ApprovalStatus = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_funding_abm_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM cv WHERE Approved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND SubmitABM = 1 AND Funded = 0 AND Type = 'Regular';
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_voucher_approval_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM cv WHERE (Approved = 'Pending' AND Cancelled = 0 AND Override_Check = 0) OR (Approved = 'Pending' AND Cancelled = 0 AND Override_Check = 1 AND Override_Check_Approval = 'Approved');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_voucher_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM cv WHERE cv.Approved = 'Approved' AND cv.LCCSigned = 'Pending' AND cv.Cancelled = 0 AND cv.Bank = 2;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_check_workers_overtime_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Pre_Approval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Checked = 'Pending' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.CreatedBy = iloginid AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_checklist_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT checklist.*, checklist_list.Checklist, room_layout.RoomName, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, checklist_remarks.DateCreated, checklist_remarks.Remarks, checklist_remarks.ImageName, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM checklist LEFT JOIN checklist_list ON checklist.ChecklistID = checklist_list.id LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN checklist_remarks ON checklist.id = checklist_remarks.ChecklistID LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_remarks.LoginID = login00.UserID  WHERE checklist.Status = 'Completed' AND checklist.Approved = 'Pending' AND checklist.Deleted = 0 AND checklist_remarks.Status = 'Completed';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_checklist_checking`()
BEGIN
SELECT checklist.*, checklist_list.Checklist, room_layout.RoomName, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project FROM checklist LEFT JOIN checklist_list ON checklist.ChecklistID = checklist_list.id LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE checklist.Status = 'Completed' AND checklist.Checked = 'Pending' AND checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_checklist_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM checklist WHERE Status = 'Completed' AND Approved = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_checklist_history`(IN `checklistiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM checklist_status_monitoring LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID  LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = checklistiid ORDER BY checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_checklist_item_count`(IN `icheckid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL (COUNT(*),0) AS TotalCount, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*),0) FROM unit_checklist_item_monitoring WHERE (ItemStatus ="Punchlisting" OR ItemStatus ="Testing And Comissioning" OR ItemStatus ="Completed") AND Deleted = 0 AND ChecklistID = icheckid) AS totalApproveCount FROM unit_checklist_item_monitoring WHERE ChecklistID = icheckid AND Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_complete_tradehead_rectification_count`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Approved' AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_concern`(IN iticketid INT)
BEGIN
SELECT support_tickets.Concern FROM support_tickets WHERE TicketID = iticketid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_confirm_return`(IN `ititleid` INT)
BEGIN 
 SELECT MAX(DateTime) AS ReturnDateTime
        FROM track_title
        WHERE TitleID = ititleid
        AND Status = 'Returned';
 END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractor_attendance_date_helper`(in icontractorcode int, in idate date)
BEGIN 
SELECT contractor_timelogs.* FROM contractor_timelogs LEFT JOIN contractor_qr ON contractor_timelogs.Code = contractor_qr.Code WHERE contractor_timelogs.Deleted = 0 AND contractor_qr.ContractorCode = icontractorcode AND DATE(contractor_timelogs.TimeIn) = idate AND contractor_timelogs.Position = 'Helper' ORDER BY contractor_timelogs.TimeIn ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractor_attendance_date_supervisor`(in icontractorcode int, in idate date)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor_timelogs.* FROM contractor_timelogs LEFT JOIN contractor_qr ON contractor_timelogs.Code = contractor_qr.Code WHERE contractor_timelogs.Deleted = 0 AND contractor_qr.ContractorCode = icontractorcode AND DATE(contractor_timelogs.TimeIn) = idate AND contractor_timelogs.Position = 'Supervisor' ORDER BY contractor_timelogs.TimeIn ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractor_details`(in icontractorcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM contractor00 WHERE ContractorCode = icontractorcode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractor_qr_details`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `contractor_qr` WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractor_withdrawal_date`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor00.ContractorCode, contractor00.Contractor FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE `release`.`DateDelivered` >= idtfrom AND `release`.`DateDelivered` <= idtto AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Delivered` = 1 AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 GROUP BY contractor00.ContractorCode; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractors`(in icontractorcode varchar(100))
BEGIN
SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) AS contractors FROM contractor00 WHERE contractor00.ContractorCode IN (icontractorcode);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_contractors_date`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT 
    contractor00.Contractor, 
    contractor00.ContractorCode 
FROM contractor_timelogs 
LEFT JOIN contractor_qr 
    ON contractor_timelogs.Code = contractor_qr.Code 
    AND contractor_qr.ContractorCode <> 0 
LEFT JOIN contractor00 
    ON contractor_qr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode 
WHERE 
    DATE(contractor_timelogs.TimeIn) = idate
    AND contractor_timelogs.Deleted = 0
    AND contractor_qr.ContractorCode IS NOT NULL
    AND contractor_qr.ContractorCode <> 0
GROUP BY contractor_qr.ContractorCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT SUM(Quantity) as total_qty FROM `contractor_billing_materials` WHERE WorkID = iworkid and Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_cv_details`(IN `icvid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, employees.FirstName AS prepared_fname, employees.LastName AS prepared_lname, login00.DigitalSignature, approved_employee.FirstName AS approved_fname, approved_employee.LastName AS approved_lname, approved.DigitalSignature AS approved_signature, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN login00 ON cv.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS approved ON cv.ApprovedBy = approved.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS approved_employee ON approved.EmployeeNo = approved_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_declined_change_order_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM change_order WHERE CreatedBy = iloginid AND Deleted = 0 AND (DocStaff_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR DocHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Reservation_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR CS_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR CSHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Collection_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Accounting_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Sales_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR SalesHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Marketing_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Fund_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Engr_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR LCC_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR HVY_Approval = 'Cancelled');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_declined_change_order_count_cherie`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM change_order WHERE Deleted = 0 AND (DocStaff_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR DocHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Reservation_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR CS_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR CSHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Collection_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Accounting_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Sales_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR SalesHead_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Marketing_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Fund_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR Engr_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR LCC_Approval = 'Cancelled' OR HVY_Approval = 'Cancelled');

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_delayed_checklist_rectification_count`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 0 AND DATEDIFF(idate, DATE(room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead_Assigned_Date)) >= 15 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dept_replenishment_max`(IN `icode` INT, IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(department_supply_replenishment.Max), 0) FROM department_supply_replenishment WHERE department_supply_replenishment.ItemCode = icode AND department_supply_replenishment.Department = idepartment AND department_supply_replenishment.Deleted = 0) as MaxQty;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dept_requested_qty`(IN `itemcode` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty), 0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request_details.ItemCode = itemcode AND supply_request_details.LoginID = iloginid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) as ReqQty, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = itemcode AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.RequestedBy = iloginid) AS relQty;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dept_supply`(IN `ireq` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request.*, prepared.fName AS prep_fname, prepared.lName AS prep_lname, prepared.DigitalSignature, approved.fName AS approved_fname, approved.lName AS approved_lname, approved.DigitalSignature AS approved_signature FROM supply_request LEFT JOIN login00 AS prepared ON supply_request.RequestedBy = prepared.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS approved ON supply_request.ApprovedBy = approved.UserID WHERE supply_request.RequestID = ireq AND supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.iStatus = "Released";
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_drawn_bingo_numbers`(IN `ipattern` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT bingo_numbers.bNumber FROM bingo_drawn LEFT JOIN bingo_numbers ON bingo_drawn.b_id = bingo_numbers.id WHERE bingo_drawn.Pattern = ipattern;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dtr_inactive_range`(IN `loginid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, in idtto date)
BEGIN

SELECT dtr_attandance.*, employees_sm.FirstName AS SMfname, employees_sm.LastName AS SMlname, employees_sd.FirstName AS SDfname, employees_sd.LastName AS SDlname,  employees_ssd.FirstName AS SSDfname, employees_ssd.LastName AS SSDlname,  employees_sales.FirstName AS Salesfname, employees_sales.LastName AS Saleslname,  employees_salesH.FirstName AS SalesHfname, employees_salesH.LastName AS SalesHlname, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName,

login_sm.DigitalSignature as SMSign,  login_sd.DigitalSignature as SDSign, login_ssd.DigitalSignature as SSDSign, login_sales.DigitalSignature as SalesSign, login_salesH.DigitalSignature as SalesHSign, login00.DigitalSignature

FROM dtr_attandance 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sm ON dtr_attandance.SMApprovedBy = login_sm.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sm ON login_sm.EmployeeNo = employees_sm.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sd ON dtr_attandance.SDApprovedBy = login_sd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sd ON login_sd.EmployeeNo = employees_sd.EmployeeNo


LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_ssd ON dtr_attandance.SSDApprovedBy = login_ssd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_ssd ON login_ssd.EmployeeNo = employees_ssd.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sales ON dtr_attandance.SalesApprovedBy = login_sales.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sales ON login_sales.EmployeeNo = employees_sales.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_salesH ON dtr_attandance.SalesHApprovedBy = login_salesH.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_salesH ON login_salesH.EmployeeNo = employees_salesH.EmployeeNo

WHERE dtr_attandance.SalesHApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.SSDApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.UserID = loginid AND  dtr_attandance.Date >= idtfrom AND dtr_attandance.Date <= idtto AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dtr_range`(IN `loginid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN

SELECT dtr_attandance.*, employees_sm.FirstName AS SMfname, employees_sm.LastName AS SMlname, employees_sd.FirstName AS SDfname, employees_sd.LastName AS SDlname,  employees_ssd.FirstName AS SSDfname, employees_ssd.LastName AS SSDlname,  employees_sales.FirstName AS Salesfname, employees_sales.LastName AS Saleslname,  employees_salesH.FirstName AS SalesHfname, employees_salesH.LastName AS SalesHlname, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName,

login_sm.DigitalSignature as SMSign,  login_sd.DigitalSignature as SDSign, login_ssd.DigitalSignature as SSDSign, login_sales.DigitalSignature as SalesSign, login_salesH.DigitalSignature as SalesHSign, login00.DigitalSignature

FROM dtr_attandance 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sm ON dtr_attandance.SMApprovedBy = login_sm.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sm ON login_sm.EmployeeNo = employees_sm.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sd ON dtr_attandance.SDApprovedBy = login_sd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sd ON login_sd.EmployeeNo = employees_sd.EmployeeNo


LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_ssd ON dtr_attandance.SSDApprovedBy = login_ssd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_ssd ON login_ssd.EmployeeNo = employees_ssd.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sales ON dtr_attandance.SalesApprovedBy = login_sales.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sales ON login_sales.EmployeeNo = employees_sales.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_salesH ON dtr_attandance.SalesHApprovedBy = login_salesH.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_salesH ON login_salesH.EmployeeNo = employees_salesH.EmployeeNo


WHERE dtr_attandance.UserID = loginid AND dtr_attandance.SalesHApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.SSDApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.Date >= idtfrom AND dtr_attandance.Date <= idtto AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_dtr_sales`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM dtr_attandance WHERE UserID = iloginid AND Date = idate AND SSDApproval = 'APPROVED' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employee_annual_payroll`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(Basic) AS totalbasic, SUM(Allowance) AS totalallowance, SUM(Ecola) AS totalecola, SUM(Overtime) AS totalovertime, SUM(RD) AS totalrd, SUM(RDOT) AS totalrdot, SUM(RDND) AS totalrdnd, SUM(NightDiff) AS totalnightdiff, SUM(VL) AS totalvl, SUM(SL) AS totalsl, SUM(RestDay) AS totalrestday, SUM(LegalHoliday) AS totallegalholiday, SUM(LegalHoliday_OT) AS totallegalholiday_ot, SUM(LegalHoliday_ND) AS totallegalholiday_nd, SUM(SpecialHoliday) AS totalspecialholiday, SUM(SpecialHoliday_OT) AS totalspecialholiday_ot, SUM(SpecialHoliday_ND) AS totalspecialholiday_nd, SUM(TaxOtherAdjust) AS totaltaxotheradjust, SUM(Absent) AS totalabsnet, SUM(Late) AS totallate, SUM(Undertime) AS totalundertime, SUM(TaxOtherDeduct) AS totaltaxotherdeduct, SUM(GrossPay) AS totalgrosspay, SUM(SSS_EE) AS totalsss_ee, SUM(WISP_EE) AS totalwisp_ee, SUM(Philhealth_EE) AS totalphilhealth_ee, SUM(HDMF_EE) AS totalhdmf_ee, SUM(TaxableIncome) AS totaltaxableincome, SUM(Tax) AS totaltax, SUM(DeMinimis) AS totaldeminimis, SUM(TaxRefund) AS totaltaxrefund, SUM(CompanyLoanAdjustment) AS totalcompanyloanadjustment, SUM(NonTaxOtherAdjust) AS totalnontaxotheradjust, SUM(SSSLoan) AS totalsssloan, SUM(SSSCalamityLoan) AS totalssscalamityloan, SUM(HDMFLoan) AS totalhdmfloan, SUM(CompanyLoan) AS totalcompanyloan, SUM(Insurance) AS totalinsurance, SUM(BankLoan) AS totalbankloan, SUM(Others) AS totalothers, SUM(NonTaxOtherDeduct) AS totalnontaxotherdeduct, SUM(Penalty) AS totalpenalty, SUM(NetPay) AS totalnetpay, SUM(SIL) AS totalsil FROM payroll WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(PayrollDate) = iyear AND Final = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employee_annual_tax`(in iemployeeno varchar(50), in iyear varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(TaxableIncome) AS totaltaxableincome, SUM(Tax) AS totaltax FROM payroll WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(PayrollDate) = iyear AND Final = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employee_details`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID, login00.UserType FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_backoffice`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE (Department <> 'Sales Department' AND Department <> 'Site Worker' AND Department <> 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' AND Department <> 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' AND Department <> 'HTY San Parking' AND Department <> 'Executive Office' AND Department <> 'Pasa Payroll' AND EmployeeNo <> '1017850' AND Status <> 'Hold' AND Status <> 'OJT' AND EmployeeNo <> '000000') AND Active = 1 ORDER BY LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_backoffice_tk`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE (Department <> 'Sales Department' AND Department <> 'Site Worker' AND Department <> 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' AND Department <> 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' AND Department <> 'HTY San Parking' AND Department <> 'Executive Office' AND Department <> 'Pasa Payroll' AND Department <> 'Site Support' AND EmployeeNo <> '1017850' AND Status <> 'OJT') AND CompleteRequirements = 1 AND Active = 1 AND Status <> 'Resigned' AND Status <> 'Terminated';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department = idepartment AND Status <> 'Hold' AND Active = 1 ORDER BY LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_casual`()
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID, login00.Position2, login00.SM, login00.SD, login00.SSD, login00.SDH, login00.DigitalSignature FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status <> 'Regular' AND employees.Active = 1 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_casual_payroll`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.* FROM time_keeping LEFT JOIN employees ON time_keeping.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE time_keeping.Department = 'Sales Casual' AND time_keeping.dtFrom = idtfrom AND time_keeping.dtTo = idtto AND time_keeping.Final = 1 AND time_keeping.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_casual_tk`()
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status <> 'Regular' AND employees.Status <> 'Hold' AND employees.Status <> 'Resigned' AND employees.Status <> 'Terminated' AND employees.Active = 1 AND employees.CompleteRequirements = 1 AND login00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_regular`()
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID, login00.Position2, login00.SM, login00.SD, login00.SSD, login00.SDH, login00.DigitalSignature FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status = 'Regular' AND employees.Active = 1 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_regular_payroll`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.* FROM time_keeping LEFT JOIN employees ON time_keeping.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE time_keeping.Department = 'Sales Regular' AND time_keeping.dtFrom = idtfrom AND time_keeping.dtTo = idtto AND time_keeping.Final = 1 AND time_keeping.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_regular_tk`()
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status = 'Regular' AND employees.Active = 1 AND employees.CompleteRequirements = 1 AND login00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_employees_sales_tk`()
BEGIN
SELECT employees.*, login00.UserID FROM employees LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Active = 1 AND employees.CompleteRequirements = 1;
END$$

BEGIN

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_female_vote_count`(IN `employeeid` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM voting_tracker LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON voting_tracker.ParticipantID  = xmas_party.id  LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE voting_tracker.VotedBy = employeeid AND employees.Sex = "Female";

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_floor_percentage`(IN `ifloorid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalchecklist, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_layout.FloorID = ifloorid AND checklist.Deleted = 0 AND checklist.Status = 'Completed' AND checklist.Approved = 'Approved') AS totalcompleted FROM checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_layout.FloorID = ifloorid AND checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_for_rectification_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_for_rectification_count_tradehead`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_inactive_agents`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT login00.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Position ="Agent" AND login00.Position2 <> "SSD" AND login00.Position2 <> "BS" AND login00.Position2 <> "" AND employees.LastName <> "" AND employees.FirstName <> "" AND login00.Deleted = 1 ORDER BY Position2;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_inactive_agents_dtr`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT login00.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Position ="Agent" AND login00.Position2 <> "" AND login00.Deleted = 1 ORDER BY Position2;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_inactive_per_agent_dtr`(IN `loginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT login00.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Position ="Agent" AND login00.Position2 <> "" AND login00.UserID = loginid AND login00.Deleted = 1 ORDER BY Position2;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_count`(IN `icurrentdate` VARCHAR(500), IN `icondition` VARCHAR(999))
BEGIN
    -- Construct the base query
    SET @sql_query = CONCAT('
        SELECT * FROM incentive 
        LEFT JOIN sale00 AS saledata ON incentive.saleid = saledata.id
        WHERE (incentive.type = "RF Incentive"
        AND incentive.Deleted = 0', icondition,')
        OR
        (incentive.type = "Booked Sale Incentive"
        AND incentive.Deleted = 0', icondition,')
        ');

    -- Prepare the query
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql_query;

    -- Execute the prepared statement
    EXECUTE stmt;

    -- Deallocate the prepared statement
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_count_collection`()

FROM incentive 
WHERE 
        sales_status = "Approved"
    AND collect_status = "Pending" 
    AND Deleted = 0;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_count_tab`(IN `icounttype` VARCHAR(500), IN `icurrentdate` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` VARCHAR(500), IN `icondition` VARCHAR(999))
BEGIN
    -- Construct the base query
    SET @sql_query = CONCAT('
        SELECT * FROM incentive 
        LEFT JOIN sale00 AS saledata ON incentive.saleid = saledata.id
        WHERE incentive.type = "', icounttype, '" 
        AND incentive.Deleted = 0 ', icondition);

    -- Prepare the query
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql_query;

    -- Execute the prepared statement
    EXECUTE stmt;

    -- Deallocate the prepared statement
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_count_tab_collection`(IN `icounttype` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * 
FROM incentive 
WHERE 
       sales_status = "Approved"
   AND collect_status = "Pending" 
   AND Deleted = 0 
   AND type = icounttype;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_count_tab_collectionhead`(IN `icounttype` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM incentive 
WHERE 
	collect_status = "Approved"
	AND collecthead_status = "Pending" 
    AND Deleted = 0 
    AND type = icounttype;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

FROM incentive

       sales_status = "Approved"
   AND docu_status = "Pending" 
   AND Deleted = 0 
   AND type = icounttype;
END$$

	    docu_status = "Approved"

Deleted = 0 AND
type = icounttype;

WHERE 
	docuhead_status = "Approved" 
    AND collecthead_status = "Approved" 
    AND lcc_status = "Pending" 
    AND Deleted = 0 
    AND type = icounttype;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_details`(IN `iid` INT)
SELECT 
    incentive.*,
    incentive.clientid,
    CONCAT(clientdata.FirstName, ' ', clientdata.LastName) AS buyername,
    saledata.ReservationDate AS ReservationDate,
    saledata.UnitID AS UnitID,
    saleardata.ArNo AS ArNo,
    saleardata.Remarks AS Remarks,
    clientdata.PersonalAttachment,
    clientdata.SignatureAttachment,
    clientdata.Tin_Attachment,
    clientdata.Passport_Attachment,
    clientdata.DriverLicense,
    clientdata.Sss_Gsis,
    clientdata.PrcID,
    clientdata.FreeID,
    clientdata.BirthCertificate,
    clientdata.date_PersonalAttachment,
    clientdata.date_SignatureAttachment,
    clientdata.date_Tin_Attachment,
    clientdata.date_Passport_Attachment,
    clientdata.date_DriverLicense,
    clientdata.date_Sss_Gsis,
    clientdata.date_PrcID,
    clientdata.date_FreeID,
    clientdata.date_BirthCertificate,

    saledata.BUA,
    saledata.Computation,
    saledata.ContractToSell,
    saledata.ContractToSell2,
    saledata.DeedOfUndertaking,
    saledata.SpecialPowerOfAtty,
    saledata.DeedOfAssignment,
    saledata.RequestLetter,
    saledata.Layout,
    saledata.RevisedLayout,
    saledata.RevisedLayoutReport,
    saledata.ArticleOfIncorporation,
    saledata.BoardResolutions_SecCert,
    saledata.FinancialStatement,
    saledata.CertificateOfRegistration_BIR,
    saledata.ChangeOrder,
    saledata.ByLaws,
    saledata.MarriageContract,
    saledata.KYC_Principal,
    saledata.KYC_CoPrincipal,
    saledata.DataPrivacy,
    saledata.NPV AS sale00NPV,
    saledata.ReservationDate,

    CONCAT(em_sales.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_sales.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_sales.Lastname) AS approve_sales,
    CONCAT(em_docu.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_docu.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_docu.Lastname) AS approve_docu,
    CONCAT(em_docuhead.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_docuhead.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_docuhead.Lastname) AS approve_docuhead,
    CONCAT(em_collect.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_collect.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_collect.Lastname) AS approve_collect,
    CONCAT(em_collecthead.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_collecthead.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_collecthead.Lastname) AS approve_collecthead,
    CONCAT(em_lcc.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_lcc.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_lcc.Lastname) AS approve_lcc,
    CONCAT(em_hvy.Firstname, ' ', UPPER(SUBSTRING(em_hvy.Middlename, 1, 1)),'. ', em_hvy.Lastname) AS approve_hvy,

    sales.DigitalSignature AS sig_sales,
    docu.DigitalSignature AS sig_docu,
    docuhead.DigitalSignature AS sig_docuhead,
    collect.DigitalSignature AS sig_collect,
    collecthead.DigitalSignature AS sig_collecthead,
    lcc.DigitalSignature AS sig_lcc,
    hvy.DigitalSignature AS sig_hvy,

      (SELECT collection00.Amount
       FROM collection00 WHERE collection00.Deleted = 0 
       AND collection00.ORNo = incentive.ORNo 
       AND collection00.SalesID = incentive.saleid) AS ORNo_Amount,

	   COALESCE(
        (SELECT CONCAT(marketing_partner.FirstName, ' ', marketing_partner.LastName)
         FROM commsspecs 
         LEFT JOIN marketing_partner ON commsspecs.AgentID = marketing_partner.MPID 
         WHERE commsspecs.SalesID = incentive.saleid 
           AND commsspecs.payable_agent = 1),
        (SELECT CONCAT(employees.FirstName, ' ', employees.LastName)
         FROM commsspecs 
         LEFT JOIN employees ON commsspecs.AgentID = employees.EmployeeNo 
         WHERE commsspecs.SalesID = incentive.saleid 
           AND commsspecs.payable_agent = 1)
    	) AS agentname

    FROM 
        incentive

        LEFT JOIN client_principal AS clientdata ON incentive.clientid = clientdata.ClientID
        LEFT JOIN sale00 AS saledata ON incentive.saleid = saledata.id
        LEFT JOIN sales_ar AS saleardata ON incentive.saleid = saleardata.SalesID

        LEFT JOIN login00 AS sales ON incentive.sales_approvedby = sales.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS docu ON incentive.docu_approvedby = docu.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS docuhead ON incentive.docuhead_approvedby = docuhead.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS collect ON incentive.collect_approvedby = collect.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS collecthead ON incentive.collecthead_approvedby = collecthead.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS lcc ON incentive.lcc_approvedby = lcc.UserID
        LEFT JOIN login00 AS hvy ON incentive.pres_approvedby = hvy.UserID

        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_sales ON sales.EmployeeNo = em_sales.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_docu ON docu.EmployeeNo = em_docu.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_docuhead ON docuhead.EmployeeNo = em_docuhead.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_collect ON collect.EmployeeNo = em_collect.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_collecthead ON collecthead.EmployeeNo = em_collecthead.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_lcc ON lcc.EmployeeNo = em_lcc.EmployeeNo
        LEFT JOIN employees AS em_hvy ON hvy.EmployeeNo = em_hvy.EmployeeNo
    WHERE 
      	incentive.id = iid 
      	AND incentive.Deleted = 0
    GROUP BY 
		saleardata.SalesID$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_document_completion_count_collection`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM incentive WHERE collect_complete = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_document_completion_count_documentation`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM incentive WHERE docu_complete = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_lastid`(IN `ilastsaleid` INT, IN `iclientid` INT, IN `idatecreated` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * 
FROM `incentive` 
WHERE 
	saleid = ilastsaleid
    AND clientid = iclientid
    AND datecreated = idatecreated
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_or`(IN `isaleid` INT(255))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `collection00` WHERE SalesID = isaleid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_incentive_orno`(IN `isalesid` INT, IN `iunit` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM collection00 
WHERE 
	SalesID = isalesid
    AND UnitID = iunit
    AND Deleted = 0
ORDER BY `collection00`.`PaymentID` ASC;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_inspection_checklist_rectification_count`()

SELECT * FROM punchlisting WHERE Status = 'For Inspection';

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_inspection_tradehead_rectification_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 AND punchlisting.Status = 'For Inspection' GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM deductions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Insurance' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

    NO SQL

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_journalvoucher_details`(IN `ijvid` VARCHAR(50), IN `icreatedby` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT journal_voucher.*, apv.Payee, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, login00.DigitalSignature
FROM journal_voucher 
LEFT JOIN apv ON journal_voucher.APV = apv.APV AND journal_voucher.ChargeTo = apv.ChargeTo 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON journal_voucher.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE journal_voucher.JV = ijvid AND journal_voucher.CreatedBy = icreatedby;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_julie_punchlisting_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = '23' AND (punchlisting.Status = 'For Rectification' OR punchlisting.Status = 'For Rectification (Ongoing)') GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$

END$$

AND employees.Department <> 'HTY San Parking' AND employees.Department <> 'Executive Office') AND t1.EmployeeNo <> 'PVMS719266' AND t1.EmployeeNo <> 'PVMS70010' AND t1.EmployeeNo <> iemployeeno AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM xmas_code_wish as t2 WHERE t2.Partner = t1.EmployeeNo) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1; 
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_last_apvno`(IN `iproject` VARCHAR(500), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ExtractNumber(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', 1)) = iyear AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', -2), '-', 1) = imonth AND ChargeTo = iproject ORDER BY APV DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_last_bingo_winner`()
BEGIN
SELECT bingo_winners.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT bingo_button.Status FROM bingo_button) AS b_status, xmas_party.Picture FROM bingo_winners LEFT JOIN employees ON bingo_winners.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON bingo_winners.EmployeeNo = xmas_party.EmployeeNo WHERE bingo_winners.Status <> 'Cancelled' ORDER BY bingo_winners.DateTime DESC;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_last_withdrawal_date_item`(in iitemcode int, in iprojectid int)
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.`DateDelivered` FROM `release` LEFT JOIN release_details ON `release`.`RequestNo` = release_details.RequestNo WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid  AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 ORDER BY `release`.`DateDelivered` DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_last_withdrawal_date_itemcode`(in iitemcode varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.`DateDelivered` FROM `release` LEFT JOIN release_details ON `release`.`RequestNo` = release_details.RequestNo WHERE `release`.`Delivered` = 1 AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 AND release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY `release`.`DateDelivered` DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
