DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_latest_price_item`(in iitemcode varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(po_details.Price, 0) AS price FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.PO ORDER BY po.Date DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_accounting`(IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' OR login00.Department = 'HTY Parking') AND login00.UserType <> iusertype AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_bs`(IN `iloginid` int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Position2 = 'SM' AND login00.SD = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(50), IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = idepartment AND login00.UserType <> iusertype AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_engineering`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Engineering Department';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.') AND login00.UserType <> 37 AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_hty`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'HTY Parking';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41 OR login00.UserID = 43 OR login00.UserID = 122 OR login00.UserID = 27)) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_it_sup`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'IT Department' AND login00.UserID <> 74 AND login00.UserID <> 77;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_jrm`()
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved1 = 'Approved' AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND login00.UserType <> 14; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.UserType = 37 AND (login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'IT Department')) OR ((login00.UserID = 98) AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending') OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request 
LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
WHERE (leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved1 = 'Pending' AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND login00.UserType <> 14) OR (leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'EHS');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request 
LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
WHERE (login00.UserType = 37 AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department') OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND  (login00.Department = 'Executive Department' OR login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department'));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_sd`(IN `iloginid` int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Position2 = 'SM' AND login00.SD = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_approval_count_ssd`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON leave_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE leave_request.Deleted = 0 AND leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Position2 = 'SD' OR login00.Position2 = 'BS' OR login00.Position2 = 'SM') AND login00.SSD = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leave_used_offsetting`(in iemployeeno varchar(50), in iyear varchar(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) AS totaldays FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_leaverequest`(IN `iID` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request WHERE ID = iID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation`(IN `iliquidation` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, rfp.Particulars, rfp.DateCreated as rfpDate, rfp.Amount, rfp.Department, rfp.OfficeHeadApprovedName, A.DigitalSignature, B.DigitalSignature as HeadSignature FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 as A ON liquidation.LoginID = A.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 as B ON liquidation.OfficeHeadID = B.UserID WHERE Liquidation = iliquidation;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_details`(IN `iliquidation` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation_details WHERE Liquidation = iliquidation ORDER BY `Date` ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_office_rfp_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.* FROM rfp WHERE (LoginID = iloginid OR CareOf = iloginid) AND Type = 'Office' AND Reimbursement = 0 AND CompleteRequirements = 0 AND ForLiquidation = 1 AND Cancelled = 0 AND Released = 1 AND (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM liquidation WHERE liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP AND liquidation.Process <> 'Cancelled') = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_pcr`(in ipcr varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation_petty_cash WHERE PCR = ipcr AND HeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND TreasuryApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_pending_days`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND Reimbursement = 0 AND CompleteRequirements = 0 AND ForLiquidation = 1 AND Released = 1 AND Liquidated = 0 AND Cancelled = 0 AND YEAR(Release_Date) >= 2023 AND CountWeekDays(Release_Date, idate) >= 7 ORDER BY Release_Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation WHERE RFP = irfp AND OfficeHeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND TreasuryApproved <> 'Cancelled';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidation_rfp_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM rfp WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND Type = 'Construction' AND Reimbursement = 0 AND CompleteRequirements = 0 AND ForLiquidation = 1 AND Liquidated = 0 AND Cancelled = 0 AND Released = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_liquidations_attachments`(IN `ipettycash` VARCHAR(10000))
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.Attachment, liquidation_petty_cash.Attachment AS liquidation_attachment FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN liquidation_petty_cash ON petty_cash.PCR = liquidation_petty_cash.PCR WHERE FIND_IN_SET(petty_cash.PCR, ipettycash);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_list_liquidation`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, rfp.Amount, rfp.Particulars, rfp.DateCreated as DateRequested, rfp.HandlingFee, rfp.InstallationFee, login00.Department FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE liquidation.LoginID = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_loan_details`(IN `iloanid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT loans.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM loans LEFT JOIN employees ON loans.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE loans.LoanID = iloanid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_lunchin_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT Date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'LUNCH IN' AND DATE(Date) = idate AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_lunchin_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT MAX(Date) AS max_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'LUNCH IN' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_lunchout_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT Date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'LUNCH OUT' AND DATE(Date) = idate AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_lunchout_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT MIN(Date) AS min_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'LUNCH OUT' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_maintenance_request`(IN `irequestid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM maintenance_request WHERE RequestID = irequestid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_male_vote_count`(IN `employeeid` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM voting_tracker LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON voting_tracker.ParticipantID  = xmas_party.id  LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE voting_tracker.VotedBy = employeeid AND employees.Sex = "Male";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_material_changes`(IN `icbid` INT, IN `icatid` INT, IN `isubcatid` INT, IN `iworkid` INT, IN `imaterialid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor_billing_adjusted.*, 
	   items.ItemName as itemname,
       items.Description as description,
       items.Unit as unit
FROM `contractor_billing_adjusted` 
LEFT JOIN items ON contractor_billing_adjusted.Material = items.ItemCode
WHERE contractor_billing_adjusted.CBID = icbid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.CatID = icatid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.SubCatID = isubcatid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.WorkID = iworkid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.MaterialID = imaterialid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.ItemType = 'Material' AND contractor_billing_adjusted.ActionType = 'Edit' AND contractor_billing_adjusted.Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_material_po_delivery_date`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.DateDelivered, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE dr_details.PO = ipo AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= idtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= idtto AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY dr_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_material_requestno_floor`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifloor` CHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) AS totalqty FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.RequestNo = irequestno AND release_details.Floor = ifloor AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_materials_po_delivered`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.PO = ipo AND dr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0) AS totaldelivered FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_materials_po_delivered_balance`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Balance), 0) as totalbalance FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po_details.Balance > 0 GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_materials_po_delivered_stat`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, dr_details.DateDelivered, po.DateApproved, IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) as totaldelivered FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.PO = ipo AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY dr_details.ItemCode, dr_details.DateDelivered ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_max`(IN `icode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT Max FROM replenishment WHERE ItemCode = icode AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mc_parked`(IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.* FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID WHERE MONTH(parking_end_duty.Date) = imonth AND YEAR(parking_end_duty.Date) = iyear AND Class = 'M' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_monthly_xmas_pay_workers`(in iemployeeno varchar(50), in iyear varchar(10), in imonth varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM payroll WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(PayrollDate) = iyear AND MONTH(PayrollDate) = imonth AND Final = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_count_cm`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE (mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approval1 = 'Pending' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support') OR (mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'EHS');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_count_date_material`(in iitemcode int, in idate date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty), 0) AS totalmr FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) >= idate AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_count_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND Approval1 = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department <> 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_count_pm_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_count_qs`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM mr WHERE TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_details`(IN `mrnum` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE mr.MR = mrnum and mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_details1`(IN `mrnum` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.id, mr_details.MR, mr_details.Floor, mr_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, items.Attachment, mr_details.Qty, mr_details.Stocks, mr_details.Remarks, mr_details.Balance, mr.ProjectID FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.MR = mrnum AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 ORDER by mr_details.Floor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_details_balance`(in imr varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) AS totalbalance, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Balance > 0 AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY mr_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_details_per_dept`(IN iitemcode int)
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Qty),0) AS deptQty, Department FROM temp_suppy_details WHERE ItemCode = iitemcode GROUP BY Department;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_max_replenishment`(IN `itemcode` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT supply_replenishment.* FROM supply_replenishment WHERE supply_replenishment.ItemCode = itemcode AND supply_replenishment.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_office_approval_count_head`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = idepartment AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_office_approval_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office') OR (mr.LoginID = 263 AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_office_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN 
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'IT Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'Sales Department') AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_office_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN 
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(0), 0) AS totalcount FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND mr.LoginID <> 263 AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_office_details`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, prepared.fName AS prep_fname, prepared.lName AS prep_lname, prepared.DigitalSignature, checked.fName AS checked_fname, checked.lName AS checked_lname, checked.DigitalSignature AS checked_signature, approved.fName AS approved_fname, approved.lName AS approved_lname, approved.DigitalSignature AS approved_signature FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 AS prepared ON mr.LoginID = prepared.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS checked ON mr.CheckedID = checked.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS approved ON mr.ApprovedID = approved.UserID WHERE mr.MR = imr AND mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mr_requested_qty`(IN `icode` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty),0) AS ReqQty , 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= '2023-03-01') AS deliQty,


(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode) as releaseQTY


FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.ItemCode = icode AND mr.TradeHeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr.DateCreated >= '2023-03-01';

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mrcode_contractor`(in icontractorcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT MRCode FROM contractor00 WHERE ContractorCode = icontractorcode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_mrnumber_details`(IN `mrnumber` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE mr.MR = mrnumber and mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_berlito_rectification_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_checklist_rectification_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_mr_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM mr WHERE TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND PurchasingLoginID = 0 AND Status = 'Open' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_punchlisting`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_punchlisting_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_new_tradehead_rectification_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_next_agent`()
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM round_robin LEFT JOIN login00 ON round_robin.AgentID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE round_robin.Viewed = 0 ORDER BY round_robin.id ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nextday_ot_timeout_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `istarthour` TIME)
BEGIN
SELECT MAX(Date) AS max_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME OUT' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND TIME(Date) < istarthour AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nontaxable_other_adjustment_employee`(in iemployeeno varchar(50), in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM adjustments WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Others' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nontaxable_other_deduction_backoffice`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT deductions.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND employees.Department <> 'Site Worker' AND employees.Department <> 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' AND employees.Department <> 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' AND employees.Department <> 'HTY San Parking' AND employees.Department <> 'Executive Office' AND employees.Department <> 'Pasa Payroll') AND deductions.Purpose = 'Others' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nontaxable_other_deduction_department`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT deductions.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = iclassification AND deductions.Purpose = 'Others' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nontaxable_other_deduction_sales_casual`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT deductions.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status <> 'Regular' AND deductions.Purpose = 'Others' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_nontaxable_other_deduction_sales_regular`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT deductions.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status = 'Regular' AND deductions.Purpose = 'Others' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND isRead = 0 ORDER BY DateCreated ASC;
END$$

BEGIN

END$$

BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM official_business WHERE Approved = 'Pending' AND (Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' OR Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND EmployeeNo <> iemployeeno AND Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ob_approval_count_hvy`()
BEGIN 
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM official_business LEFT JOIN login00 ON official_business.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE official_business.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41 OR login00.UserID = 43 OR login00.UserID = 122 OR login00.UserID = 27 OR login00.UserID = 119) AND official_business.Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ob_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN 
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM official_business WHERE Approved = 'Pending' AND (Department = 'Sales Department' OR Department = 'Marketing Department' OR Department = 'IT Department') AND Status = 'For Approval of LCC' AND Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ob_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN 
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM official_business WHERE Approved = 'Pending' AND Department <> 'Sales Department' AND Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND Department <> 'IT Department' AND Status = 'For Approval of RLT' AND Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ob_details`(in iob_id int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM official_business WHERE ob_id = iob_id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_doc_head`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM rfp WHERE (Type = 'Office' AND OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND Department = 'Documentation Department' AND Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND Type2 <> 'Commission') OR (Type2 = 'Reservation' AND DocumentApproved = 'Pending') AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_head`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = idepartment AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_head_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'EHS' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND (rfp.Department = 'HR and Admin Department'  OR rfp.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' OR rfp.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) OR (rfp.Type2 = 'Rental' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.HRApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND (rfp.Type2 = 'Confidential' OR rfp.Type2 = 'Consultant') OR ((rfp.Department = 'Site Support' OR rfp.Department = 'EHS') AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0)) OR (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.Department = 'Executive Department' AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.LCCApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND (rfp.Department = 'IT Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR rfp.Department = 'Sales Department') OR (rfp.Type2 = 'Reservation' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.LCCApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) OR (rfp.ChargeTo = 'LCC' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.LCCApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0)) OR (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.Department = 'Executive Department' AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_mav`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND (rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) OR (rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Treasury Department' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName 
FROM rfp 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE ((rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Consultant' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Reservation' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND rfp.Department <> 'EHS' AND rfp.Department <> 'IT Department' AND rfp.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND rfp.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND rfp.Department <> 'Treasury Department' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND rfp.ChargeTo <> 'LCC') OR (rfp.Type2 = 'Rental' AND rfp.HRApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0)) OR (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.Department = 'Executive Department' AND rfp.ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_saleshead`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND login00.Position <> 'Agent') OR (rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.SSDApproval = 'Approved' AND rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND login00.Position = 'Agent');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_office_rfp_count_ssd`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.SSDApproval = 'Pending' AND rfp.Department = 'Sales Department' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND login00.Position = 'Agent';

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM old_apv WHERE apv_id = iapvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_cv_credit`(IN icvid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM old_cv_credit WHERE CVID = icvid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_cv_debit`(IN icvid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM old_cv_debit WHERE CVID = icvid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_cv_details`(IN `icvid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT old_cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM old_cv LEFT JOIN banks ON old_cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE old_cv.CVID = icvid ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_mr_details`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT old_mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, old_mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM old_mr LEFT JOIN type ON old_mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON old_mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE old_mr.MR = imr ORDER BY old_mr.id DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_po_details`(IN `ipo_id` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT old_po.*, supp00.Supplier, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(old_po_details.Total) , 0) FROM old_po_details WHERE old_po_details.PO = old_po.PO AND old_po_details.Deleted = 0) AS tsum, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, type.Type, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = old_po.PO AND rfp.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfpcount FROM old_po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON old_po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON old_po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN type ON old_po.TypeID = type.TypeID WHERE old_po.po_ID = ipo_id ORDER BY old_po.id DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_po_details_classification`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT Classification FROM old_po_details WHERE PO = ipo AND Floor = ifloor AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY Classification ORDER BY id desc ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_old_rfp`(in irfp varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM old_rfp WHERE RFP = irfp ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ongoing_berlito_rectification_count`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode <> 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND DATEDIFF(idate, DATE(room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead_Assigned_Date)) < 15 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ongoing_checklist_rectification_count`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode <> 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND DATEDIFF(idate, DATE(room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead_Assigned_Date)) < 15 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ongoing_tradehead_rectification_count`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode <> 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_onhold_rfp_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND AccountingApproved = 'Pending' AND Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND Cancelled = 0 AND PaymentMode <> 'Payroll' AND ChargeTo <> 'LCC' AND Rejected = 0 AND OnHold = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_openhouse_details`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT openhouse.*, login00.Position, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM openhouse LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse.AgentID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE openhouse.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_ot_adjustment_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)

END$$

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_other_po_details`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Classification = iclassification AND  po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM deductions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Others' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100), IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = idepartment AND login00.UserType <> iusertype AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Checked = 'Completed' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'EHS') OR (login_employee.Department = 'EHS' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_engineering`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Engineering Department' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' OR login00.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND login00.UserType <> 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_hty`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'HTY Parking' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41)) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_jrm`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount 
FROM overtime 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo AND login_employee.Deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE ((employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.PMApproval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department <> 'EHS') OR (login_employee.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'IT Department' OR login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department') AND login00.UserType = 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount 
FROM overtime 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE (login_employee.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.PMApproval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department' AND login00.UserType = 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_approval_count_site`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_details`(in iid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM overtime WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_overtime_summary_report`(IN `iemployee` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idate` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName, employees.Classification

FROM overtime 

LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

WHERE overtime.EmployeeNo = iemployee AND overtime.Approval = "Approved" AND overtime.Date = idate AND overtime.Deleted = 0 ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pagibigloan_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM deductions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Pag-Ibig Loan' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_paid_leave_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND dtFrom <= idate AND dtTo >= idate AND PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_paid_leave_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND ((dtFrom >= idtfrom AND dtFrom <= idtto) OR (dtTo >= idtfrom AND dtTo <= idtto)) AND PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_parking_deposit_entry`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM parking_deposit WHERE id = iid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_parking_end_duty_details`(in iendid int)
BEGIN
SELECT parking_end_duty.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM parking_end_duty LEFT JOIN login00 ON parking_end_duty.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE parking_end_duty.EndID = iendid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_parking_incident_report_acknowledgement_count`(IN `icol` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
    SET @sql = CONCAT('SELECT *
    FROM incident_report
    WHERE`', icol, '` = "Pending" AND Deleted = 0');
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql;
    EXECUTE stmt;
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_parking_incident_report_acknowledgement_count2`()
BEGIN
    SELECT * FROM incident_report WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_payee`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM payee WHERE PayeeID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_paymentid_orno`(in iorno varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT PaymentID FROM collection00 WHERE ORNo = iorno AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_payroll_entry_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(Basic) AS totalbasic, SUM(Absent) AS totalabsent, SUM(SL) AS totalsl, SUM(VL) AS totalvl, SUM(PL) AS totalpl, SUM(Late) AS totallate, SUM(Undertime) AS totalundertime, SUM(Overtime) AS totalovertime, SUM(RD) AS totalrd, SUM(RDOT) AS totalrdot, SUM(RDND) AS totalrdnd, SUM(NightDiff) AS totalnightdiff, SUM(LegalHoliday) AS totallegalholiday, SUM(LegalHoliday_OT) AS totallegalholidayot, SUM(LegalHoliday_ND) AS totallegalholidaynd, SUM(SpecialHoliday) AS totalspecialholiday, SUM(SpecialHoliday_OT) AS totalspecialholidayot, SUM(SpecialHoliday_ND) AS totalspecialholidaynd, SUM(TaxOtherAdjust) AS totaltaxotheradjust, SUM(TaxOtherDeduct) AS totaltaxotherdeduct, SUM(SSS_EE) AS totalsssee, SUM(WISP_EE) AS totalwispee, SUM(Philhealth_EE) AS totalphilhealthee, SUM(HDMF_EE) AS totalhdmfee, SUM(Tax) AS totaltax, SUM(DeMinimis) AS totaldeminimis, SUM(NonTaxOtherAdjust) AS totalnontaxotheradjust, SUM(TaxRefund) AS totaltaxrefund, SUM(CompanyLoanAdjustment) AS totalcompanyloanadjustment, SUM(SSSLoan) AS totalsssloan, SUM(SSSCalamityLoan) AS totalcalamityloan, SUM(HDMFLoan) AS totalhdmfloan, SUM(BankLoan) AS totalbankloan, SUM(Insurance) AS totalinsurance, SUM(NetPay) AS totalnetpay, SUM(SSS_ER) AS totalssser, SUM(WISP_ER) AS totalwisper, SUM(Philhealth_ER) AS totalphilhealther, SUM(HDMF_ER) AS totalhdmfer, SUM(CompanyLoan) AS totalcompanyloan, SUM(Others) AS totalotherloan, SUM(NonTaxOtherDeduct) AS totalnontaxotherdeduct, SUM(Penalty) AS totalpenalty, dtFrom, dtTo, SUM(SIL) AS totalsil FROM payroll WHERE PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND Classification = iclassification AND Final = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pdcs_clearing`(IN `month` VARCHAR(50), IN `year` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT 
	c.*
FROM collection00 c
LEFT JOIN banks AS b ON c.BankDeposit = b.`id`
WHERE 
		c.Check_Status = 'Pending' 
	AND MONTH(c.CheckDate) = month
	AND YEAR(c.CheckDate) = year
	AND c.Deleted = 0 AND 1 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM deductions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Purpose = 'Penalty' AND Type = 'Non-Taxable' AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pending_berlito_rectification_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.* FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = '0' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_petty_cash_liquidation_details`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, login00.Department, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation_petty_cash.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_petty_cash_liquidation_details_print`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.DateRequested, petty_cash.Particulars, petty_cash.Purpose, petty_cash.Amount, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, login00.DigitalSignature, head_employee.FirstName AS head_fname, head_employee.LastName AS head_lname, head_login.DigitalSignature AS head_signature, exec_employee.FirstName AS exec_fname, exec_employee.LastName AS exec_lname, exec_login.DigitalSignature AS exec_signature, treasury_employee.FirstName AS treasury_fname, treasury_employee.LastName AS treasury_lname, treasury_login.DigitalSignature AS treasury_signature FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation_petty_cash.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS head_login ON liquidation_petty_cash.HeadApprovedBy = head_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS head_employee ON head_login.EmployeeNo = head_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS exec_login ON liquidation_petty_cash.ExecApprovedBy = exec_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS exec_employee ON exec_login.EmployeeNo = exec_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS treasury_login ON liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedBy = treasury_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS treasury_employee ON treasury_login.EmployeeNo = treasury_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_petty_cash_liquidation_pending_days`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM petty_cash WHERE RequestBy = iloginid AND Released = 1 AND Reimbursement = 0 AND Liquidated = 0 AND Deleted = 0 AND CountWeekDays(DATE(ReleaseDate), idate) >= 2 ORDER BY ReleaseDate ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pettycash_details`(IN `ipcr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, login00.DigitalSignature, head_employees.FirstName AS approve_fname, head_employees.LastName AS approve_lname, head_login.DigitalSignature As approve_digitalsignature, exec_employees.FirstName AS exec_fname, exec_employees.LastName AS exec_lname, exec_login.DigitalSignature AS exec_digitalsignature, release_employees.FirstName AS releaser_fname, release_employees.LastName AS releaser_lname, release_login.DigitalSignature AS releaser_digitalsignature FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 ON petty_cash.RequestBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS head_login ON petty_cash.ApprovedBy = head_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS head_employees ON head_login.EmployeeNo = head_employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS exec_login ON petty_cash.ExecApprovedBy = exec_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS exec_employees ON exec_login.EmployeeNo = exec_employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS release_login ON petty_cash.ReleaseBy = release_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS release_employees ON release_login.EmployeeNo = release_employees.EmployeeNo WHERE petty_cash.PCR = ipcr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pettycash_liquidation_change_date_backoffice`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.Particulars, petty_cash.Purpose FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApproved = 'Approved' AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) = idate AND petty_cash.Department <> 'Site Support' AND petty_cash.Department <> 'EHS' AND liquidation_petty_cash.pChange > 0 AND liquidation_petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pettycash_liquidation_change_date_site`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.Particulars, petty_cash.Purpose FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApproved = 'Approved' AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) = idate AND (petty_cash.Department = 'Site Support' OR petty_cash.Department = 'EHS') AND liquidation_petty_cash.pChange > 0 AND liquidation_petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pettycash_liquidation_change_range_backoffice`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.Particulars, petty_cash.Purpose FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApproved = 'Approved' AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) >= idtfrom AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) <= idtto AND petty_cash.Department <> 'Site Support' AND petty_cash.Department <> 'EHS' AND liquidation_petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pettycash_liquidation_change_range_site`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.Particulars, petty_cash.Purpose FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApproved = 'Approved' AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) >= idtfrom AND DATE(liquidation_petty_cash.TreasuryApprovedDate) <= idtto AND (petty_cash.Department = 'Site Support' OR petty_cash.Department = 'EHS') AND liquidation_petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pmamr`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, login00.Department FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE mr.MR = imr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_balance`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Balance), 0) as totalbalance FROM po_details WHERE PO = ipo AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_details`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total) , 0) FROM po_details WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0) AS tsum, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, type.Type AS trade, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = ipo AND rfp.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfpcount FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN type ON po.TypeID = type.TypeID WHERE po.PO = ipo AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_details_classification`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT Classification FROM po_details WHERE PO = ipo AND Floor = ifloor AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY Classification ORDER BY id asc ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_details_printout`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Floor = ifloor AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_status_aging_apv`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN 


SELECT * FROM apv WHERE apv.PO = ipo AND apv.ManagerApproved = "Approved" AND apv.CheckedApproved = "Approved" AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_status_cv`(IN `iref` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT cv.* FROM cv WHERE cv.Ref LIKE CONCAT ('%',iref,'%') AND cv.Released = 1 AND cv.Cancelled = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_po_supplier_delivery_date`(IN `isuppliercode` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.PO FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= idtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= idtto AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY dr_details.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pre_overtime_approval_count_jrm`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.* FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Pre_PM_Approval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Pre_Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department <> 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_pre_overtime_approval_count_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.* FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Pre_PM_Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department <> 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_previous_price`(in idate date, in iitemcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.Price FROM po LEFT JOIN po_details ON po.PO = po_details.PO WHERE DATE(po.Date) < idate AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
UPDATE trip_ticket SET Approval = 'Approved', ProcessBy = iuserid, ProcessDate = idate WHERE TicketID = iticketid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_punchlist_complete_percentage`(IN `iunitid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON room_checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.Rectification_Remarks <> '' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0) AS complete_count FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON room_checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.Rectification_Remarks <> '' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_punchlist_details`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, unit_layout.FloorID, floor_layout.ProjectID FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id WHERE punchlisting.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_purchasing_contractor_billing_details`(IN `icbid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT `contractor_billing`.*, type.Type AS trade 
FROM `contractor_billing`
LEFT JOIN type ON `contractor_billing`.`TradeTypeID`= type.TypeID
WHERE `contractor_billing`.CBID = icbid AND `contractor_billing`.Estimated = 1 AND `contractor_billing`.Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_questions`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iqset` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
DELETE FROM xmas_participants_questions WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND qSet = iqset;

SELECT xmas_quiz_questions.* FROM xmas_quiz_questions WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT xmas_participants_questions.* FROM xmas_participants_questions WHERE xmas_quiz_questions.QuizID = xmas_participants_questions.QuizID AND xmas_participants_questions.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno) ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 10;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_questions_set`(IN `iqset` VARCHAR(5), IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT xmas_participants_questions.*, xmas_quiz_questions.Question, xmas_quiz_questions.Option1, xmas_quiz_questions.Option2, xmas_quiz_questions.Option3, xmas_quiz_questions.Option4, xmas_quiz_questions.Answer FROM xmas_participants_questions LEFT JOIN xmas_quiz_questions ON xmas_participants_questions.QuizID = xmas_quiz_questions.QuizID WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND qSet = iqset;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_release_supply_receipt_details`(IN `ireleaseid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT for_release_supply_request.*, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName, employees_release.FirstName as releaseFname, employees_release.LastName as releaseLname, login_release.DigitalSignature as relSign, employees.Department, login_req.DigitalSignature as reqSign 

FROM for_release_supply_request 

LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = login00.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 as login_release ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseBy = login_release.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees as employees_release ON login_release.EmployeeNo = employees_release.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 as login_req ON for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = login_req.UserID 

WHERE for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID = ireleaseid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_requested`(IN `icode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(mr_details.Qty) AS iRequested , (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0) AS idelivered FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.ItemCode = icode AND mr.TradeHeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_requested_balance`(IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT 
          inner_query.RequestID,
         inner_query.ItemCode,
        inner_query.ItemName,  
        inner_query.Description, 
        inner_query.Unit, 
        SUM(inner_query.BalanceQty) AS TotalBalance
        
     FROM 
     	( SELECT 
        
        supply_request_details.RequestID,
        supply_request_details.ItemCode,
        items.ItemName,  
        items.Description, 
        items.Unit, 
        SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty) AS TotalRequestQty,
        IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) AS TotalReleaseQty,
        (SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty) - IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0)) AS BalanceQty
     FROM 
        supply_request_details
     LEFT JOIN 
        for_release_supply_request_details 
        ON supply_request_details.RequestID = for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID
     LEFT JOIN 
        items 
        ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode
     WHERE 
         supply_request_details.RequestID <> ''
        AND supply_request_details.LoginID = iloginid
        AND supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode
        AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0
     GROUP BY 
        supply_request_details.RequestID
           HAVING 
        BalanceQty > 0
     ) AS inner_query
            GROUP BY 
        inner_query.ItemCode
                   HAVING 
          TotalBalance > 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_requestno_contractor_withdrawal_date`(in icontractorcode int, in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `release` WHERE ContractorCode = icontractorcode AND Delivered = 1 AND DATE(DateDelivered) >= idtfrom AND DATE(DateDelivered) <= idtto AND QSApproved = 'Approved' AND PMApproved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

END$$

END$$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM exit_request WHERE SubContractorID = iid AND DATE(ActualExit) <> '1111-11-11' AND DATE(ActualReturn) = '1111-11-11' AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY DateExit DESC LIMIT 1;

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_rfp_for_liquidation_details`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, cv.ReleaseAttachment FROM rfp LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id LEFT JOIN cv ON apv.CV = cv.CVID WHERE rfp.RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_rfp_liquidation_details`(IN `iliquidation` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, rfp.Particulars, rfp.DateCreated AS DateRequested, rfp.Amount, rfp.Department, rfp.HandlingFee, rfp.InstallationFee, rfp.APVID, apv.APV, apv.ChargeTo, apv.Payee, login00.DigitalSignature, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, head_employee.FirstName AS head_firstname, head_employee.LastName AS head_lastname, head_login.DigitalSignature AS head_signature, exec_employee.FirstName AS exec_firstname, exec_employee.LastName AS exec_lastname, exec_login.DigitalSignature AS exec_signature, treasury_employee.FirstName AS treasury_firstname, treasury_employee.LastName AS treasury_lastname, treasury_login.DigitalSignature AS treasury_signature, accounting_employee.FirstName AS accounting_firstname, accounting_employee.LastName AS accounting_lastname, accounting_login.DigitalSignature AS accounting_signature FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS head_login ON liquidation.OfficeHeadApprovedBy = head_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS head_employee ON head_login.EmployeeNo = head_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS exec_login ON liquidation.ExecApprovedBy = exec_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS exec_employee ON exec_login.EmployeeNo = exec_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 as treasury_login ON liquidation.TreasuryApprovedBy = treasury_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS treasury_employee ON treasury_login.EmployeeNo = treasury_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS accounting_login ON liquidation.AccountingApprovedBy = accounting_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS accounting_employee ON accounting_login.EmployeeNo = accounting_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE liquidation.Liquidation = iliquidation;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_accounting`(IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' OR login00.Department = 'HTY Parking') AND login00.UserType <> iusertype AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(50), IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.') AND login00.UserType <> 37 AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_hty`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'HTY Parking';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41 OR login00.UserID = 43 OR login00.UserID = 122 OR login00.UserID = 27)) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE ((specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.UserType = 37 AND (login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'IT Department')) OR ((login00.UserID = 98 OR login00.UserID = 113 OR login00.UserID = 117) AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending')) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_specialday_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (login00.UserType = 37 AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department') OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM specialday_request WHERE id = iid;
END$$
