DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_stocks`(IN `icode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_details.Qty), 0) FROM beg_details WHERE beg_details.ItemCode = icode AND beg_details.Deleted = 0) as beginv, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) FROM release_details WHERE release_details.ItemCode = icode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0) as withdraw, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(spoilage00.Qty), 0) FROM spoilage00 WHERE spoilage00.ItemCode = icode AND spoilage00.Deleted = 0) AS spoil, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode and dr_details.Deleted = 0) as purchase, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pullout.Qty), 0) FROM pullout WHERE pullout.ItemCode = icode AND pullout.Deleted = 0) AS pullout, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(return_details.Qty), 0) FROM return_details WHERE return_details.ItemCode = icode AND return_details.Deleted = 0) AS wreturn FROM items WHERE items.ItemCode = icode AND items.Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  FUNCTION `get_stocks_material`(`icode` INT, `iprojectid` INT) RETURNS double
BEGIN
DECLARE stocks double;
DECLARE ibeginv, iwithdraw, ispoil, ipurchase, ipullout, iwreturn, itransferfrom, itransferto double;
SET stocks = 0;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_details.Qty), 0) INTO ibeginv FROM beg_details WHERE beg_details.ItemCode = icode AND beg_details.Deleted = 0 AND beg_details.ProjectID = iprojectid;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) INTO iwithdraw FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = icode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(spoilage00.Qty), 0) INTO ispoil FROM spoilage00 WHERE spoilage00.ItemCode = icode AND spoilage00.Deleted = 0 AND spoilage00.ProjectID = iprojectid;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) INTO ipurchase FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode and dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.ProjectID = iprojectid AND po.Deleted = 0;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pullout.Qty), 0) INTO ipullout FROM pullout WHERE pullout.ItemCode = icode AND pullout.Deleted = 0 AND pullout.ProjectID = iprojectid;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(return_details.Qty), 0) INTO iwreturn FROM return_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON return_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE return_details.ItemCode = icode AND return_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(transfer_stocks_details.Qty), 0) INTO itransferfrom FROM transfer_stocks_details WHERE transfer_stocks_details.ItemCode = icode AND transfer_stocks_details.TransferFrom = iprojectid AND transfer_stocks_details.Deleted = 0;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(transfer_stocks_details.Qty), 0) INTO itransferto FROM transfer_stocks_details WHERE transfer_stocks_details.ItemCode = icode AND transfer_stocks_details.TransferTo = iprojectid AND transfer_stocks_details.Deleted = 0;

SET stocks = ibeginv - iwithdraw - ispoil + ipurchase - ipullout + iwreturn - itransferfrom + itransferto;

RETURN stocks;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_supplier_delivery_date`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT supp00.SupplierCode, supp00.Supplier FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE dr_details.DateDelivered >= idtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= idtto AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY supp00.SupplierCode ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

BEGIN
SELECT SupplierCode FROM supp00 WHERE Supplier = isupplier AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_supply_released_details`(IN `ireleaseid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) as totalrelease, items.Description, items.ItemName, items.Unit  FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE   for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = ireleaseid AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_supply_releaseid`(IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT ReleaseID FROM for_release_supply_request WHERE RequestID = irequestid AND ReleaseBy = iloginid AND ReleaseDate = idate ORDER BY ReleaseID DESC Limit 1;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_supply_requested`(IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details  WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = supply_request_details.ItemCode AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) as totalRelease FROM supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode  WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_supply_requested_details`(IN `irequestedid` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request_details.*, employees.FirstName as reqFname, employees.LastName as reqLname, login00.Department, login00.DigitalSignature FROM supply_request LEFT JOIN supply_request_details ON supply_request.RequestID = supply_request_details.RequestID LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.RequestedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo  WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestedid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_time_dtr`(IN `loginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN

SELECT dtr_attandance.*, employees_sm.FirstName AS SMfname, employees_sm.LastName AS SMlname, employees_sd.FirstName AS SDfname, employees_sd.LastName AS SDlname,  employees_ssd.FirstName AS SSDfname, employees_ssd.LastName AS SSDlname,  employees_sales.FirstName AS Salesfname, employees_sales.LastName AS Saleslname,  employees_salesH.FirstName AS SalesHfname, employees_salesH.LastName AS SalesHlname, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName,

login_sm.DigitalSignature as SMSign,  login_sd.DigitalSignature as SDSign, login_ssd.DigitalSignature as SSDSign, login_sales.DigitalSignature as SalesSign, login_salesH.DigitalSignature as SalesHSign, login00.DigitalSignature

FROM dtr_attandance 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sm ON dtr_attandance.SMApprovedBy = login_sm.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sm ON login_sm.EmployeeNo = employees_sm.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sd ON dtr_attandance.SDApprovedBy = login_sd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sd ON login_sd.EmployeeNo = employees_sd.EmployeeNo


LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_ssd ON dtr_attandance.SSDApprovedBy = login_ssd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_ssd ON login_ssd.EmployeeNo = employees_ssd.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sales ON dtr_attandance.SalesApprovedBy = login_sales.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sales ON login_sales.EmployeeNo = employees_sales.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_salesH ON dtr_attandance.SalesHApprovedBy = login_salesH.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_salesH ON login_salesH.EmployeeNo = employees_salesH.EmployeeNo


WHERE dtr_attandance.UserID = loginid AND dtr_attandance.SalesHApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.SSDApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.Date = idate AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_time_dtr_inactive`(IN `loginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT dtr_attandance.*, employees_sm.FirstName AS SMfname, employees_sm.LastName AS SMlname, employees_sd.FirstName AS SDfname, employees_sd.LastName AS SDlname,  employees_ssd.FirstName AS SSDfname, employees_ssd.LastName AS SSDlname,  employees_sales.FirstName AS Salesfname, employees_sales.LastName AS Saleslname,  employees_salesH.FirstName AS SalesHfname, employees_salesH.LastName AS SalesHlname, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName,

login_sm.DigitalSignature as SMSign,  login_sd.DigitalSignature as SDSign, login_ssd.DigitalSignature as SSDSign, login_sales.DigitalSignature as SalesSign, login_salesH.DigitalSignature as SalesHSign, login00.DigitalSignature

FROM dtr_attandance 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sm ON dtr_attandance.SMApprovedBy = login_sm.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sm ON login_sm.EmployeeNo = employees_sm.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sd ON dtr_attandance.SDApprovedBy = login_sd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sd ON login_sd.EmployeeNo = employees_sd.EmployeeNo


LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_ssd ON dtr_attandance.SSDApprovedBy = login_ssd.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_ssd ON login_ssd.EmployeeNo = employees_ssd.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_sales ON dtr_attandance.SalesApprovedBy = login_sales.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_sales ON login_sales.EmployeeNo = employees_sales.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_salesH ON dtr_attandance.SalesHApprovedBy = login_salesH.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_salesH ON login_salesH.EmployeeNo = employees_salesH.EmployeeNo

WHERE dtr_attandance.SalesHApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.SSDApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.UserID = loginid AND  dtr_attandance.Date = idate AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Deleted = 1;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timein_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT Date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME IN' AND DATE(Date) = idate AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timein_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT MIN(Date) AS min_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME IN' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

END$$

END$$

OR login00.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND timelog_request.Deleted = 0 AND login00.UserType <> 37;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelog_approval_count_hvy`()
BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelog_approval_count_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM timelog_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON timelog_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (timelog_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Site Support' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department' AND login00.UserType =  37 AND timelog_request.Deleted = 0) OR (login00.UserType =  36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND timelog_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND timelog_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelog_approval_count_site`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM timelog_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON timelog_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON timelog_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE timelog_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND timelog_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelog_details`(IN iid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM time_logs WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelogrequest`(in iID int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM timelog_request WHERE ID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelogs_attachment`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM timelog_request WHERE id = iid AND Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timelogs_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(t_in.Date, '') AS timein, (SELECT IFNULL(t_out.Date, '') FROM time_logs AS t_out WHERE t_out.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND DATE(t_out.Date) = idate AND t_out.Type = 'TIME OUT' AND t_out.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY t_out.Date DESC LIMIT 1) AS timeout FROM time_logs AS t_in WHERE t_in.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND DATE(t_in.Date) = idate AND t_in.Type = 'TIME IN' AND t_in.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY t_in.Date ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timeout_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATE, IN `istarthour` TIME)
BEGIN
SELECT Date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME OUT' AND DATE(Date) = idate AND TIME(Date) > istarthour AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timeout_employee_hty`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `itimein` DATETIME)
BEGIN
SELECT Date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME OUT' AND DATE > itimein AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date ASC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timeout_employee_hty_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT MIN(Date) AS min_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME OUT' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_timeout_employee_range`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `istarthour` TIME)
BEGIN
SELECT MAX(Date) AS max_date FROM time_logs WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Type = 'TIME OUT' AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto AND TIME(Date) > istarthour AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY DATE(Date) ORDER BY Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_title_req`(IN `ireqid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT 
	req_title.*, 
    titles.Unit,
    project.Project
FROM 
	req_title 
LEFT JOIN titles ON req_title.TitleID = titles.TitleID 
LEFT JOIN project ON req_title.ProjectID = project.ProjectID
WHERE 
	reqID = ireqid 
AND
	req_title.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_title_reqid`(IN `iproject` INT, IN `ititleid` INT, IN `icurrdate` DATETIME)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `req_title` WHERE ProjectID = iproject AND TitleID = ititleid AND dateReq = icurrdate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_for_release_qty`(IN `icode` INT, IN `requestid` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_supply_inventory_details.Qty), 0) FROM beg_supply_inventory_details WHERE beg_supply_inventory_details.ItemCode = icode AND beg_supply_inventory_details.Deleted = 0) as beginv,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0) as delQty,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = requestid) as releaseQTY,
 
(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.New_Qty), 0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0  AND supply_request_details.RequestID = requestid) as newQty,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty), 0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request_details.RequestID = requestid) as reqQty


FROM items  LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON items.ItemCode = for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode

WHERE items.ItemCode = icode AND items.Deleted = 0 AND for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = requestid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_material_requested_login`(IN `icode` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty),0) AS ReqQty, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= '2024-03-20') AS deliQty 

FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.ItemCode = icode AND mr.TradeHeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr.DateCreated >= '2024-03-20';

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_other_wisp_deduction_backoffice`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(deductions.Amount), 0) AS total_other_wisp FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND employees.Department <> 'Site Worker' AND employees.Department <> 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' AND employees.Department <> 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services' AND employees.Department <> 'HTY San Parking' AND employees.Department <> 'Executive Office' AND employees.Department <> 'Pasa Payroll') AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND deductions.Remarks LIKE '%WISP%' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_other_wisp_deduction_department`(in iclassification varchar(50), in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(deductions.Amount), 0) AS total_other_wisp FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = iclassification AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND deductions.Remarks LIKE '%WISP%' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_other_wisp_deduction_sales_casual`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(deductions.Amount), 0) AS total_other_wisp FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status <> 'Regular' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND deductions.Remarks LIKE '%WISP%' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_other_wisp_deduction_sales_regular`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(deductions.Amount), 0) AS total_other_wisp FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Sales Department' AND employees.Status = 'Regular' AND deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND deductions.Remarks LIKE '%WISP%' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_purchase`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNull(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) AS total_purchase FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_purchase_supplier`(in isuppliercode int, in iyear varchar(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po.HandlingFee), 0) AS total_handlingfee, IFNULL(SUM(po.InstallationFee), 0) AS total_installationfee, IFNULL(SUM(po.Discount), 0) AS total_discount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total), 0 ) FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND YEAR(po.Date)  = iyear AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po_details.Deleted = 0) AS total_amount FROM po WHERE po.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND YEAR(po.Date)  = iyear AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_rebate_sales`(IN `isalesid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(RebatePercentage), 0) AS totalrebatepercent FROM commsspecs WHERE SalesID = isalesid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_return`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(return_details.Qty), 0) AS total_return FROM return_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON return_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE return_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND return_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_spoilage`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNull(SUM(spoilage00.Qty), 0) AS total_spoilage FROM spoilage00 WHERE spoilage00.ItemCode = iitemcode AND spoilage00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_stock_supply`(IN `icode` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_supply_inventory_details.Qty), 0) FROM beg_supply_inventory_details WHERE beg_supply_inventory_details.ItemCode = icode AND beg_supply_inventory_details.Deleted = 0) as beginv,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0) as delQty,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 ) as releaseQTY,
 
(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.New_Qty), 0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) as newQty,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty), 0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) as reqQty
 
 
FROM items WHERE items.ItemCode = icode AND items.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_stock_supply_month`(IN `icode` INT, IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_supply_inventory_details.Qty), 0) FROM beg_supply_inventory_details WHERE beg_supply_inventory_details.ItemCode = icode AND beg_supply_inventory_details.Deleted = 0) as beginv,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = icode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND YEAR(dr_details.DateDelivered) <= iyear AND MONTH(dr_details.DateDelivered) <= imonth) as delQty,

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = icode AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 AND YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) <= iyear AND MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) <= imonth) as releaseQTY
 
FROM items WHERE items.ItemCode = icode AND items.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_transferfrom`(in iitemcode int, in iprojectid int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(transfer_stocks_details.Qty), 0) AS total_transferfrom FROM transfer_stocks_details WHERE transfer_stocks_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND transfer_stocks_details.TransferFrom = iprojectid AND transfer_stocks_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(transfer_stocks_details.Qty), 0) AS total_transferto FROM transfer_stocks_details WHERE transfer_stocks_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND transfer_stocks_details.TransferTo = iprojectid AND transfer_stocks_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_withdraw`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNull(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) AS total_withdraw FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode and release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_total_withdrawn_item`(in iitemcode int, in iprojectid int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) AS totalwithdrawn FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_undistributed_collection_salesid`(IN `isalesid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT collection00.* FROM collection00 LEFT JOIN collection_amort ON collection00.PaymentID = collection_amort.PaymentID AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0 WHERE collection00.SalesID = isalesid AND collection00.Deleted = 0 AND collection_amort.id IS NULL ORDER BY collection00.ORDate, collection00.ORNo ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unitID`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM unit_layout WHERE Available = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unitID_edit`(IN `oldunitid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM unit_layout WHERE Available = 1 OR UnitID = oldunitid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unit_client`(in iunitid int)
BEGIN
SELECT client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.MiddleName FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN sale00 ON unit_layout.UnitID = sale00.UnitID LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE unit_layout.id = iunitid AND sale00.Cancellation = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unit_details`(IN `iunitid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.ProjectID FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id WHERE UnitID = iunitid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unit_id_details`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.ProjectID FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id WHERE unit_layout.id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unit_percentage`(in iunitid int)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalchecklist, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_layout.id = iunitid AND checklist.Deleted = 0 AND checklist.Status = 'Completed' AND checklist.Approved = 'Approved') AS totalcompleted FROM checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON room_layout.UnitID = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_layout.id = iunitid AND checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_unit_request_approval_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM unit_request WHERE Approved = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_sick_leave`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Nature = 'Sick Leave' AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_sil`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Nature = 'Service Incentive Leave' AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_sil_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) as totalsil FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND Nature = 'Service Incentive Leave' AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved = 'Approved' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_sl_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) as totalsl FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND Nature = 'Sick Leave' AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved = 'Approved' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_spl`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Nature = 'Solo Parent Leave' AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' AND Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_vacation_leave`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) AS totalcount FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND (Nature = 'Vacation Leave' OR Nature = 'Emergency Leave') AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_used_vl_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Days), 0) as totalvl FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND (Nature = 'Vacation Leave' OR Nature = 'Emergency Leave') AND (PayrollRemarks = 'With Pay' OR PayrollRemarks = 'Offsetting') AND Approved = 'Approved' AND isLastYear = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_user_details`(IN `iuserid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.UserID = iuserid;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_verification_ot_count`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.* FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Checked = 'Completed' AND overtime.Verified = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_view_checklist_approval`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_checklist_monitoring.ScopePercentage, unit_category_monitoring.ScopePercentage AS categorypercentage, unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID

FROM checklist_status_monitoring 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND unit_checklist_monitoring.id =  iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_view_item_approval`(IN `itemiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_monitoring.ScopePercentage, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID, unit_category_monitoring.ScopePercentage AS categorypercentage, unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID 


FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring 


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID) AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id = itemiid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_withdrawal`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, login00.DigitalSignature, project.Project, qs_employee.FirstName AS qs_firstname, qs_employee.LastName AS qs_lastname, qs_login.DigitalSignature AS qs_signature, pm_employee.FirstName AS pm_firstname, pm_employee.LastName AS pm_lastname, pm_login.DigitalSignature AS pm_signature, vp_employee.FirstName AS vp_firstname, vp_employee.LastName AS vp_lastname, vp_login.DigitalSignature AS vp_signature FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 as qs_login ON `release`.QSID = qs_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS qs_employee ON qs_login.EmployeeNo = qs_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 as pm_login ON `release`.PMID = pm_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS pm_employee ON pm_login.EmployeeNo = pm_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS vp_login ON `release`.`VP_ApprovedBy` = vp_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS vp_employee ON vp_login.EmployeeNo = vp_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.`RequestNo` = irequestno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_withdrawal_count_ehs`()
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM `release` LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.PMApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.`VP_Approval` = 'Pending' AND `release`.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM `release` 
WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.PMApproved = 'Pending' AND `release`.`VP_Approval` = 'Pending' AND `release`.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_withdrawal_items_contractor_floor`(IN `icontractorcode` INT, IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty) as totalqty FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.ContractorCode = icontractorcode AND release_details.Floor = ifloor AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.ItemCode;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  FUNCTION `get_withdrawal_material`(iitemcode int, iprojectid int, idtfrom date, idtto date) RETURNS double
BEGIN
DECLARE withdrawn, iwithdraw double;
SET withdrawn = 0;

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) INTO iwithdraw FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 AND `release`.`DateDelivered` >= idtfrom AND `release`.`DateDelivered` <= idtto;

SET withdrawn = iwithdraw;
RETURN withdrawn;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_withdrawal_material_date`(`iitemcode` INT, `iprojectid` INT, `idtfrom` DATE, `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) AS iwithdraw FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND `release`.`ProjectID` = iprojectid AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 AND `release`.`DateDelivered` >= idtfrom AND `release`.`DateDelivered` <= idtto;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `get_withdrawal_request_floors`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT release_details.Floor FROM release_details WHERE release_details.RequestNo = irequestno AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.Floor ORDER BY release_details.Floor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `getpur_po_details`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.id, po_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Qty, po_details.Price, po_details.DiscountAmount, po_details.Total, po_details.ItemCode, po_details.MR_Remarks, (SELECT mr_details.Balance FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = po_details.MR AND mr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND mr_details.Floor = po_details.Floor AND mr_details.Remarks = po_details.MR_Remarks AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) as bal FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode  WHERE po_details.PO = '' AND po_details.MR = imr AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hlistpo_load`(IN `itype` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, type.Type AS Trade, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po.Type = itype;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hold_apv`(in iapvid int, in idatetime datetime, in iloginid int, in ireason varchar(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Hold = 1, HoldBy = iloginid, Hold_Date = idatetime, HoldReason = ireason WHERE id = iapvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hold_cv`(in icvid int, in ireason varchar(1000), in idatetime datetime, in iloginid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE cv SET Hold = 1, HoldBy = iloginid, Hold_Date = idatetime, HoldReason = ireason WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hold_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `ireason` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iuser` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET OnHold = 1, HoldReason = ireason, HoldDate = idatetime, HoldBy = iloginid WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, CONCAT('Hold By ', iuser, '\nReason : ', ireason));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hpo_cancel`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `rsn` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET Approved = 'Cancelled', DateApproved = approvedate, Reason = rsn, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE PO = itempo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hpo_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Pending' AND po.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date desc;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hpo_mr_balance`(IN `mrnum` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(Balance) as bal FROM mr_details WHERE MR = mrnum AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hpo_update`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(500), IN `happrovedate` DATETIME, IN `trans` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET  Approved = 'Approved', DateApproved = happrovedate, Transaction = trans
WHERE PO = itempo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, happrovedate, 'Approved By HVY');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, happrovedate, 'For RFP');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'For RFP' WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, happrovedate, 'P.O. Approved by HVY');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hpo_update_mrstatus`(IN `mrnum` VARCHAR(500), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500), IN `itransaction` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr
SET  Status = istatus, Transaction = itransaction WHERE MR = mrnum;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hrfp_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND ExecApproved = 'Pending' AND Type = 'Construction' AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hrfp_update`(IN `itemrfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.ExecApproved = 'Approved', rfp.HVYApprovedDate = approvedate, rfp.Process = 'Submit the original documents to accounting for processing.', mr.Transaction = 'For APV' WHERE rfp.RFP = itemrfp;

CALL mr_status(imr, approvedate, 'RFP Approved by HVY');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, 'RFP Approved By HVY');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, 'For APV');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, 'RFP Approved by HVY');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, 'Submit the original documents to accounting for processing.');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hrisLR_load`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT leave_request.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE leave_request.dtFrom >= idtfrom AND leave_request.dtTo <= idtto AND leave_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hris_delete`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN

UPDATE hris_transpo SET Deleted = 1 WHERE Deleted = 0 AND id = iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `hris_edit`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT hris_transpo.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(employees.FirstName, " ", employees.LastName) FROM employees WHERE FIND_IN_SET(employees.EmployeeNo, hris_transpo.EmployeeNo)) AS employee 

FROM hris_transpo 


WHERE hris_transpo.Deleted = 0 AND hris_transpo.id = iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `inactive_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(100), IN `idate` DATE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE employees SET Status = istatus, Active = 0 WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;

UPDATE login00 SET Deleted = 1 WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;

DELETE round_robin FROM round_robin LEFT JOIN login00 ON round_robin.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;

INSERT INTO employment_history (EmployeeNo, Status, Date, Attachment) VALUES (iemployeeno, istatus, idate, iattachment);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `incentive_tracking_documentation_collection`(IN `isaleid` INT, IN `idatetime` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO `incentive_track`(
    `saleid`, 
    `message`, 
    `datecreated`) 
VALUES (
    isaleid, 
    'Waiting for LCC Approval', 
    idatetime);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `incentive_tracking_pdf_remarks`(IN `imsg` VARCHAR(500), IN `icolumn` VARCHAR(500), IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
    -- Escape single quotes in imsg
    SET @escaped_msg = REPLACE(imsg, '\'', '\'\'');
    
    -- Concatenate the dynamic SQL
    SET @sql = CONCAT('UPDATE `incentive` SET `', icolumn, '` = \'', @escaped_msg, '\' WHERE `id` = ', iid);
    
    -- Prepare, execute, and deallocate the statement
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql;
    EXECUTE stmt;
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `incentive_tracking_remarks`(IN `isalesid` INT, IN `imessage` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
    -- Define a query with placeholders
    SET @sql = 'INSERT INTO incentive_track (saleid, message, datecreated) VALUES (?, ?, ?)';

    -- Prepare the statement
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql;

    -- Execute the statement with parameters
    EXECUTE stmt USING isalesid, imessage, idatetime;

    -- Deallocate the prepared statement
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

    `docu_completedate`,

    `collect_completedate`

    'Approved',

    isaledate,
    'Approved',
    idocu,
    idocudate,
    '1',
    idocu,
    idocudate,

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `item_delete`(IN item_code int)
BEGIN
UPDATE items SET deleted = 1 WHERE ItemCode = item_code;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `item_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM items WHERE Type = 'Material' AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Itemname ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `item_update`(IN `item_code` INT, IN `item_name` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ite_desc` VARCHAR(2000), IN `item_unit` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachement` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE items
SET  ItemName = item_name, Description = ite_desc, Unit = item_unit, Attachment = iattachement
WHERE ItemCode = item_code;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `list_approved_liquidation_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, rfp.Payee, rfp.Amount, rfp.DateCreated as DateRequested, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo;

SELECT * FROM liquidation WHERE ExecApproved = 'Approved';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_additional_material`(IN `icbid` INT, IN `icatid` INT, IN `isubcatid` INT, IN `iworkid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor_billing_adjusted.*, items.ItemName as ItemName, items.Description as Description, items.Unit as Unit 
FROM `contractor_billing_adjusted` 
LEFT JOIN items ON contractor_billing_adjusted.Material = items.ItemCode
WHERE contractor_billing_adjusted.CBID = icbid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.CatID = icatid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.SubCatID = isubcatid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.WorkID = iworkid AND contractor_billing_adjusted.MaterialID = 0 AND contractor_billing_adjusted.ItemType = 'Material' AND contractor_billing_adjusted.ActionType = 'Add' AND contractor_billing_adjusted.Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_additional_subcategory`(IN icbid INT, IN icatid INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `contractor_billing_adjusted` WHERE CBID = icbid AND CatID = icatid AND ItemType = 'Sub-Category' AND ActionType = 'Add' AND Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_additional_work`(IN `icbid` INT, IN `icatid` INT, IN `isubcatid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `contractor_billing_adjusted` WHERE CBID = icbid AND CatID = icatid AND SubCatID = isubcatid AND WorkID = 0 AND ItemType = 'Work' AND ActionType = 'Add' AND Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_additonal_categories`(IN icbid INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `contractor_billing_adjusted` WHERE CBID = icbid AND ItemType = 'Category' AND ActionType = 'Add' AND Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_adjusted_category`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `icbid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT 
    IFNULL(contractor_billing_adjusted.CatID, contractor_billing_details.id) AS id,
    IFNULL(contractor_billing_adjusted.Category, contractor_billing_details.Category) AS Category,
    IFNULL(contractor_billing_adjusted.Cat_Percent, contractor_billing_details.CategoryPercentage) AS CategoryPercentage
FROM contractor_billing_details
LEFT JOIN contractor_billing_adjusted ON contractor_billing_details.CBID = contractor_billing_adjusted.CBID AND contractor_billing_details.id = contractor_billing_adjusted.CatID
WHERE contractor_billing_details.CBID = icbid AND contractor_billing_details.LoginID = iloginid AND contractor_billing_details.Deleted = 0 ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_adjustments`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT adjustments.*, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName FROM adjustments LEFT JOIN employees ON adjustments.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE adjustments.dtFrom = idtfrom AND adjustments.dtTo = idtto AND adjustments.Deleted = 0;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100), IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname  FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_ot ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_ot.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login_ot.Department = idepartment AND login_ot.UserType <> iusertype AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname  FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Checked = 'Completed' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'EHS') OR (login_employee.Department = 'EHS' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_engineering`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname  FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Engineering Department' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.' OR login00.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND login00.UserType <> 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_hty`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname  FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'HTY Parking' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41)) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_jrm`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname, (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o2.Date) 
     FROM overtime o2 
     WHERE o2.UnitID = overtime.UnitID
        AND o2.Pre_PM_Approval <> 'Cancelled'
        AND o2.Pre_Approval <> 'Cancelled' 
        AND o2.PMApproval <> 'Cancelled' 
        AND o2.Approval <> 'Cancelled' 
        AND o2.Deleted = 0
    ) AS date_count, (SELECT o3.Target_Completion FROM overtime o3 WHERE o3.UnitID = overtime.UnitID AND o3.Target_Completion <> '1111-11-11' AND o3.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY o3.Target_Completion DESC LIMIT 1) AS target_date 
    FROM overtime 
    LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
    LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo 
    LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo AND login_employee.Deleted = 0
    LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
    WHERE ((employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.PMApproval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department <> 'EHS') OR (login_employee.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname FROM overtime LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'IT Department' OR login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department') AND login00.UserType = 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname  
FROM overtime 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_employee ON overtime.EmployeeNo = login_employee.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE login_employee.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.PMApproval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND  overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, requested_employee.FirstName AS requested_firstname, requested_employee.LastName AS requested_lastname 
FROM overtime 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees AS requested_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = requested_employee.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE (overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department' AND login00.UserType = 37 AND overtime.Deleted = 0) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0 AND (login00.Department = 'Executive Department' OR login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department'));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approval_overtime_site`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approve_apv`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.ManagerApproved = 'Pending' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND apv.Type = 'Standard' AND login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND apv.Hold = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_leave_request`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT leave_request.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE leave_request.PayrollRemarks <> 'Offsetting' AND leave_request.Approved = 'Approved' AND leave_request.ApprovedBy = iloginid AND leave_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_leave_request_all`()
BEGIN
SELECT leave_request.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE leave_request.PayrollRemarks <> 'Offsetting' AND leave_request.Approved = 'Approved' AND leave_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_leave_request_employee`(in iyear varchar(50), in iemployeeno varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM leave_request WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND YEAR(dtFrom) = iyear AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_leave_request_pm`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT leave_request.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE leave_request.PayrollRemarks <> 'Offsetting' AND leave_request.Approved1 = 'Approved' AND leave_request.ApprovedBy1 = iloginid AND leave_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_mr`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, contractor00.Contractor, type.Type, project.Project FROM mr LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE mr.LoginID = iloginid AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_mr_office`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM mr WHERE TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Class = 'Office' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_petty_cash`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, login00.fName, login00.lName, releaser.fName AS releaser_fname, releaser.lName AS releaser_lname FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 ON petty_cash.RequestBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN login00 AS releaser ON petty_cash.ReleaseBy = releaser.UserID WHERE petty_cash.Department = idepartment AND petty_cash.Approved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_withdrawal`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Delivered` = 0 AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_approved_withdrawal_user`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.LoginID = iloginid AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv`(IN `iproject` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv WHERE apv.ChargeTo = iproject AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_account_title_range`(IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100), IN `iaccount_title` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN 
SELECT apv.*, apv_debit.Amount AS account_amount FROM apv LEFT JOIN apv_debit ON apv.id = apv_debit.APVID WHERE DATE(apv.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(apv.DateCreated) <= idtto AND apv.ChargeTo = icompany AND apv.ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND apv_debit.AccountTitle = iaccount_title;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_aging_payee`(IN `isort` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.CV = 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND (rfp.Type = isort OR rfp.Type2 = isort) ORDER BY apv.DateCreated ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_check_prep_commission`()
BEGIN 
TRUNCATE TABLE apv_temp; 

SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.IssueCheck = 1 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type2 = 'Commission'; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_check_prep_construction`()
BEGIN
TRUNCATE TABLE apv_temp;

SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.IssueCheck = 1 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type = 'Construction';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_check_prep_office`()
BEGIN
TRUNCATE TABLE apv_temp;

SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.IssueCheck = 1 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_check_voucher`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE IssueCheck = 1 AND Balance > 0 AND Cancelled = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_credit`(IN iapvid int)
BEGIN SELECT * FROM apv_credit WHERE APVID = iapvid; END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_dates`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ExtractNumber(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', 1)) = iyear AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', -2), '-', 1) = imonth AND ChargeTo  = icompany AND ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_debit`(IN iapvid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv_debit WHERE APVID = iapvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_managerscheck_voucher`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.IssueCheck = 1 AND apv.Balance > 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND rfp.PaymentMode = 'MC' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_payee`()
BEGIN
SELECT Payee FROM apv GROUP BY Payee;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_payee_range`(IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100), in ipayee varchar(500), in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ChargeTo  = icompany AND Payee = ipayee AND DATE(DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(DateCreated) <= idtto AND ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_payees`()
BEGIN
SELECT Payee FROM apv GROUP BY Payee ORDER BY Payee ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_rfp`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*,
data_apv.APV AS APV
FROM `rfp`
LEFT JOIN apv AS data_apv ON data_apv.id = rfp.APVID
WHERE rfp.Cancelled = 0
	AND data_apv.id =iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_treasury`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT apv.* FROM apv LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.LoginID = iloginid AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Treasury Department';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_apv_yearly`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ExtractNumber(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', 1)) = iyear AND ChargeTo  = icompany AND ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_asset_history`(IN `iasset_tag` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT asset_history.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM asset_history LEFT JOIN login00 ON asset_history.User = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE AssetTag = iasset_tag ORDER BY DateTime ASC;
END$$

SELECT * FROM asset_model WHERE Deleted = 0;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_assign_drivers`()
BEGIN
SELECT CONCAT(employees.FirstName, ' ', employees.LastName) AS title, transportation_schedule.tDate as start, transportation_schedule.tDate as end FROM transportation_schedule LEFT JOIN login00 ON transportation_schedule.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_collection_amount`(IN `idepositdate` DATE, IN `icollectiondate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT attendant_collection.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM attendant_collection LEFT JOIN login00 ON attendant_collection.Attendant_LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE attendant_collection.DepositDate = idepositdate AND attendant_collection.CollectionDate = icollectiondate AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_collection_summary`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, IFNULL(SUM(parking_end_duty.TotalAmount), 0) AS Validation, (SELECT attendant_collection.CollectionAmount FROM attendant_collection WHERE attendant_collection.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_collection.Attendant_LoginID = parking_end_duty.LoginID AND attendant_collection.DepositDate <> '1111-11-11' AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0) AS AmountDeposit, (SELECT IFNULL(attendant_payment.Amount, 0) FROM attendant_payment WHERE attendant_payment.Attendant_LoginID = parking_end_duty.LoginID AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_payment.Deleted = 0) AS ShortPayment FROM parking_end_duty LEFT JOIN login00 ON parking_end_duty.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE parking_end_duty.Date = idate GROUP BY parking_end_duty.LoginID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_collection_summary_attendant`(in iloginid int, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, IFNULL(SUM(parking_end_duty.TotalAmount), 0) AS Validation, (SELECT attendant_collection.CollectionAmount FROM attendant_collection WHERE attendant_collection.Attendant_LoginID = iloginid AND attendant_collection.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_collection.DepositDate <> '1111-11-11' AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0) AS AmountDeposit, (SELECT IFNULL(attendant_payment.Amount, 0) FROM attendant_payment WHERE attendant_payment.Attendant_LoginID = iloginid AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_payment.Deleted = 0) AS ShortPayment FROM parking_end_duty LEFT JOIN login00 ON parking_end_duty.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE parking_end_duty.LoginID = iloginid AND parking_end_duty.Date = idate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_collection_summary_old`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.PaidAmount), 0) AS Validation, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(attendant_collection.CollectionAmount), 0) FROM attendant_collection WHERE attendant_collection.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_collection.Attendant_LoginID = ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID AND attendant_collection.DepositDate <> '1111-11-11' AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0) AS AmountDeposit, (SELECT IFNULL(attendant_payment.Amount, 0) FROM attendant_payment WHERE attendant_payment.Attendant_LoginID = ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate = idate AND attendant_payment.Deleted = 0) AS ShortPayment FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN login00 ON ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE ticket_entry.CollectionDate = idate AND ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_collection_summary_range`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.ParkingFee), 0) AS TotalParkingFee, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.PaidAmount), 0) AS Validation, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(attendant_collection.CollectionAmount), 0) FROM attendant_collection WHERE attendant_collection.CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND attendant_collection.CollectionDate <= idtto AND attendant_collection.Attendant_LoginID = ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID AND attendant_collection.DepositDate <> '1111-11-11' AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0) AS AmountDeposit, (SELECT IFNULL(attendant_payment.Amount, 0) FROM attendant_payment WHERE attendant_payment.Attendant_LoginID = ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate <= idtto AND attendant_payment.Deleted = 0) AS ShortPayment FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN login00 ON ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID WHERE parking_end_duty.Date >= idtfrom AND parking_end_duty.Date <= idtto AND ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendant_payment`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM attendant_payment WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_attendants`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID, login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName 
FROM ticket_entry 
LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo
WHERE ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 AND parking_end_duty.Date >= idtfrom AND parking_end_duty.Date <= idtto 
GROUP BY ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_audit_logs_range`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM audit WHERE DATE(date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(date) <= idtto ORDER BY date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_auditmaterials`(IN `dtfrom` DATE, IN `dtto` DATE, IN `icount` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, supp00.Supplier, supp00.ContactNo, supp00.ContactPer, po.PO, po.Date, po_details.Audited FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= dtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= dtto GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode, po.SupplierCode ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT icount;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_auditmaterialshistory`(IN `dtfrom` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, supp00.Supplier, supp00.ContactNo, supp00.ContactPer, po.PO, po.Date, po_details.Audited FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po_details.Viewed_LCC = 1 AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) < dtfrom GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode, po.SupplierCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_auditpo`(IN `dtfrom` DATE, IN `dtto` DATE, IN `icount` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM po WHERE Type <> 'Labor' AND Deleted = 0 AND RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(Date) >= dtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= dtto ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT icount;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_backtrack_po`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po.LoginID = iloginid AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po.Type = 'Material' AND Status2 = 'Backtrack';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM bankbook WHERE Company = icompany AND Bank = ibank AND Deleted = 0;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_batch`()
BEGIN
SELECT Batch FROM cv WHERE Batch <> '' AND Cancelled = 0 GROUP BY Batch ORDER BY Batch ASC;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_bdo_template`(IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.AccountNo, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName, employees.Department, employees.Status, payroll.NetPay FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

    NO SQL

SELECT beg_supply_inventory_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM beg_supply_inventory_details LEFT JOIN items ON beg_supply_inventory_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE beg_supply_inventory_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_billing_bak`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, type.Type AS Trade FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN type ON po.TypeID = type.TypeID WHERE po.LoginID = iloginid AND po.Type = 'Labor' AND po.Status2 = 'Backtrack' AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_bingo_winners`()
BEGIN
SELECT bingo_winners.*, xmas_party.Picture, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department FROM bingo_winners LEFT JOIN employees ON bingo_winners.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON bingo_winners.EmployeeNo = xmas_party.EmployeeNo WHERE bingo_winners.Status = 'Approved';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cancelled_apv`()

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cancelled_apv_dates`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ExtractNumber(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', 1)) = iyear AND SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', -2), '-', 1) = imonth AND ChargeTo  = icompany AND Cancelled = 1 AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE ExtractNumber(SUBSTRING_INDEX(APV, '-', 1)) = iyear AND ChargeTo  = icompany AND Cancelled = 1 AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY DateCreated ASC;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cancelled_cv`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Type = 'Regular' AND Cancelled = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cancelled_mr`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, contractor00.Contractor, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, qs_employees.FirstName AS qs_firstname, qs_employees.LastName AS qs_lastname, pm_employees.FirstName AS pm_firstname, pm_employees.LastName AS pm_lastname FROM mr LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS qs_login ON mr.CheckedID = qs_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS qs_employees ON qs_login.EmployeeNo = qs_employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS pm_login ON mr.ApprovedID = pm_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS pm_employees ON pm_login.EmployeeNo = pm_employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Cancelled' OR mr.Approved = 'Cancelled' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_canvass_mr`(IN `ipurchasing` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, contractor00.Contractor FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Purchasing = ipurchasing AND mr.Status = 'Open' AND mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
