DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cd_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT cd_memo.*, apv.Remarks AS particulars, apv.Payee, apv.ChargeTo AS chargeto
FROM cd_memo
LEFT JOIN apv ON cd_memo.APV = apv.APV 
WHERE YEAR(cd_memo.DateCreated) = iyear AND chargeto = icompany AND cd_memo.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY cd_memo.DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_change_order`(IN `userid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID

FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id

WHERE change_order.Deleted = 0 AND change_order.CreatedBy = userid;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_change_order_all`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname, login00.Department FROM change_order 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.CLientID 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id
LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo
WHERE change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_change_order_dev`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM change_order_dev WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_change_order_seibu`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT change_order_seibu.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID

FROM change_order_seibu LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order_seibu.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order_seibu.SalesID = sale00.id

WHERE change_order_seibu.Deleted = 0 AND change_order_seibu.CreatedBy = userid;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_check_apv`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Pending' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND apv.Type = 'Standard' AND login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND apv.Hold = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_check_hold_apv`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN login00 ON apv.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE apv.CheckedApproved = 'Pending' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0 AND apv.Type = 'Standard' AND login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' AND apv.Hold = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_check_voucher_report`(IN `ibank` VARCHAR(500), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Company = icompany AND Bank = ibank ORDER BY CheckNo ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_check_workers_overtime`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND overtime.Checked = 'Pending' AND overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.CreatedBy = iloginid AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_bytrade`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `itrade` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT checklist.id, checklist.Status, checklist_list.Checklist FROM checklist LEFT JOIN checklist_list ON checklist.ChecklistID = checklist_list.id WHERE checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND checklist.Trade = itrade AND checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_category`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM checklist_category WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_completed`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*,  unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus, unit_checklist_monitoring.ApprovalStatus

FROM checklist_status_monitoring


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus = "Completed"  AND unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_for_approval`(IN `unitiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*,  unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName

FROM checklist_status_monitoring


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID


LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND unit_checklist_monitoring.ApprovalStatus="Pending" AND checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistStatus = "Completed" AND unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unitiid AND unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_for_punchlisting`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*,  unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus

FROM checklist_status_monitoring


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo


WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND  unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus = "Punchlisting"  AND unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_history`(in iid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM checklist_remarks WHERE ChecklistID = iid ORDER BY DateCreated;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_list`()
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_list.*, checklist_subcategory.SubCategory AS SubCat, checklist_category.Category AS Cat FROM checklist_list LEFT JOIN checklist_subcategory ON checklist_list.SubCategory = checklist_subcategory.id LEFT JOIN checklist_category ON checklist_subcategory.Category = checklist_category.id WHERE checklist_list.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_not_yet_started`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*,  unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus

FROM checklist_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id



LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistStatus = "Not Yet Started" AND unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus = "Not Yet Started"  AND unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_ongoing`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT checklist_status_monitoring.*,  unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus

FROM checklist_status_monitoring


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistStatus = "On-Going" AND  unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus = "On-Going"  AND unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_monitoring.*, checklist_status_monitoring.Remarks, checklist_status_monitoring.Attachment FROM unit_checklist_monitoring LEFT JOIN checklist_status_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.id = checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID WHERE unit_checklist_monitoring.id= iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT checklist_category.id as CategoryID, checklist_category.Category, checklist_subcategory.id, checklist_subcategory.SubCategory, checklist_subcategory.Percentage FROM checklist_subcategory LEFT JOIN checklist_category ON checklist_subcategory.Category = checklist_category.id WHERE checklist_subcategory.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

    NO SQL
BEGIN

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_trade`(in iroomid int)
BEGIN
SELECT checklist.Trade, type.Type FROM checklist LEFT JOIN type ON checklist.Trade = type.TypeID WHERE checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY checklist.Trade;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_tradehead`(IN `ichecklistid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist_tradehead.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT punchlist_checklist_remarks.Remarks FROM punchlist_checklist_remarks WHERE punchlist_checklist_remarks.TradeHeadID = room_checklist_tradehead.id ORDER BY punchlist_checklist_remarks.DateTime DESC LIMIT 1) AS trade_remarks FROM room_checklist_tradehead LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID = ichecklistid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checklist_tradehead_login`(IN `ichecklistid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist_tradehead.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT punchlist_checklist_remarks.Remarks FROM punchlist_checklist_remarks WHERE punchlist_checklist_remarks.TradeHeadID = room_checklist_tradehead.id ORDER BY punchlist_checklist_remarks.DateTime DESC LIMIT 1) AS trade_remarks FROM room_checklist_tradehead LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID = ichecklistid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_checks_for_release`()
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*
FROM cv 
WHERE cv.ForRelease = 1 AND cv.Released = 0 AND cv.Cancelled = 0 AND cv.Type = 'Regular';
END$$

END$$

BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE punchlisting.Status = 'For Client Inspection';
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_client_table`(IN `clientiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT 
	sale00.*, 
    client_principal.LastName , 
    client_principal.FirstName, 
    client_principal.MiddleName

FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID  

WHERE 
	 sale00.ClientID = clientiid 
     AND sale00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_clientname`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.id, sale00.TurnOver_Attachment, sale00.Punchlist_Attachment FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN sale00 ON unit_layout.UnitID = sale00.UnitID LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE unit_layout.id = iid AND sale00.Cancellation = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_clients`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM client_principal WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_collection_amort`(IN `isalesid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM collection_amort WHERE SalesID = isalesid AND Status = 'Unpaid' AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_collection_month`(IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT collection00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName,
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal) AS Payment_Principal, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_TransferMisc) AS Payment_TransferMisc, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Vat) AS Payment_Vat, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_HotelFinishing) AS Payment_HotelFinishing

FROM collection00 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON collection00.SalesID = sale00.id 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
LEFT JOIN collection_amort ON collection00.PaymentID = collection_amort.PaymentID AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0


WHERE MONTH(collection00.ORDate) = imonth AND YEAR(collection00.ORDate) = iyear AND collection00.Deleted = 0 
GROUP BY collection00.ORNo
ORDER BY collection00.ORDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_collection_unit`(IN `iclientid` INT, IN `isalesid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT collection00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal) AS Payment_Principal, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_TransferMisc) AS Payment_TransferMisc, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Vat) AS Payment_Vat, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_HotelFinishing) AS Payment_HotelFinishing
FROM collection00 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON collection00.SalesID = sale00.id 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
LEFT JOIN collection_amort ON collection00.PaymentID = collection_amort.PaymentID AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0 
WHERE collection00.SalesID = isalesid AND collection00.Deleted = 0 
GROUP BY collection00.ORNo
ORDER BY collection00.ORDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_collection_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT collection00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal) AS Payment_Principal, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_TransferMisc) AS Payment_TransferMisc, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Vat) AS Payment_Vat, 
       SUM(collection_amort.Payment_HotelFinishing) AS Payment_HotelFinishing
FROM collection00 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON collection00.SalesID = sale00.id 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
LEFT JOIN collection_amort ON collection00.PaymentID = collection_amort.PaymentID AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0 
WHERE YEAR(collection00.ORDate) = iyear AND collection00.Deleted = 0 
GROUP BY collection00.ORNo
ORDER BY collection00.ORDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_collections_intable`(IN `isalesid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM collection00 WHERE SalesID = isalesid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_commsagent`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = "Sales Department" AND login00.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_commspecs_agent_all`()
BEGIN
SELECT EmployeeNo, FirstName, LastName FROM employees WHERE Department = 'Sales Department' 
UNION 
SELECT MPID, firstname, lastname FROM marketing_partner WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_commsspecs`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT sale00.* FROM sale00 WHERE sale00.id = iid AND sale00.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_commsspecs_table`(IN `iid` INT)
SELECT commsspecs.*, marketing_partner.firstname, marketing_partner.lastname, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.Position as ePosition, 
marketing_partner.Position as ePosition2 
FROM commsspecs 
LEFT JOIN employees ON commsspecs.AgentID = employees.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN marketing_partner ON commsspecs.AgentID = marketing_partner.MPID
WHERE commsspecs.SalesID = iid AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv_credit WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_dates`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE DATE(cv.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(cv.DateCreated) <= idtto AND cv.ChargeTo = icompany AND cv.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY cv.DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_dates_released`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE DATE(cv.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(cv.DateCreated) <= idtto AND cv.ChargeTo = icompany AND Released = 1 AND cv.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY cv.DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_debit`(IN icvid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv_debit WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_debittable`(IN `icvid` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv_debit WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_for_release`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Approved = 'Approved' AND ForRelease = 0 AND Cancelled = 0 AND Type = 'Regular';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_for_release_bank`(IN `icompany` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibank` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Approved = 'Approved' AND ForRelease = 0 AND Company = icompany AND Bank = ibank AND Cancelled = 0 AND Type = 'Regular';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_for_sign_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE cv.Approved = 'Approved' AND cv.ForRelease = 1 AND cv.ForSignLCC = 0 AND cv.Released = 0 AND cv.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_funding_abm`()
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Approved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND SubmitABM = 1 AND Funded = 0 AND Type = 'Regular';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_released_date`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Released = 1 AND Cancelled = 0 AND Type = 'Regular' AND ReleasedDate >= idtfrom AND ReleasedDate <= idtto ORDER BY ReleasedDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_cv_submission_abm`()
BEGIN 
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Approved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0 AND SendABM = 1 AND SubmitABM = 0 AND Type = 'Regular'; END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_debit_credit_month`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT cd_memo.*, apv.Remarks AS particulars, apv.Payee, apv.ChargeTo AS chargeto
FROM cd_memo
LEFT JOIN apv ON cd_memo.APV = apv.APV 
WHERE YEAR(cd_memo.DateCreated) = iyear AND MONTH(cd_memo.DateCreated) = imonth AND chargeto = icompany AND cd_memo.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY cd_memo.DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_deductions`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT deductions.*, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName FROM deductions LEFT JOIN employees ON deductions.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE deductions.dtFrom = idtfrom AND deductions.dtTo = idtto AND deductions.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delayed_punchlisting`(in idate date)
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.TradeHead <> 0 AND room_checklist.ForInspection = 0 AND DATEDIFF(idate, DATE(room_checklist.TradeHead_Assigned_Date)) >= 15 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivered_mr`(in imr varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) AS totaldelivered FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.MR = imr GROUP BY dr_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_checkout`(in iparkingcode varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE Parking_Code = iparkingcode AND TimeOUT = '1111-11-11 00:00:00' AND EndID = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_material`(in iitemcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT acknowledgement.* FROM acknowledgement LEFT JOIN dr_details ON acknowledgement.PO = dr_details.PO WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND acknowledgement.DR = dr_details.DR GROUP BY acknowledgement.ACode ORDER BY acknowledgement.ADate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_report_date`(in dtfrom date, in dtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.DR, dr_details.PO, dr_details.DateDelivered, dr_details.ItemCode, IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) as totalqty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, supp00.Supplier  FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE dr_details.DateDelivered >= dtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= dtto GROUP BY dr_details.DR, dr_details.ItemCode ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_report_item`(IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.DR, dr_details.PO, dr_details.DateDelivered, IFNULL(SUM(Qty), 0) AS totalqty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, supp00.Supplier FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= idtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= idtto GROUP BY dr_details.DR ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_report_supplier`(in isuppliercode int)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.DR, dr_details.PO, dr_details.DateDelivered, dr_details.ItemCode, IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) as totalqty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po.SupplierCode = isuppliercode GROUP BY dr_details.DR, dr_details.ItemCode ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule`()
BEGIN
SELECT schedule_delivery.*, supp00.Supplier, po.MR, contractor00.Contractor FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE schedule_delivery.Delivered = 0 AND schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_calendar`()
BEGIN
SELECT schedule_delivery.PO, MAX(schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate) AS DeliveryDate, schedule_delivery.Remarks, po.MR, type.Type, supp00.Supplier  FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND (po.Type = 'Material' OR po.Type = 'Others') GROUP BY schedule_delivery.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_calendar2`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.MR, MAX(schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate) AS DeliveryDate, mr.LoginID FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND mr.Class = 'Construction' GROUP BY schedule_delivery.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_calendar2_tradehead`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.MR, MAX(schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate) AS DeliveryDate, mr.LoginID FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND mr.LoginID = iloginid AND mr.Class = 'Construction' GROUP BY schedule_delivery.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_calendar_material`(in iitemcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.MR, MAX(schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate) AS DeliveryDate, mr.LoginID FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN po_details ON po.PO = po_details.PO WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND po_details.ItemCode = iitemcode GROUP BY schedule_delivery.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_calendar_tradehead_material`(IN `iloginid` INT, in iitemcode int)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.MR, MAX(schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate) AS DeliveryDate, mr.LoginID FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN po_details ON po.PO = po_details.PO WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND mr.LoginID = iloginid AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND po_details.ItemCode = iitemcode GROUP BY schedule_delivery.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_delivery_schedule_mr`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT schedule_delivery.* FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR WHERE schedule_delivery.Deleted = 0 AND po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND mr.MR = imr GROUP BY po.PO;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_department_leave_summary`()
BEGIN
SELECT Department FROM employees WHERE Department <> 'Site Worker' AND  Department <> 'Pasa Payroll' AND Department <> 'Executive Office' AND Active = 1 GROUP BY Department;
END$$

    NO SQL
BEGIN

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_done_room_unit_tradehead`(IN `iunitid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_layout.* FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Approved' AND room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_drivers_dropoff`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT drivers.Driver, transportation_schedule.DropoffTime FROM drivers LEFT JOIN transportation_schedule ON drivers.Driver = transportation_schedule.DriverPM WHERE transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.PMTrip = '1st Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY drivers.Driver;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_drivers_pickup`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT drivers.Driver, transportation_schedule.tTime FROM drivers LEFT JOIN transportation_schedule ON drivers.Driver = transportation_schedule.DriverAM WHERE transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.AMTrip = '1st Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY drivers.Driver;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_dtr_history`(IN `iuserid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT dtr_attandance.* FROM dtr_attandance LEFT JOIN login00 ON dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

WHERE dtr_attandance.UserID = iuserid AND dtr_attandance.Date >= idtfrom AND dtr_attandance.Date <= idtto AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_elements_views`(IN `idtfrom` DATETIME, IN `idtto` DATETIME, IN `iagent_position` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount, elements_views.AgentID FROM elements_views LEFT JOIN login00 ON elements_views.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE DATE(elements_views.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(elements_views.Date) <= idtto AND login00.Position2 = iagent_position GROUP BY elements_views.AgentID ORDER BY elements_views.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_elements_views_details`(IN `iagentid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT elements_views.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM elements_views LEFT JOIN login00 ON elements_views.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE elements_views.AgentID = iagentid AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_email_monitoring_SD`(in dtfrom date, in dtto date, in iloginid int)
BEGIN 
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, IFNUll(SUM(sent_emails.EmailCount), 0) as totalemailcount, sent_emails.eDate FROM sent_emails LEFT JOIN login00 ON sent_emails.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = 'Sales Department' AND login00.Position = 'Agent' AND login00.SD = iloginid AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) >= dtfrom AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) <= dtto GROUP BY sent_emails.LoginID, DATE(sent_emails.eDate) ORDER BY sent_emails.eDate; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_email_monitoring_admin`(in dtfrom date, in dtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, IFNUll(SUM(sent_emails.EmailCount), 0) as totalemailcount, sent_emails.eDate FROM sent_emails LEFT JOIN login00 ON sent_emails.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = 'Sales Department' AND login00.Position = 'Agent' AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) >= dtfrom AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) <= dtto GROUP BY sent_emails.LoginID, DATE(sent_emails.eDate) ORDER BY sent_emails.eDate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_email_monitoring_salem`(IN `dtfrom` DATE, IN `dtto` DATE, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN 
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, IFNUll(SUM(sent_emails.EmailCount), 0) as totalemailcount, sent_emails.eDate FROM sent_emails LEFT JOIN login00 ON sent_emails.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = 'Sales Department' AND login00.Position = 'Agent' AND login00.SSD = iloginid AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) >= dtfrom AND DATE(sent_emails.eDate) <= dtto GROUP BY sent_emails.LoginID, DATE(sent_emails.eDate) ORDER BY sent_emails.eDate; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_ca_adjustment_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, payroll.CompanyLoanAdjustment FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.CompanyLoanAdjustment > 0 AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.Classification = iclassification AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_ca_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, payroll.CompanyLoan FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.CompanyLoan > 0 AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.Classification = iclassification AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_department`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department = idepartment AND Active = 1 ORDER BY LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_individual`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Active = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_no_agent`(IN `istatus` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department <> 'Sales Department' AND Active = istatus;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_other_loan_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, payroll.Others, loans.Remarks FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN loans ON payroll.Others_LoanID = loans.LoanID WHERE payroll.Others > 0 AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.Classification = iclassification AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_penalty_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, payroll.Penalty FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.Penalty > 0 AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.Classification = iclassification AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_employees_report`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department <> 'Site Worker' AND Department <> 'Pasa Payroll' AND Active = 1 ORDER BY LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_end_duty_date`(in idate date, in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.* FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID WHERE parking_end_duty.Date = idate AND parking_end_duty.LoginID = iloginid;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_events_date`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT events.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM events LEFT JOIN login00 ON events.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE events.Date <= idate AND events.End_Date >= idate AND events.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_events_sd`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM events WHERE (CreatedBy = iloginid OR CreatedBy = 76) AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_exitrequest`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT exit_request.*, subcontractors.LastName, subcontractors.FirstName, subcontractors.MiddleName, contractor00.Contractor FROM exit_request LEFT JOIN subcontractors ON exit_request.SubContractorID = subcontractors.id LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON subcontractors.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE exit_request.RequestBy = iloginid AND exit_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_exitrequest_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT exit_request.*, subcontractors.LastName, subcontractors.FirstName, subcontractors.MiddleName, login00.fName, login00.lName, contractor00.Contractor FROM exit_request LEFT JOIN subcontractors ON exit_request.SubContractorID = subcontractors.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON exit_request.RequestBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON subcontractors.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE exit_request.Approval = 'Pending' AND exit_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_files`(in idirectoryid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM docs_file WHERE DirectoryID = idirectoryid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_first_trip_dropoff`(IN `idriver` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT transportation_schedule.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM transportation_schedule LEFT JOIN login00 ON transportation_schedule.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE transportation_schedule.DriverPM = idriver AND transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.PMTrip = '1st Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY transportation_schedule.SequenceDropoff ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_first_trip_pickup`(IN `idriver` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT transportation_schedule.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM transportation_schedule LEFT JOIN login00 ON transportation_schedule.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE transportation_schedule.DriverAM = idriver AND transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.AMTrip = '1st Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY transportation_schedule.Sequence ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floor_checklist_approval`(IN `projectiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT floor_layout.*, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(unit_checklist_monitoring.id), 0) FROM unit_checklist_monitoring LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id AND unit_layout.id = unit_category_monitoring.UnitID AND unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id AND unit_checklist_monitoring.CheckStatus = "Completed" AND unit_checklist_monitoring.ApprovalStatus = "Pending" AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0) AS countApproval FROM floor_layout WHERE floor_layout.ProjectID = projectiid AND floor_layout.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floor_item_approval`(IN `iprojectid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT floor_layout.*

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 

LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID) AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ApprovalStatus="Pending" AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "Completed" AND project.ProjectID = iprojectid GROUP BY floor_layout.Floor;



END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floor_layout`(IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN 
SELECT floor_layout.*, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM unit_layout WHERE FloorID = floor_layout.Id AND unit_layout.Priority = 1 AND unit_layout.Deleted = 0) AS PriorityCount FROM floor_layout WHERE floor_layout.ProjectID = iprojectid ORDER BY floor_layout.OrderBy DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floor_unitrequest`(IN `iunitid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(Request, "") AS Req, IFNULL(Attachment, "") AS Attach FROM unit_request WHERE Unit = iunitid AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floor_units`(IN `ifloorid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM unit_layout WHERE FloorID = ifloorid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floorreq`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM floor_layout WHERE ProjectID = iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floors`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT floor_layout.*, project.Project FROM floor_layout LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE floor_layout.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_floors_withpo`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.Floor FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.Floor <> '' AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.Floor ORDER BY po_details.Floor ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_cleaning_punchlisting`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE punchlisting.Status = 'For Cleaning';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_inspection_room_unit`(IN `iunitid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_inspection_room_unit_tradehead`(IN `iunitid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_layout.* FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_process_tripticket_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM trip_ticket WHERE Approval = 'Approved' AND ProcessBy = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_rectification_room_unit`(IN `iunitid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_rectification_room_unit_tradehead`(IN `iunitid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_layout.* FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = 0 GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_release_petty_cash_backoffice`()
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 ON petty_cash.RequestBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE petty_cash.Approved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.Released = 0 AND petty_cash.Deleted = 0 AND petty_cash.Department <> 'Site Support' AND petty_cash.Department <> 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_release_petty_cash_site`()
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 ON petty_cash.RequestBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE petty_cash.Approved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND petty_cash.Released = 0 AND petty_cash.Deleted = 0 AND (petty_cash.Department = 'Site Support' OR petty_cash.Department = 'EHS');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_for_release_supply`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request.*, employees.FirstName AS prep_fname, employees.LastName AS prep_lname FROM supply_request 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS prepared ON supply_request.RequestedBy = prepared.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON prepared.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE supply_request.HeadApproval = 'Approved' AND supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty),0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request.RequestID = supply_request_details.RequestID AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) <> (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty),0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0);


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_gfl_validated_ticket_month`(IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN login00 ON ticket_entry.ValidatedBy =  login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE MONTH(ticket_entry.CollectionDate) = imonth AND YEAR(ticket_entry.CollectionDate) = iyear AND ticket_entry.ValidationPromo = 'Free' AND ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY ticket_entry.CollectionDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_health_report`(IN `ifirst` DATE, IN `ilast` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT health.*, login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department, login00.Address, login00.ContactNo, login00.Emergency FROM health LEFT JOIN login00 ON health.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE DATE(health.DateSubmitted) >= ifirst AND DATE(health.DateSubmitted) <= ilast;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_health_report_site`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT health.*, login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department, login00.Address, login00.ContactNo, login00.Emergency FROM health LEFT JOIN login00 ON health.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND DATE(health.DateSubmitted) = idate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_hold_cv`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE cv.Hold = 1 AND cv.HoldBy = iloginid AND cv.Cancelled = 0 AND cv.Override_Check = 0 ORDER BY cv.CheckDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
SELECT official_business.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM official_business LEFT JOIN employees ON official_business.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE official_business.Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND official_business.Deleted = 0 AND official_business.Date >= idtfrom AND official_business.Date <= idtto;
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_hris_transpo`()
BEGIN

SELECT hris_transpo.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(" ", employees.FirstName, " ", employees.LastName) FROM employees WHERE FIND_IN_SET(employees.EmployeeNo, hris_transpo.EmployeeNo)) AS employee 

FROM hris_transpo 




WHERE hris_transpo.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

FROM support_tickets
WHERE 
  Status = 'For Approval' AND HvyApprove = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_inputdelivery`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open';
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_inputdelivery_supplyrequest`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Class = "Office" AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open'; 

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_intable_category`(IN `unitiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT unit_category_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_category.Category FROM unit_category_monitoring LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id WHERE unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0 AND unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unitiid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_intable_check_item`(IN `checklistiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_item_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item FROM unit_checklist_item_monitoring 


LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id


WHERE unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = checklistiid AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_intable_checklist`(IN `categoryiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN



SELECT unit_checklist_monitoring.*, unit_checklist.Checklist FROM unit_checklist_monitoring LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id WHERE unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = categoryiid AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_it_pending_support_ticket`()
SELECT * FROM support_tickets WHERE IT_userid = 0 AND Status = 'Actionable' AND Deleted = 0$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_it_support_ticket_chat`(IN `iticketid` INT, IN `ireceipient` INT, IN `ichat_from` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT 
    support_tickets_chat.*, support_tickets.CreatedBy AS createdby,
support_tickets.Concern AS concern,
    data_sender_employees.FirstName as sen_fname,
    data_sender_employees.LastName as sen_lname,
    data_receiver_employees.FirstName as rec_fname,
    data_receiver_employees.LastName as rec_lname

FROM support_tickets_chat

LEFT JOIN support_tickets ON support_tickets.TicketID = support_tickets_chat.TicketID 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS data_sender_login00 ON data_sender_login00.UserID = support_tickets_chat.Sender
LEFT JOIN employees AS data_sender_employees ON data_sender_employees.EmployeeNo = data_sender_login00.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN login00 AS data_receiver_login00 ON data_receiver_login00.UserID = support_tickets_chat.Receiver
LEFT JOIN employees AS data_receiver_employees ON data_receiver_employees.EmployeeNo = data_receiver_login00.EmployeeNo

WHERE 
support_tickets_chat.TicketID = iticketid 
ORDER BY support_tickets_chat.SentDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_it_support_ticket_filter`()
SELECT * FROM support_tickets WHERE Status = 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_completed`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ApprovalStatus

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0  AND  unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "Completed";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_for_approval`(IN `unitiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, login00.fName, login00.lName

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID) AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ApprovalStatus="Pending" AND checklist_item_status_monitoring.CheckItemStatus = "Completed" AND unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unitiid AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0;




END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_for_punchlisting`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0  AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "Punchlisting";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_not_yet_started`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0  AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "Not Yet Started" AND checklist_item_status_monitoring.CheckItemStatus = "Not Yet Started" ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_ongoing`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0  AND  checklist_item_status_monitoring.CheckItemStatus = "On-Going" AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "On-Going" ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_status`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_item_monitoring.*, checklist_item_status_monitoring.Remarks, checklist_item_status_monitoring.Attachment FROM unit_checklist_item_monitoring LEFT JOIN checklist_item_status_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id = checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID WHERE unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id= iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_item_testingcomission`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT checklist_item_status_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist.Checklist, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus

FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.LoginID = login00.UserID

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID)  AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0  AND checklist_item_status_monitoring.CheckItemStatus = "Testing And Comissioning" AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ItemStatus = "Testing And Comissioning";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_items_inventory`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM items WHERE Type = 'Material' AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY items.ItemName ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_jv_month`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT journal_voucher.*, apv.Remarks AS particulars, apv.Payee FROM journal_voucher LEFT JOIN apv ON journal_voucher.APV = apv.APV AND journal_voucher.ChargeTo = apv.ChargeTo WHERE YEAR(journal_voucher.PostingDate) = iyear AND MONTH(journal_voucher.PostingDate) = imonth AND journal_voucher.ChargeTo = icompany AND journal_voucher.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY journal_voucher.PostingDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_jv_year`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT journal_voucher.*, apv.Remarks AS particulars, apv.Payee FROM journal_voucher LEFT JOIN apv ON journal_voucher.APV = apv.APV AND journal_voucher.ChargeTo = apv.ChargeTo WHERE YEAR(journal_voucher.PostingDate) = iyear AND journal_voucher.ChargeTo = icompany AND journal_voucher.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY journal_voucher.PostingDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_liquidation`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, cv.ReleaseAttachment, DATEDIFF(idate, rfp.Liquidation_StartDate) AS pendingdays FROM rfp LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id LEFT JOIN cv ON apv.CV = cv.CVID WHERE (rfp.LoginID = iloginid OR rfp.CareOf = iloginid) AND rfp.Reimbursement = 0 AND rfp.CompleteRequirements = 0 AND rfp.ForLiquidation = 1 AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 AND rfp.Released = 1 AND (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM liquidation WHERE liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP AND liquidation.Process <> 'Cancelled') = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_liquidation_credit`(in iliquidation varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation_credit WHERE Liquidation = iliquidation AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation_petty_cash_details WHERE LQD = ilqd AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_list_billing`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.* FROM rfp LEFT JOIN po ON rfp.PO = po.PO WHERE po.Type = 'Labor' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY rfp.DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT liquidation_petty_cash.*, petty_cash.Amount, petty_cash.Particulars FROM liquidation_petty_cash LEFT JOIN petty_cash ON liquidation_petty_cash.PCR = petty_cash.PCR WHERE liquidation_petty_cash.LoginID = iloginid AND liquidation_petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_list_rfp_liquidation`()
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, rfp.Amount, rfp.HandlingFee, rfp.InstallationFee, rfp.Payee, apv.APV FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id WHERE liquidation.Process <> 'Cancelled';
END$$
DELIMITER ;
