DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_material`(IN `iworkid` INT)
BEGIN 
SELECT `contractor_billing_materials`.*, items.ItemName as ItemName, items.Description as Description , items.Unit as Unit FROM `contractor_billing_materials` LEFT JOIN items ON `contractor_billing_materials`.`Material` = items.ItemCode WHERE `contractor_billing_materials`.WorkID = iworkid AND `contractor_billing_materials`.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_material_used`(IN `iworkid` INT, IN `idate` DATETIME)
BEGIN
SELECT `material_progress`.*, items.ItemName as ItemName, items.Description as Description, items.Unit as Unit, contractor_billing_materials.Quantity as Quantity
FROM `material_progress`
LEFT JOIN items ON `material_progress`.Material = items.ItemCode
LEFT JOIN contractor_billing_materials  ON  `material_progress`.MaterialID = contractor_billing_materials.id
WHERE `material_progress`.WorkID = iworkid AND `material_progress`.Date = idate AND `material_progress`.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_memo_credittable`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `cd_memo_debit-credit` WHERE APV = iapv AND Type ='Credit' AND Deleted = '0' ORDER BY `cd_memo_debit-credit`.`cd_memo_id` DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_memo_debittable`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `cd_memo_debit-credit` WHERE APV = iapv AND Type ='Debit' AND Deleted = '0' ORDER BY `cd_memo_debit-credit`.`cd_memo_id` DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_monitoring_ticketentry`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND CollectionDate <= idtto AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_monthly_apv`(IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM apv WHERE DATE_FORMAT(DateCreated, "%Y-%m") = imonth AND ChargeTo = icompany AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM po WHERE po.MR = mr.MR AND po.PurchasingHead_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND po.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND po.Approved <> 'Cancelled' AND po.Deleted = 0) AS pocount, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO WHERE dr_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.MR = mr.MR) AS totaldelivered FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.LoginID = iloginid AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_balance_trade`(IN `itrade` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, (SELECT IFNULL(po_details.Price, 0) FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.ItemCode = mr_details.ItemCode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.PO ORDER BY po.Date DESC LIMIT 1) AS unitprice, IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty), 0) AS totalmrqty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = mr_details.ItemCode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`LoginID` = itrade AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved') AS totalwithdrawalqty, (SELECT mr.DateCreated FROM mr LEFT JOIN mr_details ON mr.MR = mr_details.MR WHERE mr.LoginID = itrade AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastmrdate FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr.LoginID = itrade AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY mr_details.ItemCode ORDER BY items.ItemName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_balance_trade_date`(IN `itrade` INT, in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, (SELECT IFNULL(po_details.Price, 0) FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.ItemCode = mr_details.ItemCode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.PO ORDER BY po.Date DESC LIMIT 1) AS unitprice, IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty), 0) AS totalmrqty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) FROM release_details LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = mr_details.ItemCode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`LoginID` = itrade AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND DATE(`release`.`DateDelivered`) >= idtfrom AND DATE(`release`.`DateDelivered`) <= idtto) AS totalwithdrawalqty, (SELECT mr.DateCreated FROM mr LEFT JOIN mr_details ON mr.MR = mr_details.MR WHERE mr.LoginID = itrade AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) <= idtto ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastmrdate FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr.LoginID = itrade AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) <= idtto GROUP BY mr_details.ItemCode ORDER BY items.ItemName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_cm_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, login00.Department 
FROM mr 
LEFT JOIN type on mr.TypeID = type.TypeID 
LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE (mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approval1 = 'Pending' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'Site Support') OR (mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'EHS');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_contractor`(IN `icontractorcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, project.Project, type.Type FROM mr LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.ContractorCode = icontractorcode ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_details`(IN `imrnum` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imrnum AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_details_excel`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, mr_details.Qty, mr_details.Remarks FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_details_floor`(in imr varchar(50), in ifloor varchar(100))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Floor = ifloor AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_details_items`(IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, supply_replenishment.Max 

FROM mr_details 

LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 

LEFT JOIN supply_replenishment ON mr_details.ItemCode = supply_replenishment.ItemCode  

WHERE mr_details.LoginID = iloginid AND mr_details.MR = "" AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_details_report`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request_details.*, eprepared.FirstName AS prep_fname, eprepared.LastName AS prep_lname, eprocess.FirstName pro_fname, eprocess.LastName AS pro_lname , mr.DateCreated as mrDate, mr.MR, supply_request.DateRequested
FROM supply_request 

LEFT JOIN supply_request_details ON supply_request.RequestID = supply_request_details.RequestID

LEFT JOIN mr ON supply_request.MR = mr.MR 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS prepared ON mr.LoginID = prepared.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS eprepared ON prepared.EmployeeNo = eprepared.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS process ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = process.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS eprocess ON process.EmployeeNo = eprocess.EmployeeNo 


WHERE supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.MR = imr;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_material`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, purchasing_employee.FirstName AS purchasing_fname, purchasing_employee.LastName AS purchasing_lname FROM mr LEFT JOIN mr_details ON mr.MR = mr_details.MR LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS purchasing_login ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = purchasing_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS purchasing_employee ON purchasing_login.EmployeeNo = purchasing_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE mr_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY mr.MR ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_month`(IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, project.Project, type.Type, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE YEAR(mr.DateCreated) = iyear AND MONTH(mr.DateCreated) = imonth AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Class = itype AND mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Qty), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = mr.MR AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) AS totalqty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = mr.MR AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) AS totalbalance, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.LoginID = iloginid AND mr.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_approval_head`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Department = idepartment AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_approval_head_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName 
FROM mr 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE login00.Department = 'EHS' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_approval_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office') OR (mr.LoginID = 263 AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_approval_lcc`()
BEGIN 
SELECT mr.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'IT Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'Sales Department') AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_approval_rlt`()
BEGIN 
SELECT mr.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND mr.LoginID <> 263 AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Office';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_office_details`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, items.WInv FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_project_trade_floor_date`(in iproject int, in itrade int, in ifloor varchar(100), in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, project.Project, type.Type, contractor00.Contractor FROM mr LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode - contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE mr.ProjectID = iproject AND mr.TypeID = itrade AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) >= idtfrom AND DATE(mr.DateCreated) <= idtto AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = mr.MR AND mr_details.Floor = ifloor AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) > 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_qs_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, login00.Department 
FROM mr 
LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID 
LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_report`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request.*, eprepared.FirstName AS prep_fname, eprepared.LastName AS prep_lname, eprocess.FirstName pro_fname, eprocess.LastName AS pro_lname , mr.DateCreated

FROM supply_request 

LEFT JOIN mr ON supply_request.MR = mr.MR 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS prepared ON mr.LoginID = prepared.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS eprepared ON prepared.EmployeeNo = eprepared.EmployeeNo 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS process ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = process.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS eprocess ON process.EmployeeNo = eprocess.EmployeeNo 

WHERE supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.MR <> "" GROUP BY supply_request.MR AND mr.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_reprint`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request.*, proEm.FirstName as prosFname, proEm.LastName as prosLname, reqEm.FirstName as reqFname, reqEm.LastName as reqLname, mr.DateCreated AS MRCreated FROM supply_request LEFT JOIN mr ON supply_request.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN login00 AS proLog ON mr.LoginID = proLog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS proEm ON proLog.EmployeeNo = proEm.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS reqLog ON supply_request.RequestedBy = reqLog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS reqEm ON reqLog.EmployeeNo = reqEm.EmployeeNo WHERE supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.MR <> "" GROUP BY supply_request.MR LIMIT 1;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_requests_report_print`(IN `ireqid` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit

FROM supply_request_details 

LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode

WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = ireqid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_mr_requests_report_print_department`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, SUM(Request_Qty) as totalrequest

FROM supply_request_details 


LEFT JOIN supply_request ON supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID 


LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request_details.LoginID = login00.UserID 

LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 

WHERE supply_request.MR = imr AND login00.Department = idepartment AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0  

GROUP BY supply_request_details.ItemCode;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_new_punchlisting`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.Status <> 'Pending' AND room_checklist.Status <> 'No Issue' AND room_checklist.TradeHead = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_no_plateno`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE PlateNumber = '' AND TimeOUT = '1111-11-11 00:00:00' AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Parking_Code ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_no_response`(IN `ifirst` DATE, IN `ilast` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department FROM login00 WHERE login00.Deleted = 0 AND login00.UserID <> 1 AND login00.UserID NOT IN (SELECT health.LoginID FROM health WHERE DATE(health.DateSubmitted) >= ifirst AND DATE(health.DateSubmitted) <= ilast) ORDER  BY login00.Department;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_no_response_site`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department FROM login00 WHERE login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND login00.Deleted = 0 AND login00.UserID <> 1 AND login00.UserID NOT IN (SELECT health.LoginID FROM health WHERE DATE(health.DateSubmitted) = idate) ORDER  BY login00.Department;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_no_ticket_number`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE TicketNumber = '' AND Parking_Code <> '' AND Attendant_LoginID = iloginid AND ParkingFee > 0 AND EndID = 0 AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY TimeOUT ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_notifications`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM notification WHERE LoginID = iloginid ORDER BY id DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_notmoving_delivered`(IN `iprojectid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT dr_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, dr_details.DateDelivered FROM dr_details LEFT JOIN po ON dr_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON dr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po.ProjectID = iprojectid AND dr_details.DateDelivered >= idtfrom AND dr_details.DateDelivered <= idtto AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY dr_details.ItemCode ORDER BY dr_details.DateDelivered DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

SELECT * FROM official_business WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

WHERE official_business.Approved = 'Pending' AND official_business.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND official_business.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND official_business.Department <> 'IT Department' AND official_business.Status = 'For Approval of RLT' AND official_business.Deleted = 0; 
END$$

LEFT JOIN employees ON official_business.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON official_business.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo AND login00.Deleted = 0

OR official_business.Department = 'Pablo Villeta Manpower Services') AND official_business.EmployeeNo <> iemployeeno AND official_business.Deleted = 0;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ob_summary`(in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT official_business.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM official_business LEFT JOIN employees ON official_business.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE official_business.Date >= idtfrom AND official_business.Date <= idtto AND official_business.Approved = 'Approved' AND official_business.Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_office_mr_edit`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(supply_replenishment.Max, 0) as Max FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supply_replenishment ON items.ItemCode = supply_replenishment.ItemCode AND supply_replenishment.Deleted = 0 WHERE  mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.MR = imr;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_office_supplies`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM items WHERE Type = 'Office Supplies' AND WInv = 1 AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY ItemName ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_office_supply_released_dept`(IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request.Department FROM for_release_supply_request LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID WHERE YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = iyear AND MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = imonth AND for_release_supply_request.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY supply_request.Department;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_office_supply_released_item`(in iyear varchar(50), in imonth varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = for_release_supply_request.RequestID WHERE YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = iyear AND MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = imonth AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_oh_summary_report_all`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT openhouse.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM openhouse LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE openhouse.Date = idate ORDER BY openhouse.Time ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT openhouse.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM openhouse LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE openhouse.Date = idate AND openhouse.Status = istatus ORDER BY openhouse.Time ASC;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_old_mr_details`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT old_mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM old_mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON old_mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE old_mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND old_mr_details.MR = imr ORDER BY old_mr_details.Floor, items.ItemName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ongoing_for_rectification_room_unit`(IN `iunitid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.Confirmed = 1 AND room_checklist.ForInspection = 0 AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ongoing_for_rectification_room_unit_tradehead`(IN `iunitid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_layout.* FROM room_layout LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode <> 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 0 GROUP BY room_layout.RoomName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ongoing_punchlisting`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN room_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = room_layout.UnitID LEFT JOIN room_checklist ON room_layout.id = room_checklist.RoomID WHERE room_checklist.TradeHead <> 0 AND room_checklist.Confirmed = 1 AND room_checklist.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY punchlisting.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_open_material_po`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total), 0) FROM po_details WHERE po_details.PO = po.PO AND po_details.Deleted = 0) AS totalamount FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po.Type = 'Material' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Status2 = 'New' AND po.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_openhouse`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT openhouse.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM openhouse LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE openhouse.Date = idate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_openhouse_agent`(IN `idate` DATE, in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT openhouse.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM openhouse LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE openhouse.Date = idate AND openhouse.AgentID = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_openhouse_views`(IN `idtfrom` DATETIME, IN `idtto` DATETIME, IN `iagent_position` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT login00.fName, login00.lName, IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount, openhouse_views.AgentID FROM openhouse_views LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse_views.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE DATE(openhouse_views.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(openhouse_views.Date) <= idtto AND login00.Position2 = iagent_position GROUP BY openhouse_views.AgentID ORDER BY openhouse_views.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_openhouse_views_details`(IN `iagentid` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT openhouse_views.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM openhouse_views LEFT JOIN login00 ON openhouse_views.AgentID = login00.UserID WHERE openhouse_views.AgentID = iagentid AND DATE(Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= idtto ORDER BY Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_other_po`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po.PO AND rfp.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfpcount FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po.LoginID = iloginid AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po.Type = 'Others' AND po.MR = '' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_otherpo_summary_supplier`(IN `isuppliercode` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, po_details.PO, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.DiscountAmount), 0) AS totaldiscount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.PO = po_details.PO AND dr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode) AS deliveredqty FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Others' AND po_details.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_overtime`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll' AND overtime.CreatedBy = iloginid AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_overtime_request`(in iemployeeno varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_paid_collection_amort`(IN `isalesid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT collection_amort.Date, collection_amort.Particulars, collection_amort.Payment_Principal AS total_principal, collection_amort.Payment_TransferMisc AS total_transfer, collection_amort.Payment_Vat AS total_vat, collection_amort.Payment_Total AS total_payment, collection_amort.PaymentID, collection00.ORNo, collection00.ORDate

FROM collection_amort 
LEFT JOIN collection00 ON collection_amort.PaymentID = collection00.PaymentID 

WHERE collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.SalesID = isalesid AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY collection_amort.Date ASC, collection00.ORDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_parking_attendant`()
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Department = 'HTY Parking' AND login00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_parking_collection_summary_range`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName 
FROM ticket_entry 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON ticket_entry.Attendant_LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID 
WHERE ticket_entry.ValidationPromo <> 'Free' AND parking_end_duty.Date >= idtfrom AND parking_end_duty.Date <= idtto AND ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 
ORDER BY ticket_entry.TicketNumber ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_parking_daily_collection_calendar`()
BEGIN
SELECT parking_end_duty.Date, IFNULL(SUM(parking_end_duty.TotalAmount), 0) AS totalcollection, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(parking_deposit.Amount), 0) FROM parking_deposit WHERE parking_deposit.CollectionDate = parking_end_duty.Date AND parking_deposit.Deleted = 0) AS totaldeposit FROM parking_end_duty GROUP BY parking_end_duty.Date;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_parking_deposit`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM parking_deposit WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_parking_weekly_report`(in dtdate date)
BEGIN
SELECT (SELECT TicketNumber FROM ticket_entry WHERE CollectionDate = dtdate AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY TicketNumber ASC LIMIT 1) AS FirstSeries, (SELECT TicketNumber FROM ticket_entry WHERE CollectionDate = dtdate AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY TicketNumber DESC LIMIT 1) AS LastSeries, IFNULL(SUM(PaidAmount), 0) AS TotalCollection, (SELECT IFNULL(Amount, 0) FROM parking_deposit WHERE CollectionDate = dtdate AND Deleted = 0) AS Deposit FROM ticket_entry WHERE CollectionDate = dtdate AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pasapayroll`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Department = 'Pasa Payroll' AND Active = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payment_amort`(IN `isalesid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM collection00 WHERE SalesID = isalesid AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY ORDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payroll_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT payroll.*, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, employees.TIN FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.Classification = iclassification AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.dtFrom = idtfrom AND payroll.dtTo = idtto AND payroll.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payroll_classification_final`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipayrolldate` DATE, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM payroll WHERE Classification = iclassification AND PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND dtFrom = idtfrom AND dtTo = idtto AND Final = 1 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payroll_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipaydate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT payroll.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND payroll.PayrollDate = ipaydate AND payroll.Final = 1 AND payroll.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payroll_rfp`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE rfp.PaymentMode = 'Payroll' AND ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_payroll_workers`(IN `ipayrolldate` DATE, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT payroll.*, time_keeping.Overtime_Hours as tk_ot, time_keeping.RDOT as tk_rdot, time_keeping.NightDiff as tk_nightdiff, time_keeping.Late as tk_late, time_keeping.Undertime as tk_undertime, time_keeping.Sunday as tk_sunday, time_keeping.Regular_Holiday as tk_regular, time_keeping.Special_Holiday as tk_special, time_keeping.Adj_Overtime as tk_otadj, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, employees.Position, time_keeping.Classification as tk_classification, sup_employee.FirstName AS sup_fname, sup_employee.LastName AS sup_lname FROM payroll LEFT JOIN employees ON payroll.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN time_keeping ON payroll.EmployeeNo = time_keeping.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON employees.Supervisor = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS sup_employee ON login00.EmployeeNo = sup_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE payroll.PayrollDate = ipayrolldate AND payroll.dtFrom = idtfrom AND payroll.dtTo = idtto AND payroll.Classification = 'Site Worker' AND payroll.Deleted = 0 AND time_keeping.dtFrom = idtfrom AND time_keeping.dtTo = idtto AND time_keeping.Final = 1 AND time_keeping.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pc_sm`(IN `ism` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM login00 WHERE Position2 = 'PC' AND SM = ism AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_apv_for_cv`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.RFP = rfp.RFP WHERE apv.Received = 1 AND apv.Balance > 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_approval_accounting`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname FROM change_order 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.CLientID 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id
LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo
WHERE change_order.Accounting_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_approval_all`(IN `iuserid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname, login00.Department FROM change_order 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.CLientID 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id
LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo
WHERE change_order.CreatedBy <> iuserid AND change_order.DocStaff_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.DocHead_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Reservation_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.CS_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Collection_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Accounting_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Sales_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.SalesHead_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Marketing_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Fund_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.Engr_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.LCC_Approval <> 'Cancelled' AND change_order.HVY_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_approval_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, sale00.UnitID, employees.LastName AS lname, employees.FirstName AS fname FROM change_order 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.CLientID 
LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id
LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo
WHERE (change_order.ReviseLayoutReq = '' AND change_order.DocStaff_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.DocHead_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Reservation_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.CS_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Collection_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Accounting_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Sales_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Marketing_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Fund_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.LCC_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0) OR (change_order.ReviseLayoutReq <> '' AND change_order.DocStaff_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.DocHead_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Reservation_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.CS_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Collection_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Accounting_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Sales_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Marketing_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Fund_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.Engr_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.LCC_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_hvy`()

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_jrm`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, employees.LastName AS lname FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (change_order.ReviseLayoutReq <> '' OR change_order.Installation_MR <> '') AND change_order.Engr_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT 
    change_order.*, 
    client_principal.LastName, 
    client_principal.FirstName, 
    client_principal.MiddleName, 
    sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, 
    employees.LastName AS lname 
FROM change_order 
    LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
    LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id 
    LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
    LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE 
    change_order.DocStaff_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.DocHead_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Reservation_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.CS_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.CSHead_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Collection_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Accounting_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Sales_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.SalesHead_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Marketing_Approval = 'Approved' 
    AND change_order.Fund_Approval = 'Approved'
    AND
        ((change_order.ReviseLayoutReq = '' AND change_order.Installation_MR = '' AND change_order.Engr_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.LCC_Approval = 'Pending')
        OR
        (change_order.Engr_Approval = 'Approved' AND change_order.LCC_Approval = 'Pending'))
    AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_marketing_head`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, employees.LastName AS lname FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE change_order.Marketing_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, employees.LastName AS lname FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (change_order.ReviseLayoutReq <> '' OR change_order.Installation_MR <> '') AND change_order.PM_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_sales_head`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, employees.LastName AS lname FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE change_order.SalesHead_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_changeorder_sales_staff`()
BEGIN
SELECT change_order.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID, employees.FirstName AS fname, employees.LastName AS lname FROM change_order LEFT JOIN client_principal ON change_order.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON change_order.SalesID = sale00.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON change_order.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE change_order.Sales_Approval = 'Pending' AND change_order.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_leave_approval`()
BEGIN 
SELECT leave_request.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM leave_request LEFT JOIN employees ON leave_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE leave_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND leave_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_maintenance_request_approval_head`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT maintenance_request.* FROM maintenance_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON maintenance_request.RequestBy = login00.UserID WHERE	maintenance_request.HeadApproval = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = idepartment AND maintenance_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_maintenance_request_approval_hr`()
BEGIN
SELECT maintenance_request.* FROM maintenance_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON maintenance_request.RequestBy = login00.UserID WHERE	maintenance_request.HeadApproval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.') AND maintenance_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_maintenance_request_approval_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT maintenance_request.* FROM maintenance_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON maintenance_request.RequestBy = login00.UserID WHERE maintenance_request.HeadApproval = 'Approved' AND maintenance_request.ExecApproval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'IT Department') AND maintenance_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_maintenance_request_approval_rlt`()
BEGIN
SELECT maintenance_request.* FROM maintenance_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON maintenance_request.RequestBy = login00.UserID WHERE maintenance_request.HeadApproval = 'Approved' AND maintenance_request.ExecApproval = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department' OR login00.Department = 'Purchasing Department' OR login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' OR login00.Department = 'Collection Department' OR login00.Department = 'Customer Service Department' OR login00.Department = 'Documentation Department' OR login00.Department = 'Treasury Department' OR login00.Department = 'Gintong Kamay Tigre Land Inc.') AND maintenance_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_mr_tradehead`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type on mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Approval1 <> 'Cancelled' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction'; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_op_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT official_business.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM official_business LEFT JOIN employees ON official_business.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE official_business.Approved = 'Pending' AND official_business.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_overtime_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE overtime.Approval = 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN

END$$

BEGIN

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pending_unit_request`()
BEGIN
SELECT unit_request.id, unit_request.Request, unit_request.Attachment, project.Project, floor_layout.Floor, unit_layout.Unit FROM unit_request LEFT JOIN project ON unit_request.Project = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_request.Floor = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_request.Unit = unit_layout.id WHERE unit_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND unit_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_petty_cash_liquidation`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM petty_cash WHERE RequestBy = iloginid AND Released = 1 AND Reimbursement = 0 AND Liquidated = 0 AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_petty_cash_liquidation_details`(in iid varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM liquidation_petty_cash_details WHERE LQD = iid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_petty_cash_request`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM petty_cash WHERE RequestBy = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pinned_mr`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM pinned_mr WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY MR;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_approval_purchasing_head`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Pending' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Purchasing Department' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_details`(in ipo varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_details_balance`(in ipo varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po_details.Balance > 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_details_floor`(in ipo varchar(50), in ifloor varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Floor = ifloor AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_details_other_po`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_details_summary`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.DiscountAmount), 0) AS totaldiscount, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total), 0) AS totalnet, po_details.Price, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_material`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN po_details ON po.PO = po_details.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po.PO ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_materials_trade`(IN `itrade` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.Qty, po_details.Price, po_details.DiscountAmount, po_details.Total, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.Type = 'Material' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND mr.TypeID = itrade ORDER BY po.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_of_mr`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total), 0) FROM po_details WHERE po_details.PO = po.PO AND po_details.Deleted = 0) AS total_amount FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po.MR = imr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_summary_floor`(IN `ifloor` varchar(50), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, po_details.PO, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, supp00.Supplier, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.DiscountAmount), 0) AS totaldiscount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.PO = po_details.PO AND dr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode) AS deliveredqty FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po_details.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.Floor = ifloor AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_summary_supplier`(IN `isuppliercode` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, po_details.PO, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.DiscountAmount), 0) AS totaldiscount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.PO = po_details.PO AND dr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode) AS deliveredqty FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_supplier`(IN `isuppliercode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT PO FROM po WHERE SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_supplier_billing`(in isuppliercode int, in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Total), 0) FROM po_details WHERE po_details.PO = po.PO AND po_details.Deleted = 0) AS total FROM po WHERE po.SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Type = 'Labor' AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_supplier_pullout`(IN `isuppliercode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT PO FROM po WHERE SupplierCode = isuppliercode AND RLTApproved <> 'Pending' AND Approved <> 'Pending' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_table_stat`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, mr.DateCreated, mr.ApproveDate, supp00.Supplier, cv.DateCreated AS CvCreated FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN apv ON po.PO = apv.PO LEFT JOIN cv ON apv.CV = cv.CVID WHERE po.Type = 'Material' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Status2 = 'New' AND po.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_po_trade`(IN `itype` VARCHAR(500), IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.Qty, po_details.Price, po_details.DiscountAmount, po_details.Total, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.Type = itype AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_print_check`()
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id  WHERE cv.Approved = 'Approved' AND cv.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_priority_units`()
BEGIN
SELECT punchlisting.*, unit_layout.UnitID, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM punchlisting LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON punchlisting.Unit_ID = unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN login00 ON punchlisting.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE punchlisting.Priority = 1 AND punchlisting.Status <> 'For Turn Over' AND punchlisting.Status <> 'Turnover';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM `contractor_billing_details` WHERE CBID = icbid AND Deleted = 0;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_project_agent_active`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT project.* 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN project ON sale00.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
WHERE sale00.Status = 'ACTIVE' AND sale00.docu_complete = 1 AND commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY sale00.ProjectID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_project_agent_cancelled`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT project.* 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN project ON sale00.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
WHERE sale00.Status = 'CANCELLED' AND sale00.docu_complete = 1 AND commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY sale00.ProjectID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_project_agent_inc`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT project.* 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN project ON sale00.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
WHERE sale00.docu_complete = 0 AND commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY sale00.ProjectID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT * FROM floor_layout WHERE ProjectID = iprojectid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

SELECT * FROM project WHERE Deleted = 0;

SELECT * FROM project WHERE Deleted = 0;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_projects`()

SELECT * FROM project WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_pullout`()
BEGIN
SELECT pullout.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, supp00.Supplier, project.Project FROM pullout LEFT JOIN items ON pullout.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON pullout.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN project ON pullout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE pullout.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_purchase_summary_materials_trade`(IN `itrade` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, po_details.Price, type.Type, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN mr ON po_details.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr.TypeID = itrade AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode, po_details.Price ORDER BY items.ItemName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_raffle_winner_department`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM department_raffle WHERE Raffle_Item <> "";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_raffle_winners`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT consuelo_de_bobo.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department FROM consuelo_de_bobo LEFT JOIN employees ON consuelo_de_bobo.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE consuelo_de_bobo.EmployeeNo <> "" ORDER BY RaffleNo;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_receive_apv`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.RFP = rfp.RFP WHERE apv.ManagerApproved = 'Approved' AND apv.Received = 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_received_apv_commission`()
BEGIN 
SELECT apv.*, (SELECT IFNULL(apv_credit.Amount, 0) FROM apv_credit WHERE apv_credit.APVID = apv.id AND apv_credit.AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable') AS payable, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.Received = 1 AND apv.IssueCheck = 0 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type2 = 'Commission' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_received_apv_construction`()
BEGIN
SELECT apv.*, (SELECT IFNULL(apv_credit.Amount, 0) FROM apv_credit WHERE apv_credit.APVID = apv.id AND apv_credit.AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable') AS payable, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.Received = 1 AND apv.IssueCheck = 0 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type = 'Construction' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_received_apv_no_rfp`()
BEGIN 
SELECT apv.*, (SELECT IFNULL(apv_credit.Amount, 0) FROM apv_credit WHERE apv_credit.APVID = apv.id AND apv_credit.AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable') AS payable FROM apv WHERE apv.RFP = '' AND apv.Received = 1 AND apv.IssueCheck = 0 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_received_apv_office`()
BEGIN 
SELECT apv.*, (SELECT IFNULL(apv_credit.Amount, 0) FROM apv_credit WHERE apv_credit.APVID = apv.id AND apv_credit.AccountTitle = 'Accounts Payable') AS payable, rfp.Attachment FROM apv LEFT JOIN rfp ON apv.id = rfp.APVID WHERE apv.Received = 1 AND apv.IssueCheck = 0 AND apv.CheckCreated = 0 AND rfp.Type = 'Office' AND rfp.Type2 <> 'Commission' AND apv.Cancelled = 0 AND apv.Deleted = 0; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_relcommission`(IN `agentiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM commissions WHERE AgentID = agentiid AND Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_release_reprint`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT for_release_supply_request.*, relEm.FirstName as relFname, relEm.LastName as relLname, reqEm.FirstName as reqFname, reqEm.LastName as reqLname, recvdEm.FirstName as recvdFname, recvdEm.LastName as recvdLname

FROM for_release_supply_request

LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID


LEFT JOIN login00 AS relLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseBy = relLog.UserID 



LEFT JOIN employees AS relEm on relLog.EmployeeNo = relEm.EmployeeNo 


LEFT JOIN login00 AS reqLog ON supply_request.RequestedBy = reqLog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS reqEm ON reqLog.EmployeeNo = reqEm.EmployeeNo


LEFT JOIN login00 AS recvdLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = recvdLog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS recvdEm ON recvdLog.EmployeeNo = recvdEm.EmployeeNo


WHERE for_release_supply_request.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_release_withdrawal`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.PMApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.`VP_Approval` = 'Approved' AND `release`.Delivered = 0 AND `release`.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_releasebooklet`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM release_booklet WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_checks`()
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE cv.Released = 1 AND cv.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_checks_bank`(in icompany varchar(50), in ibank int)
BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks, banks.Branch FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE cv.Released = 1 AND cv.Cancelled = 0 AND cv.Company = icompany AND cv.Bank = ibank;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_commission_sale`(in isalesid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM commissions WHERE SalesID = isalesid AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY DateReleased ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_office_supply_department_month`(IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) AS totalqty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID WHERE supply_request.Department = idepartment AND YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = iyear AND MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = imonth AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_office_supply_item_month`(IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `iyear` VARCHAR(50), IN `imonth` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request.Department, IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) AS totalqty FROM for_release_supply_request_details LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = iyear AND MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = imonth AND  for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY supply_request.Department;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_petty_cash_backoffice`()
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, request_employee.FirstName AS request_firstname, request_employee.LastName AS request_lastname, release_employee.FirstName AS release_firstname, release_employee.LastName AS release_lastname FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 AS request ON petty_cash.RequestBy = request.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS request_employee ON request.EmployeeNo = request_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS releaser ON petty_cash.ReleaseBy = releaser.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS release_employee ON releaser.EmployeeNo = release_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE petty_cash.Department <> 'Site Support' AND petty_cash.Department <> 'EHS' AND petty_cash.Released = 1 AND petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_petty_cash_site`()
BEGIN
SELECT petty_cash.*, request_employee.FirstName AS request_firstname, request_employee.LastName AS request_lastname, release_employee.FirstName AS release_firstname, release_employee.LastName AS release_lastname FROM petty_cash LEFT JOIN login00 AS request ON petty_cash.RequestBy = request.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS request_employee ON request.EmployeeNo = request_employee.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS releaser ON petty_cash.ReleaseBy = releaser.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS release_employee ON releaser.EmployeeNo = release_employee.EmployeeNo WHERE (petty_cash.Department = 'Site Support' OR petty_cash.Department = 'EHS') AND petty_cash.Released = 1 AND petty_cash.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_withdrawal`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.`Delivered` = 1 AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_released_withdrawal_contractor`(IN `icontractorcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT release_details.Floor, release_details.DeliveredQty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, `release`.`RequestNo`, `release`.`DateCreated`, `release`.`Remarks`, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`ContractorCode` = icontractorcode AND `release`.`Delivered` = 1 ORDER BY `release`.`DateCreated` ASC;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_reprint_acknowledgement`()
BEGIN
SELECT acknowledgement.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT dr_details.DateDelivered FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.DR = acknowledgement.DR AND dr_details.PO = acknowledgement.PO AND dr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY dr_details.Deleted = 0) AS datedelivered FROM acknowledgement LEFT JOIN login00 ON acknowledgement.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

    NO SQL

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_request_report`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request.*, ereq.FirstName AS req_fname, ereq.LastName AS req_lname, ereq.Department


FROM supply_request 

LEFT JOIN login00 AS req ON supply_request.RequestedBy = req.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS ereq ON req.EmployeeNo = ereq.EmployeeNo 


WHERE supply_request.MR = imr AND supply_request.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_request_report_department`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT login00.Department FROM supply_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.RequestedBy = login00.UserID WHERE supply_request.MR = imr AND supply_request.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY login00.Department;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_return_released_withdrawal`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.`Delivered` = 1 AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_return_withdrawal_details`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT release_details.ItemCode, release_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, release_details.DeliveredQty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(return_details.Qty), 0) FROM return_details WHERE return_details.RequestNo = irequestno AND release_details.ItemCode = return_details.ItemCode AND release_details.Floor = return_details.Floor) AS ReturnQty FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.RequestNo = irequestno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_returns`()
BEGIN
SELECT returns.*, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM returns LEFT JOIN `release` ON returns.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON returns.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_apv`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND AccountingApproved = 'Pending' AND Type2 <> 'Confidential' AND Cancelled = 0 AND PaymentMode <> 'Payroll' ORDER BY DateRequired ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_attachment`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `rfp` WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_company_year`(in iyear varchar(50), in icompany varchar(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE YEAR(DateCreated) = iyear AND ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND ChargeTo = icompany AND Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY DateCreated ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_history`()
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.ExecApproved = 'Approved' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_liquidations_status`(IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT liquidation.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, rfp.Particulars, rfp.Amount, rfp.HandlingFee, rfp.InstallationFee, rfp.Payee, apv.APV FROM liquidation LEFT JOIN login00 ON liquidation.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN rfp ON liquidation.RFP = rfp.RFP LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id WHERE liquidation.Process = istatus;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_pending_documents_user`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, apv.APV, cv.CV FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN apv ON rfp.APVID = apv.id LEFT JOIN cv ON apv.CV = cv.CVID WHERE rfp.LoginID = iloginid AND rfp.Released = 1 AND rfp.WithOriginalDocs = 'No' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY rfp.RFP ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_rfp_pending_liquidation_user`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM rfp LEFT JOIN login00 ON rfp.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE rfp.LoginID = iloginid AND rfp.Released = 1 AND rfp.Reimbursement = 0 AND rfp.ForLiquidation = 1 AND rfp.Liquidated = 0 AND rfp.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY rfp.RFP ASC;
END$$
