END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_done_punchlisting_tradehead`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Approved' AND room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_for_inspection_punchlisting`(IN `iroomid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON room_checklist.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON room_checklist.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE room_checklist.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_for_inspection_punchlisting_tradehead`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 1 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Inspection_Approval = 'Pending' AND room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0 AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_for_rectification_punchlisting`(IN `iroomid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist WHERE room_checklist.Status = 'For Rectification' AND room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_for_rectification_punchlisting_tradehead`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_ongoing_rectification`(IN `iroomid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.*, contractor00.Contractor, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON room_checklist.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON room_checklist.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE room_checklist.Confirmed = 1 AND room_checklist.ForInspection = 0 AND room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_ongoing_rectification_tradehead`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_checklist_tradehead ON room_checklist.ChecklistID = room_checklist_tradehead.ChecklistID WHERE room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0 AND (room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = iloginid OR room_checklist_tradehead.TradeHead = 22) AND room_checklist_tradehead.ContractorCode <> 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.ForInspection = 0 AND room_checklist_tradehead.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_punchlisting`(IN `iroomid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist WHERE room_checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_room_checklist_tradehead`(IN `iroomid` INT, IN `itradehead` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT checklist.*, checklist_list.Checklist, checklist_remarks.DateCreated, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM checklist LEFT JOIN checklist_list ON checklist.ChecklistID = checklist_list.id LEFT JOIN works ON checklist.Trade = works.Trade LEFT JOIN checklist_remarks ON checklist.id = checklist_remarks.ChecklistID LEFT JOIN login00 ON checklist_remarks.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE checklist.RoomID = iroomid AND checklist.Deleted = 0 AND works.TradeHead = itradehead GROUP BY checklist.id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_roomreq`(IN `ifloor` INT)

SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.Floor FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id WHERE unit_layout.FloorID = ifloor ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_agent_active`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.UnitPrice, sale00.AutoDiscount, sale00.PromoDiscount, sale00.AddtlDiscount, sale00.DiscountAmount, sale00.Status, commsspecs.CommissionRate, commsspecs.RebateAmount, commsspecs.RebatePercentage, commsspecs.Amount, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal), 0) FROM collection_amort WHERE collection_amort.SalesID = sale00.id AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0) AS total_payment, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(commissions.Amount), 0) FROM commissions WHERE commissions.SalesID = sale00.id AND commissions.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commissions.Deleted = 0) AS commission_payment 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON sale00.UnitID = unit_layout.UnitID 
LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 
LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
WHERE commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.ProjectID = iprojectid AND sale00.ReservationDate >= '2023-11-01' AND sale00.Status = 'ACTIVE' AND sale00.docu_complete = 1 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_agent_cancelled`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.UnitPrice, sale00.AutoDiscount, sale00.PromoDiscount, sale00.AddtlDiscount, sale00.DiscountAmount, sale00.Status, commsspecs.CommissionRate, commsspecs.RebateAmount, commsspecs.RebatePercentage, commsspecs.Amount, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal), 0) FROM collection_amort WHERE collection_amort.SalesID = sale00.id AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0) AS total_payment, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(commissions.Amount), 0) FROM commissions WHERE commissions.SalesID = sale00.id AND commissions.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commissions.Deleted = 0) AS commission_payment 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON sale00.UnitID = unit_layout.UnitID 
LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 
LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
WHERE commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.ProjectID = iprojectid AND sale00.ReservationDate >= '2023-11-01' AND sale00.Status = 'CANCELLED' AND sale00.docu_complete = 1 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_agent_commission`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.id, sale00.UnitPrice, sale00.AutoDiscount, sale00.PromoDiscount, sale00.AddtlDiscount, 
sale00.DiscountAmount, sale00.Status, commsspecs.CommissionRate, commsspecs.RebateAmount, commsspecs.RebatePercentage, commsspecs.Amount, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal), 0) 
FROM collection_amort WHERE collection_amort.SalesID = sale00.id AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0) AS total_payment, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(commissions.Amount), 0) FROM commissions WHERE commissions.SalesID = sale00.id AND commissions.AgentID = iemployeeno AND 
commissions.Deleted = 0) AS commission_payment 

FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
WHERE commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.ReservationDate >= '2023-11-01' ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_agent_inc`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.UnitPrice, sale00.AutoDiscount, sale00.PromoDiscount, sale00.AddtlDiscount, sale00.DiscountAmount, sale00.Status, commsspecs.CommissionRate, commsspecs.RebateAmount, commsspecs.RebatePercentage, commsspecs.Amount, unit_layout.Unit, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal), 0) FROM collection_amort WHERE collection_amort.SalesID = sale00.id AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0) AS total_payment, 

(SELECT IFNULL(SUM(commissions.Amount), 0) FROM commissions WHERE commissions.SalesID = sale00.id AND commissions.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commissions.Deleted = 0) AS commission_payment 
FROM sale00 
LEFT JOIN commsspecs ON sale00.id = commsspecs.SalesID 
LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON sale00.UnitID = unit_layout.UnitID 
LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id 
LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 
LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID 
WHERE commsspecs.AgentID = iemployeeno AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.ProjectID = iprojectid AND sale00.ReservationDate >= '2023-11-01' AND sale00.docu_complete = 0 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_ar`()
BEGIN
SELECT sales_ar.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, sale00.UnitID FROM sales_ar LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sales_ar.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON sales_ar.SalesID = sale00.id WHERE sales_ar.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_commspecs`(IN `isalesid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT commsspecs.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, marketing_partner.firstname AS mp_fname, marketing_partner.lastname AS mp_lname, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(commissions.Amount), 0) FROM commissions WHERE commissions.SalesID = commsspecs.SalesID AND commissions.AgentID = commsspecs.AgentID AND commissions.Deleted = 0) AS commission_payment FROM commsspecs LEFT JOIN employees ON commsspecs.AgentID = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN marketing_partner ON commsspecs.AgentID = marketing_partner.MPID WHERE commsspecs.SalesID = isalesid AND commsspecs.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_except_unit`(in iunitid varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.*, client_principal.LastName , client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName FROM sale00 LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID  WHERE sale00.UnitID <> iunitid AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND sale00.Status <> "CANCELLED" AND sale00.Cancellation = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_range`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName FROM sale00 LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE sale00.ReservationDate >= idtfrom AND sale00.ReservationDate <= idtto AND sale00.Cancellation = 0 AND sale00.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_range_all`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName FROM sale00 LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE sale00.ReservationDate >= idtfrom AND sale00.ReservationDate <= idtto AND sale00.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_range_status`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, in istatus varchar(50))
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.*, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName FROM sale00 LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE sale00.ReservationDate >= idtfrom AND sale00.ReservationDate <= idtto AND sale00.Status = istatus AND sale00.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY sale00.ReservationDate ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sales_unitid`(IN `iunitid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT sale00.*, project.Project, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.FirstName, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection_amort.Payment_Principal), 0) FROM collection_amort WHERE collection_amort.SalesID = sale00.id AND collection_amort.Status = 'Paid' AND collection_amort.Deleted = 0) AS total_payment FROM sale00 LEFT JOIN project ON sale00.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID WHERE (sale00.UnitID = iunitid AND sale00.Status = 'ACTIVE' AND sale00.Deleted = 0) OR (sale00.UnitID = iunitid AND sale00.Status = 'CANCELLED' AND sale00.Deleted = 0 AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(collection00.Amount), 0) FROM collection00 WHERE collection00.SalesID = sale00.id AND Deleted = 0) > 25000);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_schedule_details`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN 
SELECT schedule_delivery.PO, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.DeliveryQty, po.MR FROM schedule_delivery LEFT JOIN po ON schedule_delivery.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN po_details ON schedule_delivery.PO = po_details.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE schedule_delivery.DeliveryDate = idate AND po.Status = 'Open' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.DeliveryQty > 0 GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.ItemCode ORDER BY po.PO;
end$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_sd_per_group`(IN `iagentdiv` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM login00 WHERE Position2 = 'SD' AND Agent_Div = iagentdiv AND Deleted = 0 OR UserID = 117 AND Agent_Div = iagentdiv AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_search_directory`(in isearch varchar(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM docs_directory WHERE Directory LIKE CONCAT('%', isearch, '%') AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_search_files`(in idirectoryid int, in isearch varchar(1000))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM docs_file WHERE DirectoryID = idirectoryid AND FileName LIKE CONCAT('%', isearch, '%') AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_search_new_office_mr`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr_office.*, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM mr_office LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr_office.PreparedBy = login00.UserID WHERE mr_office.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr_office.ExecutiveApproved = 'Approved' AND mr_office.Purchasing = 0 AND mr_office.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_search_particulars`(IN `itype` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.PO, supp00.Supplier, po_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Type FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po_details.Type = itype GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.Floor, po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_search_particulars_all`()
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.PO, supp00.Supplier, po_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Type FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.PO, po_details.Floor, po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_second_trip_dropoff`(IN `idriver` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN 
SELECT transportation_schedule.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM transportation_schedule LEFT JOIN login00 ON transportation_schedule.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE transportation_schedule.DriverPM = idriver AND transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.PMTrip = '2nd Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY transportation_schedule.SequenceDropoff ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_second_trip_pickup`(IN `idriver` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN 
SELECT transportation_schedule.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM transportation_schedule LEFT JOIN login00 ON transportation_schedule.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE transportation_schedule.DriverAM = idriver AND transportation_schedule.tDate = idate AND transportation_schedule.AMTrip = '2nd Trip' AND transportation_schedule.Approval = 'Approved' AND transportation_schedule.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY transportation_schedule.Sequence ASC; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_selected_assets`(IN `iassettag` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN

SELECT assets.*, asset_model.Asset, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM assets LEFT JOIN asset_model ON assets.AssetID = asset_model.AssetID LEFT JOIN login00 ON assets.DeployedTo = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE FIND_IN_SET(assets.AssetTag, iassettag) AND assets.Deleted = 0; 

END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_setA_winners`()
BEGIN
SELECT xmas_quiz_score.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department, xmas_party.Picture FROM xmas_quiz_score LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_quiz_score.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON xmas_quiz_score.EmployeeNo = xmas_party.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_quiz_score.qSet = 'A' ORDER BY xmas_quiz_score.Score DESC, xmas_quiz_score.SecondsFinished ASC, xmas_quiz_score.timeFinished ASC LIMIT 10;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_setB_winners`()
BEGIN
SELECT xmas_quiz_score.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department, xmas_party.Picture FROM xmas_quiz_score LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_quiz_score.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON xmas_quiz_score.EmployeeNo = xmas_party.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_quiz_score.qSet = 'B' ORDER BY xmas_quiz_score.Score DESC, xmas_quiz_score.SecondsFinished ASC, xmas_quiz_score.timeFinished ASC LIMIT 10;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

END$$

BEGIN
SELECT cv.*, banks.Banks FROM cv LEFT JOIN banks ON cv.Bank = banks.id WHERE cv.LCCSigned = 'Approved' AND cv.Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_specialday_approval_accounting`(IN `iusertype` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT specialday_request.*, employees.las,	employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.Department = 'Accounting Department' OR login00.Department = 'HTY Parking') AND login00.UserType <> iusertype AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$

WHERE specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department = 'EHS';
END$$

AND login00.UserType <> 37 AND login00.Position <> 'Agent';
END$$

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_specialday_approval_hvy`()
BEGIN
SELECT specialday_request.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND (login00.UserID = 42 OR login00.UserID = 41 OR login00.UserID = 43 OR login00.UserID = 122 OR login00.UserID = 27)) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_specialday_approval_lcc`()
BEGIN
SELECT specialday_request.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM specialday_request LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE ((specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.UserType = 37 AND (login00.Department = 'Sales Department' OR login00.Department = 'Marketing Department' OR login00.Department = 'IT Department')) OR ((login00.UserID = 98 OR login00.UserID = 113 OR login00.UserID = 117) AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending')) OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND login00.Department = 'Executive Department' AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0);
END$$

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
SELECT specialday_request.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName 
FROM specialday_request 
LEFT JOIN login00 ON specialday_request.CreatedBy = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE (login00.UserType = 37 AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND login00.Department <> 'IT Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Sales Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Marketing Department' AND login00.Department <> 'Treasury Department') OR (login00.UserType = 36 AND specialday_request.Approved = 'Pending' AND specialday_request.Deleted = 0 AND (login00.Department = 'Executive Department' OR login00.Department = 'HR and Admin Department'));
END$$

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_summary_parking_attendant`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.ParkingAttendant, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.PaidAmount), 0) AS totalPaidAmount, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.ParkingFee), 0) AS totalParkingFee, IFNULL(SUM(ticket_entry.ShortOver), 0) AS totalShortOver, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(attendant_collection.CollectionAmount), 0) FROM attendant_collection WHERE attendant_collection.Attendant = ticket_entry.ParkingAttendant AND attendant_collection.CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND attendant_collection.CollectionDate <= idtto AND attendant_collection.Deleted = 0) AS totalAmountDeposit, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(attendant_payment.Amount), 0) FROM attendant_payment WHERE attendant_payment.Attendant = ticket_entry.ParkingAttendant AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND attendant_payment.CollectionDate <= idtto AND attendant_payment.Deleted = 0) AS totalShortPayment FROM ticket_entry WHERE ticket_entry.CollectionDate >= idtfrom AND ticket_entry.CollectionDate <= idtto AND ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY ticket_entry.ParkingAttendant;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supplier_withpo`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT supp00.* FROM po_details LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Material' AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.SupplierCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supplier_withpo_billing`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT supp00.* FROM po_details LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Labor' AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.SupplierCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supplier_withpo_others`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT supp00.* FROM po_details LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.Type = 'Others' AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(po.Date) >= idtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= idtto GROUP BY po_details.SupplierCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_suppliers_trade`(in itradeid int)
BEGIN
SELECT supp00.* FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR WHERE po.Type = 'Material' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.TypeID = itradeid GROUP BY supp00.SupplierCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supplies_with_inventory`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM items WHERE Type = 'Office Supplies' AND Deleted = 0 AND WInv = 1 ORDER BY items.ItemName ASC;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_approval`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request.*, employees.FirstName , employees.LastName FROM supply_request 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.RequestedBy = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE supply_request.HeadApproval = 'Approved' AND supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND supply_request.iStatus <> "Approved" AND supply_request.MR = "" AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(supply_request_details.Request_Qty),0) FROM supply_request_details WHERE supply_request.RequestID = supply_request_details.RequestID AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0) <> (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty),0) FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0);


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_delivery_delivered`(IN `ideparment` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT for_release_supply_request.*, relEm.FirstName as relFname, relEm.LastName as relLname, supply_request.DateRequested, reqEm.FirstName as reqFname, reqEm.LastName as reqLname

FROM for_release_supply_request

LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID


LEFT JOIN login00 AS relLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseBy = relLog.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS relEm on relLog.EmployeeNo = relEm.EmployeeNo 


LEFT JOIN login00 AS reqLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = reqLog.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS reqEm on reqLog.EmployeeNo = reqEm.EmployeeNo 


LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.RequestedBy = login00.UserID

WHERE for_release_supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = ideparment AND for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy <> 0 GROUP BY for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_delivery_for_receiving`(IN `ideparment` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT for_release_supply_request.*, relEm.FirstName as relFname, relEm.LastName as relLname, supply_request.DateRequested, reqEm.FirstName as reqFname, reqEm.LastName as reqLname

FROM for_release_supply_request

LEFT JOIN supply_request ON for_release_supply_request.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID


LEFT JOIN login00 AS relLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseBy = relLog.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS relEm on relLog.EmployeeNo = relEm.EmployeeNo 


LEFT JOIN login00 AS reqLog ON for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = reqLog.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees AS reqEm on reqLog.EmployeeNo = reqEm.EmployeeNo 


LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID

LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.RequestedBy = login00.UserID

WHERE for_release_supply_request.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = ideparment  AND for_release_supply_request.ReceivedBy = 0 GROUP BY for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_delivery_list`(IN `releaseid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT for_release_supply_request_details.*, items.Description, items.ItemName, items.Unit  


FROM for_release_supply_request_details 

LEFT JOIN items ON for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 


WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = releaseid AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 AND for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty <> 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_mr_details`(IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(supply_replenishment.Max, 0) as Max FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supply_replenishment ON items.ItemCode = supply_replenishment.ItemCode AND supply_replenishment.Deleted = 0 WHERE mr_details.MR = "" AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.LoginID = iloginid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_replenishment_rate`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_replenishment.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM supply_replenishment LEFT JOIN items ON supply_replenishment.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE supply_replenishment.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_request`(IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN


SELECT supply_request.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName

FROM supply_request

LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request.ApprovedBy = login00.UserID 

LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo

WHERE supply_request.RequestedBy = iloginid AND supply_request.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY supply_request.RequestID;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_request_edit`(IN `ireq` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT supply_request_details.*, supply_request.Remarks, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supply_request ON supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = ireq AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_request_for_release`(IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT supply_request_details.*, login00.Department 

FROM supply_request_details 

LEFT JOIN login00 ON supply_request_details.LoginID = login00.UserID 

WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0; 

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_table_inside`(IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN


SELECT 
  	supply_request_details.*, 
	supply_request.iStatus, 
	supply_request.MR, 
	items.ItemName, 
	items.Description, 
	items.Unit 
FROM supply_request_details 
LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 
LEFT JOIN supply_request ON supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID 
WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = '' AND supply_request_details.LoginID = iloginid AND  supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_table_inside_edit`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT 
  	supply_request_details.*, 
	supply_request.iStatus, 
	supply_request.MR, 
	items.ItemName, 
	items.Description, 
	items.Unit 
FROM supply_request_details 
LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 
LEFT JOIN supply_request ON supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID 
WHERE supply_request.iStatus = 'Pending' AND supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND supply_request_details.LoginID = iloginid AND  supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supply_table_inside_view`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(500), IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT `supply_request_details`.*, 
        items.ItemName AS ItemName, 
        items.Description AS Description, 
        items.Unit AS Unit,
        (SELECT SUM(ReleaseQty) FROM `for_release_supply_request_details` WHERE RequestID = irequestid AND ItemCode = iitemcode )AS ReleasedQty 
FROM `supply_request_details` 
LEFT JOIN items ON items.ItemCode = `supply_request_details`.ItemCode 
LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = `supply_request_details`.`RequestID` 
WHERE `supply_request_details`.LoginID = iloginid AND `supply_request_details`.RequestID =  irequestid AND `supply_request_details`.`ItemCode` =  iitemcode LIMIT 1;END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_supreq_details`(IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN


SELECT supply_request_details.*, supply_request.iStatus, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM supply_request_details LEFT JOIN items ON supply_request_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supply_request ON supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request.RequestID  WHERE supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

END$$

BEGIN

LEFT JOIN items ON temp_aging_inventory.ItemCode = items.ItemCode 
WHERE TotalValue >= 100000
ORDER BY CASE WHEN temp_aging_inventory.LastWithdrawal <> '1111-11-11' THEN LastWithdrawal END DESC;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ticketentry_report`(IN `iattendant` INT, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT ticket_entry.* FROM ticket_entry LEFT JOIN parking_end_duty ON ticket_entry.EndID = parking_end_duty.EndID WHERE ticket_entry.Deleted = 0 AND parking_end_duty.Date >= idtfrom AND parking_end_duty.Date <= idtto AND parking_end_duty.LoginID = iattendant ORDER BY ticket_entry.TimeOUT ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_ticketentry_report_old`(IN `iattendant` INT, IN `idtdate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE Deleted = 0 AND CollectionDate = idtdate AND Attendant_LoginID = iattendant ORDER BY ticket_entry.TimeOUT ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_timelogs_summary`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT timelog_request.*, reqBy.EmployeeNo, reqBy.FirstName as reqFname, reqBy.LastName as reqLname

FROM timelog_request

LEFT JOIN login00 as reqlog ON timelog_request.CreatedBy = reqlog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees as reqBy ON reqlog.EmployeeNo = reqBy.EmployeeNo 


WHERE timelog_request.Deleted = 0 AND timelog_request.Approved = Approved AND timelog_request.Date >= idtfrom AND timelog_request.Date  <= idtto ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_timelogs_summary_pending`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT timelog_request.*, reqBy.EmployeeNo, reqBy.FirstName as reqFname, reqBy.LastName as reqLname

FROM timelog_request

LEFT JOIN login00 as reqlog ON timelog_request.CreatedBy = reqlog.UserID LEFT JOIN employees as reqBy ON reqlog.EmployeeNo = reqBy.EmployeeNo 


WHERE timelog_request.Deleted = 0 AND timelog_request.Approved = "Pending";

END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

    NO SQL

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_category_table_collapse`(IN `unitiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_category_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_category.Category FROM unit_category_monitoring LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_category_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id WHERE unit_category_monitoring.Deleted = 0 AND unit_category_monitoring.UnitID= unitiid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_checklist_approval`(IN `ifloorid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT unit_layout.* FROM checklist_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id
 
LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id

WHERE checklist_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_status_monitoring GROUP BY ChecklistID) AND unit_checklist_monitoring.ApprovalStatus= "Pending" AND checklist_status_monitoring.ChecklistStatus = "Completed" AND floor_layout.Id =  ifloorid GROUP BY unit_layout.Unit;





END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_checklist_item_table`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_item.*, unit_checklist_category.Category, unit_checklist.Checklist FROM unit_checklist_item 



LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_item.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_checklist.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id WHERE unit_checklist_item.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_checklist_item_table_collapse`(IN `checklistiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_item_monitoring.*, unit_checklist_item.Item, unit_checklist_monitoring.ScopePercentage FROM unit_checklist_item_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.CheckItemID = unit_checklist_item.id LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id  WHERE unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = checklistiid AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.Deleted = 0;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_checklist_table`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist.*, unit_checklist_category.Category FROM unit_checklist LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_category ON unit_checklist.CategoryID = unit_checklist_category.id WHERE unit_checklist.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_checklist_table_collapse`(IN `categoryiid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_checklist_monitoring.* , unit_checklist.Checklist FROM unit_checklist_monitoring LEFT JOIN unit_checklist ON unit_checklist_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist.id LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id WHERE unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = categoryiid AND unit_checklist_monitoring.Deleted = 0;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_item_approval`(IN `ifloorid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT unit_layout.* FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_item_monitoring ON checklist_item_status_monitoring.ItemID = unit_checklist_item_monitoring.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_checklist_monitoring ON unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ChecklistID = unit_checklist_monitoring.id

LEFT JOIN unit_category_monitoring ON unit_checklist_monitoring.CategoryID = unit_category_monitoring.id 

LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_category_monitoring.UnitID = unit_layout.id

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id

WHERE checklist_item_status_monitoring.DateCreated IN (SELECT MAX(DateCreated) FROM checklist_item_status_monitoring GROUP BY ItemID) AND unit_checklist_item_monitoring.ApprovalStatus= "Pending" AND checklist_item_status_monitoring.CheckItemStatus = "Completed" AND floor_layout.Id = ifloorid GROUP BY unit_layout.Unit;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_priority`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, project.ProjectID, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.LastName, client_principal.MiddleName

FROM unit_layout 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN sale00 ON unit_layout.UnitID = sale00.UnitID LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID


WHERE sale00.ReservationDate IN (SELECT MAX(ReservationDate) FROM sale00 GROUP BY UnitID) AND unit_layout.Deleted = 0  ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_table`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 
SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, project.ProjectID FROM unit_layout LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE unit_layout.Deleted = 0;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unit_table_developer`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

SELECT unit_layout.*, floor_layout.Floor, project.Project, project.ProjectID

FROM unit_layout 

LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_layout.FloorID = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN project ON floor_layout.ProjectID = project.ProjectID 


WHERE unit_layout.Deleted = 0  ;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unitreq`(IN `iunit` INT)
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM unit_layout WHERE FloorID = iunit  ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unitrequest`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT unit_request.*, project.Project AS ProjectName, floor_layout.Floor AS FloorName, unit_layout.Unit AS UnitName, client_principal.FirstName, client_principal.MiddleName, client_principal.LastName


FROM unit_request 


LEFT JOIN project ON unit_request.Project = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN floor_layout ON unit_request.Floor = floor_layout.Id LEFT JOIN unit_layout ON unit_request.Unit= unit_layout.id LEFT JOIN sale00 ON unit_layout.UnitID = sale00.UnitID LEFT JOIN client_principal ON sale00.ClientID = client_principal.ClientID

WHERE unit_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_units_floor`(in ifloorid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM unit_layout WHERE FloorID = ifloorid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_unpaid_collection_amort`(IN `isalesid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT * FROM collection_amort WHERE Status = 'Unpaid' AND SalesID = isalesid AND Deleted = 0 ORDER BY Date asc;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_users`()
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, usertype.UserType as utype, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN usertype ON login00.UserType = usertype.UserTypeID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.UserID <> 1 AND login00.UserType <> 41 AND login00.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_usertype`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM usertype WHERE Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_vendor`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `apv` WHERE Deleted = 0 GROUP BY Payee;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_vendor_cv`()

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_viewed_auditmaterials`(IN `dtfrom` DATE, IN `dtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Price, supp00.Supplier, supp00.ContactNo, supp00.ContactPer, po.PO, po.Date, po_details.Audited FROM po_details LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po_details.Viewed_LCC = 1 AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND DATE(po.Date) >= dtfrom AND DATE(po.Date) <= dtto GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_with_stocks_item`(in iprojectid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM items WHERE Type = 'Material' AND Deleted = 0 AND get_stocks_material(items.ItemCode, iprojectid) > 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_with_symptoms`(IN `istart` DATE, IN `iend` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT health.*, login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department FROM health LEFT JOIN login00 ON health.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE DATE(health.DateSubmitted) >= istart AND DATE(health.DateSubmitted) <= iend;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_with_symptoms_site`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT health.*, login00.fName, login00.lName, login00.Department FROM health LEFT JOIN login00 ON health.LoginID = login00.UserID WHERE login00.Department = 'Site Support' AND DATE(health.DateSubmitted) = idate;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_details`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT release_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.RequestNo = irequestno AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 ORDER BY Floor ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_details_excel`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) AS totaldelivered FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.RequestNo = irequestno AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_material`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN release_details ON `release`.`RequestNo` = release_details.RequestNo LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 AND `release`.`QSApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`PMApproved` = 'Approved' AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0 GROUP BY `release`.`RequestNo` ORDER BY `release`.`DateCreated` DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_qs_approval`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Pending' AND `release`.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY `release`.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_report_contractor`(IN `icontractorcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT release_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty) as totalqty FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.ContractorCode = icontractorcode AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.Floor, release_details.ItemCode ORDER BY release_details.Floor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_report_floor`(IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty) AS totalqty, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM release_details LEFT JOIN items ON release_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE release_details.Floor = ifloor AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.ItemCode ORDER BY items.ItemName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_report_item`(IN `iitemcode` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor00.Contractor, release_details.RequestNo, IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) as totalqty, `release`.`DateDelivered`, release_details.Floor FROM release_details LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON release_details.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN `release` ON release_details.RequestNo = `release`.`RequestNo` WHERE release_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND release_details.Cancelled = 0 AND release_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY release_details.RequestNo, release_details.Floor ORDER BY `release`.`DateDelivered`;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_withdrawal_user`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.`ContractorCode` = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.LoginID = iloginid AND `release`.`Deleted` = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_work`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `icatid` INT, IN `isubcatid` INT, IN `icbid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `contractor_billing_work` WHERE CBID = icbid AND CatID = icatid AND SubCatID = isubcatid AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_work_materials`(IN `iworkid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT contractor_billing_materials.*, items.ItemName as ItemName, items.Description as Description, items.Unit as Unit 
FROM `contractor_billing_materials`
LEFT JOIN items ON contractor_billing_materials.Material = items.ItemCode
WHERE contractor_billing_materials.WorkID = iworkid and contractor_billing_materials.Deleted = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_workers_overtime_pay`(IN `iyesterday` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT overtime.*, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName, employees.LastName, login00.fName, login00.lName FROM overtime LEFT JOIN employees ON overtime.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 ON overtime.CreatedBy = login00.UserID WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Site Support') AND overtime.Date = iyesterday AND overtime.Approval = 'Approved' AND overtime.Checked <> 'Pending' AND overtime.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_workers_safety`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM employees WHERE Classification = 'SAFETY' AND Active = 1;
END$$

BEGIN
SELECT timelog_request.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.MiddleName FROM timelog_request LEFT JOIN employees ON timelog_request.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (employees.Department = 'Site Worker' OR employees.Department = 'Pasa Payroll') AND timelog_request.CreatedBy = iloginid AND timelog_request.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN

CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_works_floor`(IN `ifloorid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT works.*, type.Type, login00.fName, login00.lName, contractor00.Contractor FROM works LEFT JOIN type ON works.Trade = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON works.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON works.Contractor = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE works.FloorID = ifloorid AND works.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY works.Trade, works.TradeHead, works.Contractor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_works_unit`(IN `iunitid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT works.*, type.Type, login00.fName, login00.lName, contractor00.Contractor FROM works LEFT JOIN type ON works.Trade = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON works.TradeHead = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON works.Contractor = contractor00.ContractorCode WHERE works.UnitID = iunitid AND works.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY works.Trade, works.TradeHead, works.Contractor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_chat_messages`(IN ichat_from varchar(100), in ichat_to varchar(100))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM xmas_chat_message WHERE (chat_from = ichat_from AND chat_to = ichat_to) OR (chat_from = ichat_to AND chat_to = ichat_from)  ORDER BY chat_time ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_kpop_winners_female`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT voting_tracker.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.Department, xmas_party.Picture, employees.EmployeeNo, IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount

FROM voting_tracker  LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON voting_tracker.ParticipantID = xmas_party.id LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Sex ="Female"

GROUP BY voting_tracker.ParticipantID ORDER BY totalcount DESC LIMIT 1 ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_kpop_winners_male`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT voting_tracker.*, employees.LastName, employees.FirstName, employees.Department, xmas_party.Picture, employees.EmployeeNo, IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount

FROM voting_tracker  LEFT JOIN xmas_party ON voting_tracker.ParticipantID = xmas_party.id LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE employees.Sex ="Male"

GROUP BY voting_tracker.ParticipantID ORDER BY totalcount DESC LIMIT 1 ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_pay_classification`(IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(100), IN `iyear` VARCHAR(10))
BEGIN
SELECT xmas_pay_details.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.MiddleName, xmas_pay.Amount FROM xmas_pay_details LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_pay_details.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN xmas_pay ON xmas_pay_details.EmployeeNo = xmas_pay.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_pay_details.Classification = iclassification AND xmas_pay_details.Year = iyear AND xmas_pay_details.Deleted = 0 AND xmas_pay.Year = iyear ANd xmas_pay.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY employees.LastName ASC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_registration`()
BEGIN
SELECT xmas_party.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department FROM xmas_party LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_party.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_voting_female`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT xmas_party.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department FROM xmas_party LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_party.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Sex = "Female" AND employees.EmployeeNo <> iemployeeno AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT voting_tracker.* FROM voting_tracker WHERE xmas_party.id = voting_tracker.ParticipantID AND voting_tracker.VotedBy = iemployeeno);

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `load_xmas_voting_male`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT xmas_party.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Department FROM xmas_party LEFT JOIN employees ON xmas_party.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE xmas_party.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Sex = "Male" AND employees.EmployeeNo <> iemployeeno AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT voting_tracker.* FROM voting_tracker WHERE xmas_party.id = voting_tracker.ParticipantID AND voting_tracker.VotedBy = iemployeeno);

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `log_in`(IN `user_log` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN 
SELECT login00.Email, login00.UserType AS UId, usertype.UserType, login00.Department, login00.UserID, login00.Avatar, login00.DigitalSignature, login00.Position, login00.Position2, login00.SM, login00.username, login00.EmployeeNo, login00.password, login00.SD, employees.Level, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, employees.Picture, employees.Position AS employee_position, employees.roh_to, employees.roh_from, employees.RestDay, login00.XmasTeam,employees.Sex 
FROM login00 
LEFT JOIN usertype ON login00.UserType =  usertype.UserTypeID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE login00.Deleted = 0 AND login00.username = user_log;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `log_in2`(IN `user_log` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * 
FROM `login00_others` 
WHERE 
    Deleted = 0 
    AND username = user_log;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `lpo_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.PMApproval = 'Approved' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Sales Department' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_SD`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SDNote = inote, SDNotedBy = iloginid , SDApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_SD_SSD`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SDNote = inote, SDNotedBy = iloginid , SDApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_SM`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SMNote = inote, SMNotedBy = iloginid , SMApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_SSD`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SSDNote = inote, SSDNotedBy = iloginid , SSDApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_Sales`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))

UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SalesNote = inote, SalesNotedBy = iloginid , SalesApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `modify_dtr_SalesHead`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `ilocation` VARCHAR(100), IN `itimein` TIME, IN `itimeout` TIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE dtr_attandance SET Date = idate, Location = ilocation, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, Remarks = iremarks, SalesHNote = inote, SalesHNotedBy = iloginid , SalesHApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_approve_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, purchasing_employees.FirstName AS purchasing_firstname, purchasing_employees.LastName AS purchasing_lastname, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS purchasing_login ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = purchasing_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS purchasing_employees ON purchasing_login.EmployeeNo = purchasing_employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_cancel_approve_cancel`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ireason` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE mr
SET Approved = 'Cancelled', ApprovedID = iloginid, ApproveDate = idatetime, Remarks = ireason, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE mr = imr;

UPDATE po
SET RLTApproved = 'Cancelled', Approved = 'Cancelled', RLTReason = 'Cancelled MR', Reason = 'Cancelled MR'
WHERE mr = imr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_cancel_approve_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_checkinventory`(IN `ponum` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.ItemCode, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, SUM(po_details.Qty) AS totalqty, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(beg_details.Qty), 0) FROM beg_details WHERE beg_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND beg_details.Deleted = 0) as beginv, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(release_details.DeliveredQty), 0) FROM release_details WHERE release_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND release_details.Deleted = 0) as withdraw, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(spoilage00.Qty), 0) FROM spoilage00 WHERE spoilage00.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND spoilage00.Deleted = 0) AS spoil, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(dr_details.Qty), 0) FROM dr_details WHERE dr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode and dr_details.Deleted = 0) as purchase, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(pullout.Qty), 0) FROM pullout WHERE pullout.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND pullout.Deleted = 0) AS pullout FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ponum AND po_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY po_details.ItemCode;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_report_floor`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.Floor FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY mr_details.Floor ORDER BY mr_details.Floor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_report_floor_d`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `mrfloor` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.ItemCode, mr_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, mr_details.Qty, mr_details.Stocks, mr_details.Remarks, mr_details.Balance FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Floor = mrfloor AND mr_details.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY items.ItemName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_status`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(5000))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO mr_tracker(MR, tDate, Process)
VALUES(imr, idate, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mr_track_details`(IN `mrid` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT tDate, Process FROM mr_tracker WHERE MR = mrid ORDER BY tDate DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mrpending_load`(IN `dateN` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, contractor00.Contractor, type.Type, CountWeekDays(mr.ApproveDate, dateN) as dpending, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Status = 'Open' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' ORDER BY dpending DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mtype_add`(IN itype varchar(500), IN ihead varchar(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO type(Type, UserID) VALUES (itype, ihead);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mtype_delete`(IN `itype` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE type SET deleted = 1 WHERE TypeID = itype;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `mtype_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT type.TypeID, login00.fName, login00.lName, type.Type FROM type LEFT JOIN login00 ON type.UserID = login00.UserID WHERE type.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `no_issue_room_checklist`(IN `ichecklistid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE room_checklist SET Status = 'No Issue', Rectification_Remarks = '', Rectification_Attachment = '' WHERE ChecklistID = ichecklistid;
END$$

BEGIN
UPDATE overtime SET Checked = 'Not Completed', CheckDate = idatetime, CheckedBy = iloginid, CheckRemarks = iremarks, CheckAttachment = iattachment WHERE id = iid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `office_rfp_approve`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `iuser` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp
SET  OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved', OfficeApprovedDate = idate, Process = iprocess, OfficeHeadApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idate, CONCAT('Approved By ', iuser));

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idate, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idate, CONCAT('Approved By ', iuser));

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `office_supply_monthly_average`(IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `iyear` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate, IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) AS total_release 
FROM `for_release_supply_request_details` 
LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request ON for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseID = for_release_supply_request.ReleaseID 
WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate) = iyear AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY YEAR(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate), MONTH(for_release_supply_request.ReleaseDate);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `oldpo_GetFloor`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT Floor FROM old_po_details WHERE PO = ipo AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY Floor;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `oldpo_GetItem`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT old_po_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM old_po_details LEFT JOIN items ON old_po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE old_po_details.PO = ipo AND old_po_details.Floor = ifloor AND old_po_details.Classification = iclassification AND old_po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `overdue_incentive`(IN `iid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE `incentive` 
SET 
    `Overdue`= 1
WHERE 
	`id` = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `override_cancel_apv`(in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Cancelled = 0, Balance = 0 WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `override_cancel_apvid`(IN `iapvid` INT, IN `ireason` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Hold = 0, Cancelled = 0, Override_Cancel = 1, Override_Cancel_By = iloginid, Override_Cancel_Date = idatetime, Override_Cancel_Reason = ireason WHERE id = iapvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `override_cancel_cv`(in icvid int, in ireason varchar(1000), in iloginid int, in idatetime datetime)
BEGIN
UPDATE cv SET Cancelled = 0, Override_Cancel = 1, Override_Cancel_By = iloginid, Override_Cancel_Date = idatetime, Override_Cancel_Reason = ireason WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `override_rfp_accountingapprove`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET AccountingApproved = 'Approved', Cancelled = 0 WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `overwrite_deptsupply_req`(IN iid INT, IN iloginid INT, IN irequestid VARCHAR(50), IN iitemcode INT, IN ibalreq_qty INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE supply_request_details 
SET supply_request_details.Overwritten = 1 
WHERE supply_request_details.id = iid AND supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

UPDATE for_release_supply_request_details 
SET for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty = ibalreq_qty 
WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = irequestid AND for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode AND for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `p_mr_details`(IN `inmr` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, login00.DigitalSignature, employees_check.FirstName AS check_firstname, employees_check.LastName AS check_lastname, login_check.DigitalSignature AS check_digitalsignature, employees_approve.FirstName AS approve_firstname, employees_approve.LastName AS approve_lastname, login_approve.DigitalSignature AS approve_digitalsignature, employees_approval1.FirstName AS approve1_firstname, employees_approval1.LastName AS approve1_lastname, login_approval1.DigitalSignature AS approve1_digitalsignature, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_check ON mr.CheckedID = login_check.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_check ON login_check.EmployeeNo = employees_check.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_approve ON mr.ApprovedID = login_approve.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_approve ON login_approve.EmployeeNo = employees_approve.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS login_approval1 ON mr.Approval1_ID = login_approval1.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS employees_approval1 ON login_approval1.EmployeeNo = employees_approval1.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.MR = inmr ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pay_workers_overtime`(in iid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE overtime SET Pay = 'Approved' WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pdattachment`(IN irfp VARCHAR(1000), IN itype VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM `rfp_docs` WHERE RFP = irfp AND Type = itype AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `peachtree_apv`(in iapvid int)

UPDATE apv SET PT = 1 WHERE id = iapvid; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_approve`(IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(5000), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr
SET  Approved = 'Approved', ApproveDate = idatetime, ApprovedID = iloginid, Transaction = 'For Processing of Purchasing', Area = iarea WHERE MR = imr;

INSERT INTO mr_tracker (MR, tDate, Process) VALUES (imr, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_cancel`(IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ireason` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(5000))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr
SET  Approved = 'Cancelled', ApproveDate = idatetime, Remarks = ireason, ApprovedID = iloginid, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE MR = imr;

INSERT INTO mr_tracker (MR, tDate, Process) VALUES (imr, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, login00.Department 
FROM mr 
LEFT JOIN type on mr.TypeID = type.TypeID 
LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approval1 = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department <> 'EHS';
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_load_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors, login00.Department 
FROM mr 
LEFT JOIN type on mr.TypeID = type.TypeID 
LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID 
LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo 
WHERE mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Pending' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' AND login00.Department = 'EHS'; 
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_release_approval`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE `release`
SET  PMApproved = 'Approved', PMApprovedDate = idatetime, PMID = iloginid, Process = iprocess WHERE RequestNo = irequestno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pma_release_cancel`(IN `itemid` VARCHAR(500), IN `res` VARCHAR(500), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE `release`
SET  PMApproved = 'Cancelled', PMRemarks = res, PMApprovedDate = approvedate, PMID = iloginid, Process = 'Cancelled' WHERE RequestNo = itemid;

UPDATE release_details SET Cancelled = 1 WHERE RequestNo = itemid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pmadetails_load`(IN `mr` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT mr_details.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, mr.ProjectID, items.Attachment FROM mr_details LEFT JOIN items ON mr_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN mr ON mr_details.MR = mr.MR WHERE mr_details.Deleted = 0 AND mr_details.MR = mr ORDER BY mr_details.Floor, items.ItemName;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pmpo_cancel`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `rsn` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET PMApproval = 'Cancelled', PMApprovedDate = approvedate, PMApprovedBy = iloginid, RLTReason = rsn, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE PO = itempo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pmpo_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.PMApproval = 'Pending' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Sales Department' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pmpo_update`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(500), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET  PMApproval = 'Approved', PMApprovedDate = approvedate, PMApprovedBy = iloginid, Transaction = 'For Approval of LCC' WHERE PO = itempo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, approvedate, 'Approved By JRM');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, approvedate, 'For Approval of LCC');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of LCC' WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, approvedate, 'P.O. Approved by JRM');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `po_delete`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ibal` DOUBLE, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `imr_remarks` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE po_details SET Deleted = 1 WHERE id = iid;

UPDATE mr_details SET Balance = ibal WHERE MR = imr AND ItemCode = iitemcode AND Floor = ifloor AND Remarks = imr_remarks;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `po_status`(in ipo varchar(50), in idatetime datetime, in iprocess varchar(5000))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `poedit_add_billing`(IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilabor` INT, IN `iuprice` DOUBLE, IN `idis` DOUBLE, IN `idisa` DOUBLE, IN `inetamount` DOUBLE, IN `iqty` DOUBLE, IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(5000), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po_details(PO, MR, ItemCode, SupplierCode, Floor, Qty, Price, DiscountPercent, DiscountAmount, Total, Balance, ContractorCode, Type, Remarks, Classification, LoginID)
VALUES(ipo, '', ilabor, '0', ifloor, iqty, iuprice, idis, idisa, inetamount, '0', '0', 'Labor', iremarks, iclassification, iloginid);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pototal_amount`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(sum(po_details.Total),0) as ttotal, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(rfp.Amount),0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po_details.PO AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) as rfptotal, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(rfp.HandlingFee),0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po_details.PO AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) as handftotal FROM `po_details` WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `print_dtr_hr`(IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `loginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE dtr_attandance 

SET dtr_attandance.Print_HR = 1 , dtr_attandance.PrintBy_HR = loginid, dtr_attandance.PrintDate_HR = idatetime

WHERE dtr_attandance.Date >= idtfrom AND dtr_attandance.Date <= idtto;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `priority_unit_punchlisting`(in icontrolno varchar(50), in ideadline date)
BEGIN
UPDATE punchlisting SET Priority = 1, Deadline = ideadline WHERE id = icontrolno;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `pullout_validate`(IN iitemcode int)
