END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_create_po_load`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, project.Project, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.PurchasingLoginID = iloginid AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.Status = 'Open' ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_current_mr_load`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.PurchasingLoginID = 0 AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATEDIFF(mr.DateNeeded, idate) <= 30 ORDER BY  mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_edit_po`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iitemcode` INT, IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipo_id` INT, IN `imr_balance` DOUBLE, IN `iqty` DOUBLE, IN `iprice` DOUBLE, IN `idisp` DOUBLE, IN `idisa` DOUBLE, IN `itotal` DOUBLE, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr_details SET  Balance = imr_balance WHERE MR = imr AND ItemCode = iitemcode AND Floor = ifloor;

UPDATE po_details SET Qty = iqty, Price = iprice, DiscountPercent = idisp, DiscountAmount = idisa, Total = itotal, Balance = iqty, DeliveryQty = iqty, Note = inote WHERE id = ipo_id;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_editpo_load`(IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po.PO AND rfp.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.ExecApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfpcount FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode WHERE po.LoginID = iloginid AND po.Deleted = 0 AND po.MR <> '' AND po.RLTApproved <> 'Cancelled' AND po.Approved <> 'Cancelled' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_editpo_load1`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.id, po_details.Floor, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, po_details.Qty, po_details.Price, po_details.DiscountAmount, po_details.Total, po_details.ItemCode, (SELECT mr_details.Balance FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = po_details.MR AND mr_details.ItemCode = po_details.ItemCode AND mr_details.Floor = po_details.Floor) as bal FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode  WHERE po_details.PO = ipo AND po_details.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_floating_mr_load`(IN `idate` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.PurchasingLoginID = 0 AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND DATEDIFF(mr.DateNeeded, idate) > 30 ORDER BY  mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_history_load`(IN `iic` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.Qty, po_details.Price, po_details.DiscountAmount, po_details.Total, po.Date, IFNULL(SUM(po_details.Qty), 0) AS totalqty, supp00.Supplier, supp00.ContactNo, supp00.ContactPer, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM po_details LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po_details.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN po ON po_details.PO = po.PO WHERE po_details.ItemCode = iic AND po_details.SupplierCode <> 0 AND po_details.Deleted = 0 AND po.Approved = 'Approved' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Approved' GROUP BY po_details.PO ORDER BY po.Date DESC LIMIT 5;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_mr_update`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iuser` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr SET PurchasingDate = idate, Transaction = 'For Quotation', PurchasingLoginID = iloginid WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, idate, concat('Process for quotation by ', iuser));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `pur_mrpending`(IN `idate` DATE, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT mr.MR, contractor00.Contractor, type.Type, mr.Area, mr.ApproveDate, CountWeekDays(mr.ApproveDate, idate) as dpending, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM mr LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON mr.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Status = 'Open' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.PurchasingLoginID = iloginid ORDER BY dpending DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `purchasing_cancel_po`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `ireason` VARCHAR(500), IN `iuser` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET RLTApproved = 'Cancelled', Approved = 'Cancelled', RLTApprovedDate = idate, DateApproved = idate, Reason = ireason, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE PO = ipo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idate, CONCAT('Cancelled By ', iuser, '\nReason : ', ireason));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

UPDATE login00 SET Deleted = 0 WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;
END$$

	`Acc_Approval`='Rejected',
	`Remarks`= iremarks
WHERE 
	`APV` = iapv AND
    `Deleted` = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reject_checklist_tradehead`(IN `itradeheadid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ichecklistid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE room_checklist_tradehead SET ForInspection = 0, Inspection_Approval = 'Cancelled', Inspection_ApprovedBy = iloginid, Inspection_ApprovedDate = idatetime, Reject_Remarks = iremarks, Reject_Attachment = iattachment, Status = 'For Rectification (Ongoing)', RejectCount = RejectCount + 1 WHERE id = itradeheadid;

UPDATE room_checklist SET Status = 'For Rectification (Ongoing)' WHERE ChecklistID = ichecklistid;

INSERT INTO checklist_remarks (ChecklistID, DateCreated, LoginID, Status, Remarks, ImageName) VALUES (ichecklistid, idatetime, iloginid, 'Rejected', iremarks, iattachment);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reject_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `ireason` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `irejectby` INT, IN `iuser` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO reject_rfp (RFP, Reason, RejectDate, RejectBy) VALUES (irfp, ireason, idatetime, irejectby);

UPDATE rfp SET Rejected = 1, RejectReason = ireason, RejectDate = idatetime, RejectBy = irejectby WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, CONCAT('Rejected By ', iuser, '\nReason : ', ireason));
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reject_title_req`(IN `ireqid` INT, IN `ititleid` INT, IN `iuserid` INT, IN `icurrdate` DATETIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(1000), IN `irejectedby` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE req_title 
SET 
	Status = 'Rejected', 
    Rejected = 'Rejected', 
    RejectedBy = iuserid, 
    RejectedDate = icurrdate, 
    Remarks = iremarks 
WHERE 
	reqID = ireqid
AND 
	Approve = 'Pending' 
AND 
	Status = 'Pending';
    
INSERT INTO track_title(
    TitleID, 
    Remarks, 
    Status, 
    DateTime)
VALUES(
    ititleid, 
    irejectedby, 
    'Rejected', 
    icurrdate);

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `release_approve_title`(IN `ireqid` INT, IN `ititleid` INT, IN `iuserid` INT, IN `icurrdate` DATETIME, IN `ireleaseby` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE 
	req_title 
SET 
	`Status` = 'Released',
 	`release` = 'Released',
   	releaseBy = iuserid, 
  	releaseDate = icurrdate
   
WHERE 
    reqID = ireqid 
AND 
	Approve = 'Approved';
    
INSERT INTO track_title(
    TitleID, 
    Remarks, 
    Status, 
    DateTime)
VALUES(
    ititleid, 
    ireleaseby, 
    'Released', 
    icurrdate);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `remove_loan_payment`(IN `iloanid` INT, IN `ipayrolldate` DATE)
BEGIN
UPDATE loan_amort SET Payment = 0 WHERE LoanID = iloanid AND Date = ipayrolldate AND Deleted = 0;

UPDATE loans SET Paid = 0 WHERE LoanID = iloanid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `remove_pinned_mr`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE pinned_mr SET Deleted = 1 WHERE MR = imr AND LoginID = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `remove_priority`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE unit_layout SET Priority = 0 WHERE id = iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `remove_priority_unit_punchlisting`(in iid varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE punchlisting SET Priority = 0 WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reple_approve`(idreple varchar(500), approvedate date)
BEGIN
UPDATE replenishment
SET  Approved = 'Approved', ApprovedDate = approvedate
WHERE id = idreple;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reple_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT replenishment.id, replenishment.Min, replenishment.Max, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit FROM replenishment LEFT JOIN items ON replenishment.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE replenishment.Approved = 'Pending' AND replenishment.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `replenish_add`(IN `hic` INT, IN `imin` DOUBLE, IN `imax` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO replenishment(ItemCode, Min, Max) VALUES (hic, imin, imax);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `replenish_delete`(IN `repleid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE replenishment SET Deleted = 1 WHERE id = repleid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `replenish_validate`(IN `hic` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM replenishment WHERE ItemCode = hic AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `replenishment_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT replenishment.*, items.ItemName, items.Description, items.Unit, project.Project, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(boq.Qty), 0) FROM  boq WHERE boq.ProjectID = replenishment.ProjectID AND boq.ItemCode = replenishment.ItemCode AND boq.Approved = 'Approved' AND boq.Deleted = 0) AS boq_qty FROM replenishment LEFT JOIN items ON replenishment.ItemCode = items.ItemCode LEFT JOIN project ON replenishment.ProjectID = project.ProjectID WHERE replenishment.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reprint_load`(IN `itype` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, type.Type AS Trade, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN mr ON po.MR = mr.MR LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.LoginID <> 68 AND po.Type = itype AND po.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reprint_rfp_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE Type = 'Construction' ORDER BY RFP;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reset_account_others`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ipassword` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE `login00_others` SET `password`= ipassword WHERE UserID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `reset_soa`(in isalesid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE collection_amort SET Deleted = 1 WHERE SalesID = isalesid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `return_apv_balance`(in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Balance = Amount WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `return_title`(IN `ireqid` INT, IN `ititleid` INT, IN `iuserid` INT, IN `icurrdate` DATETIME, IN `ireturn` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ireturnby` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE 
	req_title 
SET 
    Status = ireturn,
 	`return` = ireturn, 
    returnDate = icurrdate
WHERE 
    reqID = ireqid;

INSERT INTO track_title(
	TitleID, 
    Remarks, 
    Status, 
    DateTime)
VALUES(
    ititleid,
    ireturnby,
    ireturn,
    icurrdate
    );
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `returnokay`(in iid int, in idatetime datetime)
BEGIN
UPDATE exit_request SET ActualReturn = idatetime WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rfp_approve_head`(IN `itemrfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), in iloginid int, in ilogin_name varchar(100))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp  LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.OfficeHeadApproved = 'Approved', rfp.OfficeApprovedDate = approvedate, rfp.OfficeHeadApprovedBy = iloginid, rfp.Process = 'For Approval of RLT', mr.Transaction = 'RFP For Approval of RLT' WHERE rfp.RFP = itemrfp;

CALL mr_status(imr, approvedate, CONCAT('RFP Approved by ', ilogin_name));

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, CONCAT('RFP Approved By ', ilogin_name));

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, 'RFP For Approval of RLT');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, CONCAT('RFP Approved By ', ilogin_name));

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, 'For Approval of RLT');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rfp_balance`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po.HandlingFee, (SELECT SUM(Total) FROM po_details WHERE po_details.PO = po.PO AND Deleted = 0) as poamount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(Amount), 0) from rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po.PO AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfpamount, (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(HandlingFee), 0) FROM rfp WHERE rfp.PO = po.PO AND rfp.Cancelled = 0) AS rfphandf FROM po WHERE po.PO = ipo AND po.Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rfp_details`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT rfp.*,(SELECT SUM(rfp.Amount) FROM rfp WHERE po = ipo) as totalamount, (SELECT sum(rfp.HandlingFee) FROM rfp WHERE po = ipo) as totalhandf, (SELECT sum(rfp.InstallationFee) FROM rfp WHERE po = ipo) as installationfeetotal, SUM(po_details.Total) as pototal, po.HandlingFee as pohandfee, po.Discount, po.SupplierCode FROM rfp LEFT JOIN po_details on rfp.PO = po_details.PO LEFT JOIN po on rfp.po = po.PO WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rfp_status`(in irfp varchar(50), in idatetime datetime, in iprocess varchar(5000))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rpo_cancel`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `rsn` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET RLTApproved = 'Cancelled', RLTApprovedDate = approvedate, RLTReason = rsn, Transaction = 'Cancelled' WHERE PO = itempo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rpo_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT po.*, supp00.Supplier, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM po LEFT JOIN supp00 ON po.SupplierCode = supp00.SupplierCode LEFT JOIN login00 ON po.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE po.PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Approved' AND po.RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND po.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Purchasing Department' ORDER BY po.Date DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rpo_load1`(IN `ipo1` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT po_details.*, items.Unit, items.ItemName, items.Description FROM po_details LEFT JOIN items ON po_details.ItemCode = items.ItemCode WHERE po_details.PO = ipo1 AND po_details.Deleted = 0 ORDER BY po_details.Floor, items.ItemName;
end$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rpo_update`(IN `itempo` VARCHAR(500), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET  RLTApproved = 'Approved', RLTApprovedDate = approvedate, Transaction = 'For Approval of HVY' WHERE PO = itempo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, approvedate, 'Approved By RLT');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itempo, approvedate, 'For Approval of HVY');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of HVY' WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, approvedate, 'P.O. Approved by RLT');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rrfp_load`()
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM rfp WHERE RLTApproved = 'Pending' AND Type = 'Construction' AND Cancelled = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `rrfp_update`(IN `itemrfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `approvedate` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp  LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.RLTApproved = 'Approved', rfp.RLTApprovedDate = approvedate, rfp.Process = 'For Approval of HVY', mr.Transaction = 'RFP For Approval of HVY' WHERE rfp.RFP = itemrfp;

CALL mr_status(imr, approvedate, 'RFP Approved by RLT');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, 'RFP Approved By RLT');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, approvedate, 'RFP For Approval of HVY');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, 'RFP Approved by RLT');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (itemrfp, approvedate, 'For Approval of HVY');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_backtrack_billing`(IN `PONumber` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` INT, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `itrade` INT, IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po(PO, MR, SupplierCode, Date, Terms, Vatable, Transaction, Discount, Type, Note, LoginID, RLTApproved, Approved, Status2, TypeID, Subject, Attachment, ProjectID)
VALUES (PONumber, imr, isupp, idatetime, iterms, ivat, 'For Approval of RLT', idiscount, 'Labor', inote, iloginid, 'Approved', 'Approved', 'Backtrack', itrade, isubject, iattachment, iprojectid);

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_backtrack_po`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupplier` INT, IN `ivat` BIT, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `ihandlingfee` DOUBLE, IN `ipodate` DATE, IN `iprojectid` INT)

VALUES (ipo, isupplier, ipodate, iterms, idays, ihandlingfee, ivat, 'Backtrack', idiscount, 'Material', iloginid, 'Approved', 'Approved', 'Backtrack', iremarks, iprojectid);

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_billing`(IN `PONumber` VARCHAR(50), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `itrade` INT, IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po(PO, MR, SupplierCode, Date, Terms, Vatable, Transaction, Discount, Type, Note, Subject, LoginID, Attachment, TypeID, ProjectID)
VALUES (PONumber, imr, isupp, idatetime, iterms, ivat, 'For Approval of Head', idiscount, 'Labor', inote, isubject, iloginid, iattachment, itrade, iprojectid);

UPDATE po_details SET PO = PONumber, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND PO = '' AND Type = 'Labor' AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (PONumber, idatetime, 'Created');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (PONumber, idatetime, 'For Approval of Head');
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_billing_podetails`(IN `PONumber` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `icode` INT, IN `iqty` DOUBLE, IN `iuprice` DOUBLE, IN `idp` DOUBLE, IN `ida` DOUBLE, IN `ina` DOUBLE, IN `isupp` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(5000), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po_details(PO, MR, ItemCode, SupplierCode, Floor, Qty, Price, DiscountPercent, DiscountAmount, Total, Balance, ContractorCode, Type, Remarks, Classification) VALUES(PONumber, '', icode, isupp, ifloor, iqty, iuprice, idp, ida, ina, 0, 0, 'Labor', iremarks, iclassification);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_billing_purchasing_head`(IN `PONumber` VARCHAR(50), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `itrade` INT, IN `iprojectid` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po(PO, MR, SupplierCode, Date, Terms, Vatable, Transaction, Discount, Type, Note, Subject, LoginID, Attachment, TypeID, ProjectID, PurchasingHead_Approval)
VALUES (PONumber, imr, isupp, idatetime, iterms, ivat, 'For Approval of RLT', idiscount, 'Labor', inote, isubject, iloginid, iattachment, itrade, iprojectid, 'Approved');

UPDATE po_details SET PO = PONumber, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND PO = '' AND Type = 'Labor' AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (PONumber, idatetime, 'Created');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (PONumber, idatetime, 'For Approval of RLT');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipicture` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilastname` VARCHAR(100), IN `ifirstname` VARCHAR(100), IN `imiddlename` VARCHAR(100), IN `icontactno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihomeaddress` VARCHAR(2000), IN `isex` VARCHAR(10), IN `idatehired` DATE, IN `isss` VARCHAR(50), IN `itin` VARCHAR(50), IN `iphilhealth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iemergencyname` VARCHAR(100), IN `iemergencycontactno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(100), IN `ibirthdate` DATE, IN `irate` VARCHAR(100), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(100), IN `iposition` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaccountno` VARCHAR(100), IN `ibasic` DOUBLE, IN `iecola` DOUBLE, IN `iallowance` DOUBLE, IN `ilevel` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibank` VARCHAR(100), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(100), IN `iroh_from` TIME, IN `iroh_to` TIME, IN `imorning_hdoh_from` TIME, IN `imorning_hdoh_to` TIME, IN `iafternoon_hdoh_from` TIME, IN `iafternoon_hdoh_to` TIME, IN `isat_sched` VARCHAR(50), IN `isoh_from` TIME, IN `isoh_to` TIME, IN `ieoc` DATE, IN `ideductlate` INT, IN `irestday` VARCHAR(200), IN `ideductabsent` INT, IN `ideductgovtcontri` INT, IN `ideducttax` INT, IN `icompleterequirements` INT, IN `ihdmf` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihmo` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipolicyno` VARCHAR(100), IN `isupervisor` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO employees (EmployeeNo, Picture, LastName, FirstName, MiddleName, ContactNo, HomeAddress, Sex, Birthdate, DateHired, SSS, TIN, Philhealth, Emergency_Name, Emergency_ContactNo, Department, Classification, Rate, Status, Position, AccountNo, Basic, Ecola, Allowance, Level, Bank, Email, roh_from, roh_to, hdoh_morning_from, hdoh_morning_to, hdoh_afternoon_from, hdoh_afternoon_to, saturday_schedule, soh_from, soh_to, EOC, DeductLate, RestDay, DeductAbsent, DeductGovtContri, DeductTax, CompleteRequirements, HDMF, HMO, PolicyNo, Supervisor) VALUES (iemployeeno, ipicture, ilastname, ifirstname, imiddlename, icontactno, ihomeaddress, isex, ibirthdate, idatehired, isss, itin, iphilhealth, iemergencyname, iemergencycontactno, idepartment, iclassification, irate, istatus, iposition, iaccountno, ibasic, iecola, iallowance, ilevel, ibank, iemail, iroh_from, iroh_to, imorning_hdoh_from, imorning_hdoh_to, iafternoon_hdoh_from, iafternoon_hdoh_to, isat_sched, isoh_from, isoh_to, ieoc, ideductlate, irestday, ideductabsent, ideductgovtcontri, ideducttax, icompleterequirements, ihdmf, ihmo, ipolicyno, isupervisor);

INSERT INTO employment_history (EmployeeNo, Status, Date, Position, Basic, Allowance) VALUES (iemployeeno, 'Hired', idatehired, iposition, ibasic, iallowance);
END$$

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_estimated_amount`(IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `icatid` INT, IN `icbid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE contractor_billing_details SET CatEstimate_Amount = iamount WHERE id = icatid and Deleted =0;
SELECT contractor_billing_details.*, SUM(CatEstimate_Amount) as total_amount FROM contractor_billing_details WHERE CBID = icbid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_estimated_contractor_billing`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `icbid` INT, IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `itotal` DOUBLE, IN `imobilization` DOUBLE, IN `istatus` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE `contractor_billing` SET Estimated = 1, EstimatedBy = iloginid, EstimatedDate = idate, EstimatedAmount = itotal, MobilizationAmount = imobilization, Status = istatus WHERE CBID = icbid AND Deleted = 0;
end$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_final_conbill`(IN `icbid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `icontractor` INT, IN `icontnumber` VARCHAR(50), IN `icontamount` DOUBLE, IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `idp_percent` DOUBLE, IN `idp_amount` DOUBLE, IN `iretention` DOUBLE, IN `istatus` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE `contractor_billing` SET Contractor = icontractor, ContractNumber = icontnumber, DP_Percent = idp_percent, DP_Amount = idp_amount, Ret_Percent = iretention, Finalized = 1, FinalizedBy = iloginid, FinalizedDate = idate, ContractAmount = icontamount, Status = istatus WHERE CBID = icbid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

    NO SQL

INSERT INTO floor_layout (Floor, Picture, ProjectID)

VALUES (ifloor, iattachment, iproject);

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_health`(IN `iloginid` INT, IN `ifever` INT, IN `ifatigue` INT, IN `icough` INT, IN `isneezing` INT, IN `iaches` INT, IN `irunny` INT, IN `isorethroat` INT, IN `idiarrhea` INT, IN `iheadaches` INT, IN `ishortness` INT, IN `isymptoms` INT, IN `ipositive` INT, IN `itravel` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `icause` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO health (LoginID, Fever, Fatigue, Cough, Sneezing, Aches, Runny, SoreThroat, Diarrhea, Headaches, Shortness, Symptoms, Positive, Travel, DateSubmitted, Cause) VALUES (iloginid, ifever, ifatigue, icough, isneezing, iaches, irunny, isorethroat, idiarrhea, iheadaches, ishortness, isymptoms, ipositive, itravel, idatetime, icause);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_healthdeclaration`(IN `ifullname` VARCHAR(500), IN `icontactno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iaddress` VARCHAR(1000), IN `itemp` DOUBLE, IN `ifever` INT, IN `ifatigue` INT, IN `icough` INT, IN `isneezing` INT, IN `iaches` INT, IN `irunny` INT, IN `isorethroat` INT, IN `idiarrhea` INT, IN `iheadaches` INT, IN `ishortness` INT, IN `isymptoms` INT, IN `ipositive` INT, IN `itravel` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO healthdeclaration (FullName, ContactNo, Address, Temp, Fever, Fatigue, Cough, Sneezing, Aches, Runny, SoreThroat, Diarrhea, Headaches, Shortness, Symptoms, Positive, Travel, DateSubmitted) VALUES (ifullname, icontactno, iaddress, itemp, ifever, ifatigue, icough, isneezing, iaches, irunny, isorethroat, idiarrhea, iheadaches, ishortness, isymptoms, ipositive, itravel, idatetime);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_item_retrification`(IN `itemidd` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

INSERT INTO checklist_item_status_monitoring (ItemID, DateCreated, LoginID, CheckItemStatus, Remarks) 

VALUES(itemidd, idatetime, iloginid, "For Retrification", iremarks);

UPDATE unit_checklist_item_monitoring SET ApprovalStatus = "Pending", ApprovedBy = iloginid, ApprovedDate = idatetime, ItemStatus = "Punchlisting" WHERE id = itemidd;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_item_status_monitoring`(IN `iitemiid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `istat` VARCHAR(50), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

INSERT INTO checklist_item_status_monitoring (ItemID, DateCreated, LoginID, CheckItemStatus, Remarks, Attachment) 

VALUES(iitemiid, idatetime, iloginid, istat, iremarks, iattachment);

UPDATE unit_checklist_item_monitoring SET ItemStatus = istat WHERE id = iitemiid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_liquidation2`(IN `iliquidation` VARCHAR(50), IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatecreated` DATETIME, IN `iexpense` DOUBLE, IN `iuserid` INT, IN `iattachment` TEXT, IN `iusertypeid` INT, IN `ihead` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireimbursement` DOUBLE, IN `itreasury_approval` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN 
INSERT INTO liquidation (Liquidation, RFP, DateCreated, ActualExpense, LoginID, UserTypeID, Attachment, OfficeHeadApproved, Process, Reimbursement, TreasuryApproved) VALUES (iliquidation, irfp, idatecreated, iexpense, iuserid, iusertypeid, iattachment, ihead, iprocess, ireimbursement, itreasury_approval); 

UPDATE liquidation_details SET Liquidation = iliquidation WHERE RFP = irfp AND `User` = iuserid;

UPDATE rfp SET Process = iprocess WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatecreated, 'Liquidated');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_liquidation_sdh`(IN `iliquidation` VARCHAR(50), IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatecreated` DATETIME, IN `iexpense` DOUBLE, IN `iuserid` INT, IN `iattachment` TEXT, IN `iusertypeid` INT, IN `ihead` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireimbursement` DOUBLE, IN `itreasury_approval` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN 
INSERT INTO liquidation (Liquidation, RFP, DateCreated, ActualExpense, LoginID, UserTypeID, Attachment, OfficeHeadApproved, Process, Reimbursement, TreasuryApproved, SSDApproval) VALUES (iliquidation, irfp, idatecreated, iexpense, iuserid, iusertypeid, iattachment, ihead, iprocess, ireimbursement, itreasury_approval, 'Approved');

UPDATE liquidation_details SET Liquidation = iliquidation WHERE RFP = irfp AND `User` = iuserid;

UPDATE rfp SET Process = iprocess WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatecreated, 'Liquidated');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_lqd_pcr`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipcr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iactualexpense` DOUBLE, IN `ichange` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO liquidation_petty_cash (id, PCR, DateCreated, LoginID, Attachment, ActualExpense, pChange, Process) VALUES (iid, ipcr, idatetime, iloginid, iattachment, iactualexpense, ichange, 'For Approval of Head/Supervisor');

UPDATE liquidation_petty_cash_details SET LQD = iid WHERE PCR = ipcr;

UPDATE petty_cash SET Liquidated = 1, DateLiquidated = idatetime, Process = 'For Approval of Head/Supervisor' WHERE PCR = ipcr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_lqd_pcr_head`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipcr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iactualexpense` DOUBLE, IN `ichange` DOUBLE, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(100))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO liquidation_petty_cash (id, PCR, DateCreated, LoginID, Attachment, ActualExpense, pChange, HeadApproved, Process) VALUES (iid, ipcr, idatetime, iloginid, iattachment, iactualexpense, ichange, 'Approved', iprocess);

UPDATE liquidation_petty_cash_details SET LQD = iid WHERE PCR = ipcr AND Deleted = 0;

UPDATE petty_cash SET Liquidated = 1, DateLiquidated = idatetime, Process = iprocess WHERE PCR = ipcr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_office_rfp`(IN `ict` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipart` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE, IN `imopr` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idc` DATETIME, IN `idept` VARCHAR(500), IN `itpye` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iusertypeid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `ivat` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(3000), IN `ipayrolltype` VARCHAR(500), IN `iewt` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifbads` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO rfp(RFP, DateCreated, Particulars, DateRequired, PaymentMode, Payee, Amount, Vatable, Type, ChargeTo, Department, Type2, Process, Attachment, UserTypeID, LoginID, Remarks, PayrollType, EWT, FB_Ads)
VALUES(irfp, idc, ipart, idate, imopr, ipayee, iamount, ivat, 'Office', ict, idept, itpye, iprocess, iattachment, iusertypeid, iloginid, inote, ipayrolltype, iewt, ifbads);

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_old_mr_details`(IN `imrnum` VARCHAR(500), IN `iitemcode` BIGINT(20), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(50), IN `istocks` DOUBLE, IN `iqty` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance` DOUBLE, IN `icontractorcode` VARCHAR(100), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_old_po`(IN `ipo_id` INT(11), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT(11), IN `isuppliercode` INT(11), IN `idate` DATETIME, IN `ideliverydate` DATE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idays` INT(11), IN `ihandlingfee` DOUBLE, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `ivatable` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `inote` VARCHAR(500), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(50), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach1` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach2` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach3` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach4` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach5` VARCHAR(500), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `itypeid` INT(11), IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO old_po(po_ID, PO, MR, ProjectID, SupplierCode, Date, DeliveryDate, Terms, Days, HandlingFee, Discount, Vatable, LoginID, Type, Note, Subject, ChargeTo, Remarks, Attachment_MR, Attachment_CanvasSheet, Attachment_Quotation, Attachment_Evaluation, Attachment_FloorPlan, Area, TypeID, InstallationFee) VALUES (ipo_id, ipo, imr, iprojectid, isuppliercode, idate, ideliverydate ,iterms, idays, ihandlingfee, idiscount, ivatable, iloginid, itype, inote, isubject, ichargeto, iremarks, iattach1, iattach2, iattach3, iattach4, iattach5, iarea, itypeid, iinstallationfee);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_old_po_details`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iitemcode` INT(20), IN `isuppliercode` INT(20), IN `ifloor` VARCHAR(500), IN `iqty` DOUBLE, IN `iprice` DOUBLE, IN `idiscountpercent` DOUBLE, IN `idiscountamount` DOUBLE, IN `itotal` DOUBLE, IN `icontractorcode` INT(20), IN `itype` VARCHAR(500), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(500), IN `imrremarks` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO old_po_details(PO, MR, ItemCode, SupplierCode, Floor, Qty, Price, DiscountPercent, DiscountAmount, Total, ContractorCode, Type, Remarks, Classification, Note, MR_Remarks) VALUES (ipo, imr, iitemcode, isuppliercode, ifloor, iqty ,iprice, idiscountpercent, idiscountamount, itotal, icontractorcode, itype, iremarks, iclassification, inote, imrremarks);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_old_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatecreated` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT(11), IN `ideadline` DATE, IN `iparticulars` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idaterequired` DATE, IN `ipaymentmode` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `ivendor` VARCHAR(500), IN `isi` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `ihandlingfee` DOUBLE, IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(3000), IN `ivatable` VARCHAR(50), IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(50), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `inote` VARCHAR(3000))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO old_rfp(RFP, DateCreated, MR, PO, Terms, Days, Deadline, Particulars, DateRequired, PaymentMode, Payee, Vendor, SI, Amount, HandlingFee, InstallationFee, Remarks, Vatable, ChargeTo, Attachment, Note) VALUES (irfp, idatecreated, imr, ipo, iterms, idays ,ideadline, iparticulars, idaterequired, ipaymentmode, ipayee, ivendor, isi, iamount, ihandlingfee, iinstallationfee, iremarks, ivatable, ichargeto, iattachment, inote);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_ongoing_schedule_maintenance_request`(IN `icompletiondate` DATE, IN `irequestid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE maintenance_request SET CompletionDate = icompletiondate, Status = 'OnGoing' WHERE RequestID = irequestid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_other_po`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupplier` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ideliverydate` DATE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `ivat` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `itransaction` VARCHAR(500), IN `ihandlingfee` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po (PO, SupplierCode, Date, DeliveryDate, Terms, Days, Vatable, Transaction, Type, Discount, Note, LoginID, ChargeTo, Attachment, Area, HandlingFee)
VALUES (ipo, isupplier, idatetime, ideliverydate, iterms, idays, ivat, itransaction, 'Others', idiscount, inote, iloginid, ichargeto, iattachment, iarea, ihandlingfee);

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier WHERE PO = '' AND LoginID = iloginid AND Type = 'Others' AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'Created');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, itransaction);

INSERT INTO schedule_delivery(PO, DeliveryDate, Remarks)
VALUES(ipo, ideliverydate, '');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_pickup_openhouse`(IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ifullname` VARCHAR(500), IN `imobile` VARCHAR(50), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(500), IN `icount` INT(11), IN `idate` DATE, IN `itime` TIME, IN `iagentid` INT, IN `imodetransport` VARCHAR(100), IN `iunavailabletime` INT, IN `ipickuptime` TIME, IN `ipickuppoint` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO openhouse (DateCreated, FullName, Mobile, Email, Companions, Date, Time, AgentID, ModeTransport, UnavilableTime, PickupTime, PickupPoint) VALUES (idatetime, ifullname, imobile, iemail, icount, idate, itime, iagentid, imodetransport, iunavailabletime, ipickuptime, ipickuppoint);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_po`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupp` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ideliverydate` DATE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idays` INT, IN `ihf` DOUBLE, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `idis` DOUBLE, IN `isub` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_mr` TEXT, IN `iattach_canvas` TEXT, IN `iattach_quotation` TEXT, IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(50), IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprojectid` INT, IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po(PO, MR, SupplierCode, Date, DeliveryDate, Terms, Days, HandlingFee, Vatable, Transaction, Discount, Subject, LoginID, Remarks, ChargeTo, Attachment_MR, Attachment_CanvasSheet, Attachment_Quotation, Type, Area, ProjectID, InstallationFee)
VALUES (ipo, imr, isupp, idatetime, ideliverydate, iterms, idays, ihf, ivat, 'For Approval of Head', idis, isub, iloginid, iremarks, ichargeto, iattach_mr, iattach_canvas, iattach_quotation, itype, iarea, iprojectid, iinstallationfee);

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE MR = imr AND PO = '' AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'Created');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of Head');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of Purchasing Head' WHERE MR = imr;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Closed' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) = 0;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Open' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) > 0;

INSERT INTO schedule_delivery(PO, DeliveryDate, Remarks)
VALUES(ipo, ideliverydate, '');

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, 'Made a Purchase Order');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_po_details`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupp` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po_details
SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp
WHERE MR = imr AND PO = '' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_po_purchasing_head`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupp` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ideliverydate` DATE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idays` INT, IN `ihf` DOUBLE, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `idis` DOUBLE, IN `isub` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_mr` TEXT, IN `iattach_canvas` TEXT, IN `iattach_quotation` TEXT, IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(50), IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprojectid` INT, IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO po(PO, MR, SupplierCode, Date, DeliveryDate, Terms, Days, HandlingFee, Vatable, Transaction, Discount, Subject, LoginID, Remarks, ChargeTo, Attachment_MR, Attachment_CanvasSheet, Attachment_Quotation, Type, Area, ProjectID, InstallationFee, PurchasingHead_Approval)
VALUES (ipo, imr, isupp, idatetime, ideliverydate, iterms, idays, ihf, ivat, 'For Approval of RLT', idis, isub, iloginid, iremarks, ichargeto, iattach_mr, iattach_canvas, iattach_quotation, itype, iarea, iprojectid, iinstallationfee, 'Approved');

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE MR = imr AND PO = '' AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'Created');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of RLT');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of RLT' WHERE MR = imr;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Closed' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) = 0;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Open' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) > 0;

INSERT INTO schedule_delivery(PO, DeliveryDate, Remarks)
VALUES(ipo, ideliverydate, '');

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, 'Made a Purchase Order');
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_replenishment_rfp`(IN `ict` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipart` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idate` DATE, IN `imopr` VARCHAR(100), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idc` DATETIME, IN `idept` VARCHAR(100), IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iusertypeid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `ivat` VARCHAR(50), IN `inote` VARCHAR(3000), IN `ipettycash` TEXT)

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idc, 'Created');

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_reservation`(IN `iClientID` INT, IN `iUnitID` VARCHAR(15), IN `iReservationDate` DATE, IN `iReservationFee` DOUBLE, IN `iUnitPrice` DOUBLE, IN `iHotelFinishing` VARCHAR(500), IN `iAutoDiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iPromoDiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iAddtlDiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iDiscountName` VARCHAR(500), IN `iPaymentsMade` DOUBLE, IN `iDocsFee` DOUBLE, IN `iApplyDocsFee` VARCHAR(50), IN `iSpotDate` DATE, IN `iSpotDPPercent` DOUBLE, IN `iSpotAmount` DOUBLE, IN `iSpotTransfee` DOUBLE, IN `iSpotVAT` DOUBLE, IN `iSpotDiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iDiscountAmount` DOUBLE, IN `iApplySpotDiscount` VARCHAR(50), IN `iTransMiscFee` DOUBLE, IN `iVAT` DOUBLE, IN `iTotal` DOUBLE, IN `idatecreated` DATETIME, IN `ipm_promodiscount` DOUBLE, IN `ipm_vat` DOUBLE, IN `ipm_transfer` DOUBLE, IN `iapply_promo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iapply_addtl` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN 

INSERT INTO sale00 (DateCreated, ClientID, UnitID, ReservationDate, ReservationFee, UnitPrice, HotelFinishing, AutoDiscount, PromoDiscount, AddtlDiscount, DiscountName, PaymentsMade, DocsFee, ApplyDocsFee, SpotDate, SpotDPPercent, SpotAmount, SpotTransfee, SpotVAT, SpotDiscount, DiscountAmount, ApplySpotDiscount, TransMiscFee, VAT, Total, PM_PromoDiscount, PM_VAT, PM_Transfer, Apply_PromoDiscount, Apply_AddtlDiscount, ProjectID)

VALUES (idatecreated, iClientID, iUnitID, iReservationDate, iReservationFee, iUnitPrice, iHotelFinishing, iAutoDiscount, iPromoDiscount, iAddtlDiscount, iDiscountName, iPaymentsMade, iDocsFee, iApplyDocsFee, iSpotDate, iSpotDPPercent, iSpotAmount, iSpotTransfee, iSpotVAT, iSpotDiscount, iDiscountAmount, iApplySpotDiscount, iTransMiscFee, iVAT, iTotal, ipm_promodiscount, ipm_vat, ipm_transfer, iapply_promo, iapply_addtl, iprojectid);

UPDATE unit_layout SET Available = 0 WHERE UnitID = iUnitID;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_retrification`(IN `ichecklistid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

INSERT INTO checklist_status_monitoring (ChecklistID, DateCreated, LoginID, ChecklistStatus, Remarks) 

VALUES(ichecklistid, idatetime, iloginid, "For Retrification", iremarks);

UPDATE unit_checklist_monitoring SET ApprovalStatus = "Pending", ApprovedBy = iloginid, ApprovedDate = idatetime, CheckStatus = "Punchlisting" WHERE id = ichecklistid;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idc` DATETIME, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `iparti` VARCHAR(500), IN `idr` DATE, IN `ipom` VARCHAR(100), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `isi` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `ihadf` DOUBLE, IN `ivat` VARCHAR(500), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(3000), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ivendor` VARCHAR(500), IN `ideadline` DATE, IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE, IN `iuser` VARCHAR(100), IN `iewt` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihead_approval` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO rfp(RFP, DateCreated, MR, PO, Terms, Days, Deadline, Particulars, DateRequired, PaymentMode, Payee, SI, Amount, HandlingFee, Vatable, Remarks, Type, ChargeTo, LoginID, Process, Attachment, Vendor, InstallationFee, EWT, OfficeHeadApproved)
VALUES(irfp, idc, imr, ipo, iterms, idays, ideadline, iparti, idr, ipom, ipayee, isi, iamount, ihadf, ivat, iremarks, 'Construction', ichargeto, iloginid, iprocess, iattachment, ivendor, iinstallationfee, iewt, ihead_approval);

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = iprocess WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, idc, 'Made a RFP');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idc, CONCAT('RFP Created By ', iuser));

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idc, iprocess);

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idc, 'Created');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idc, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_suppy_mr_create`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iapprove` VARCHAR(50), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
INSERT INTO mr (MR, DateCreated, LoginID, TradeHeadApproved, Class, Area, Attachment, Transaction) VALUES (imr, idatetime, iloginid, iapprove, 'Office', iremarks, iattachment, istatus);

UPDATE mr_details SET MR = imr WHERE MR = "" AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO mr_tracker (MR, tDate, Process) VALUES (imr, idatetime, 'Created');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_suppy_mr_request`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(50), IN `iloginid` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE supply_request SET MR = imr , iStatus = 'Requested', ApprovedBy = iloginid, ApprovedDate = idatetime WHERE RequestID = irequestid  AND Deleted = 0;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `save_tr_titleCopy`(IN `itr_reqid` INT, IN `itr_titleid` INT, IN `ifiles_str` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iproject` VARCHAR(50), IN `icurrdate` DATETIME, IN `iusername` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE req_title SET Attachment = ifiles_str, Status = 'Title Transferred' WHERE reqID = itr_reqid AND TitleID = itr_titleid;

INSERT INTO track_title(
    TitleID, 
    Remarks,
    `Status`,
    `DateTime`
	) 
VALUES (
 	itr_titleid,
    iusername,
    'Title Transferred',
    icurrdate
);

UPDATE titles SET available = 1 WHERE ProjectID = iproject AND TitleID = itr_titleid;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `select_div`()
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (login00.Position2 = "SD" OR UserID  = 117 AND SSD = 98) AND login00.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Active = 1;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `select_div_inactive`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (login00.Position2 = "SD" OR login00.Position2 = 'BS') AND login00.SSD = 98;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `select_div_sales`()
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (login00.Position2 = "SD" OR login00.Position2 = 'BS') AND login00.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Active = 1 ;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `select_div_sales_head`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, (SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(dtr_attandance.id), 0) FROM dtr_attandance WHERE dtr_attandance.UserID = login00.UserID AND dtr_attandance.SalesApproval = "APPROVED" AND dtr_attandance.SalesHApproval = "PENDING" AND dtr_attandance.Deleted = 0) AS countApproval FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = login00.EmployeeNo WHERE login00.Position2 = "SD" AND login00.Deleted = 0 AND employees.Active = 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `select_div_sales_inactive`()
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SELECT login00.*, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM login00 LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE (login00.Position2 = "SD" OR login00.Position2 = 'BS');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `supply_request_release_sum`(IN `irequestid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT 
`supply_request_details`.`LoginID` as receiver,
(SELECT SUM(Request_Qty) FROM `supply_request_details` WHERE RequestID = irequestid AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY RequestID) AS tRequestQty, 
(SELECT SUM(ReleaseQty) FROM `for_release_supply_request_details` WHERE RequestID = irequestid AND Deleted = 0 GROUP BY RequestID) AS tReleaseQty
FROM `supply_request_details`
LEFT JOIN for_release_supply_request_details ON for_release_supply_request_details.RequestID = supply_request_details.RequestID
WHERE `supply_request_details`.RequestID = irequestid AND `supply_request_details`.Deleted = 0 GROUP BY `supply_request_details`.RequestID;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `tag_rfp_complete`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `iapv` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET Process = 'Complete', Reimbursement = 0, CompleteRequirements = 1, WithOriginalDocs = 'Yes', ForLiquidation = 0, Liquidated = 0 WHERE RFP = irfp;

UPDATE `apv` SET CompleteRequirements = 1, WithOriginalDocs = 'Yes' WHERE APV = iapv;

DELETE FROM liquidation	WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `tag_rfp_liquidaiton`(in irfp varchar(50), in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET Reimbursement = 0, CompleteRequirements = 0, WithOriginalDocs = 'Yes', ForLiquidation = 1, Liquidated = 0 WHERE RFP = irfp;

UPDATE `apv` SET CompleteRequirements = 0, WithOriginalDocs = 'Yes' WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `tag_rfp_only_complete`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET Process = 'Complete', Reimbursement = 0, CompleteRequirements = 1, WithOriginalDocs = 'Yes', ForLiquidation = 0, Liquidated = 0 WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `tag_rfp_pending_docs`(in irfp varchar(50), in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET Reimbursement = 0, CompleteRequirements = 1, WithOriginalDocs = 'No', ForLiquidation = 0, Liquidated = 0, Released = 1 WHERE RFP = irfp;

DELETE FROM liquidation WHERE RFP = irfp;

update `apv` set CompleteRequirements = 1, WithOriginalDocs = 'No' WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

SELECT * FROM temp_billing WHERE Purchasing = ulog;
END$$

    NO SQL
BEGIN

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(for_release_supply_request_details.ReleaseQty), 0) AS total_withdraw FROM for_release_supply_request_details WHERE for_release_supply_request_details.ItemCode = iitemcode and for_release_supply_request_details.Deleted = 0;

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `transfer_mr_approve_load`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
SELECT mr.*, type.Type, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName, purchasing_employees.FirstName AS purchasing_firstname, purchasing_employees.LastName AS purchasing_lastname, (SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(contractor00.Contractor) FROM contractor00 WHERE FIND_IN_SET(contractor00.ContractorCode, mr.ContractorCode)) AS contractors FROM mr LEFT JOIN type ON mr.TypeID = type.TypeID LEFT JOIN project ON mr.ProjectID = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON mr.LoginID = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo LEFT JOIN login00 AS purchasing_login ON mr.PurchasingLoginID = purchasing_login.UserID LEFT JOIN employees AS purchasing_employees ON purchasing_login.EmployeeNo = purchasing_employees.EmployeeNo WHERE purchasing_employees.EmployeeNo = iemployeeno AND mr.Approved = 'Approved' AND mr.TradeHeadApproved = 'Approved' AND mr.Status = 'Open' AND mr.Deleted = 0 AND mr.Class = 'Construction' ORDER BY mr.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `transmit_apv`(in iid int, in iloginid int, in idatetime datetime)
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Transmitted = 1, TransmitBy = iloginid, TransmitDate = idatetime WHERE id = iid;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `unrelease_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.Process = 'For Cash/Check Release', rfp.Released = 0, mr.Transaction = 'For Cash/Check Release' WHERE rfp.RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'For Cash/Check Release');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

UPDATE cv SET Released = 0 WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$

    NO SQL
BEGIN
UPDATE sss_contribution SET SalaryFrom = ifrom, SalaryTo = ito, EEShare = ieeshare, ERShare = iershare, WISP_EE = iwispee, WISP_ER = iwisper, EC_EE = iecee, EC_ER = iecer WHERE id = iid;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `updateSupply_details`(IN `ireq` VARCHAR(500), IN `oldreqid` VARCHAR(500))
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE supply_request SET RequestID = ireq WHERE RequestID = oldreqid;


END$$

    NO SQL
BEGIN

BEGIN

UPDATE apv_credit SET  APV = iapv WHERE APVID = iapvid;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_billing`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iattach_quotation` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_evaluation` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_floorplan` VARCHAR(500), IN `itrade` INT, IN `ioldpo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT, IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po SET PO = ipo, MR = imr, ProjectID = iprojectid, SupplierCode = isupp, Terms = iterms, Vatable = ivat, Note = inote, Subject = isubject, Discount = idiscount, Attachment_Quotation = iattach_quotation, Attachment_Evaluation = iattach_evaluation, Attachment_FloorPlan = iattach_floorplan, TypeID = itrade, PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Pending', RLTApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = 'For Approval of Head', DateEdited = idatetime, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE PO = ioldpo;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE PO = ioldpo AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ioldpo, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of Head');

UPDATE rfp SET PO = ipo WHERE PO = ioldpo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_billing_purchasing_head`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `iattach_quotation` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_evaluation` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_floorplan` VARCHAR(500), IN `itrade` INT, IN `ioldpo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprojectid` INT, IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po SET PO = ipo, MR = imr, ProjectID = iprojectid, SupplierCode = isupp, Terms = iterms, Vatable = ivat, Note = inote, Subject = isubject, Discount = idiscount, Attachment_Quotation = iattach_quotation, Attachment_Evaluation = iattach_evaluation, Attachment_FloorPlan = iattach_floorplan, TypeID = itrade, RLTApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = 'For Approval of RLT', DateEdited = idatetime, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE PO = ioldpo;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE PO = ioldpo AND Deleted = 0;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ioldpo, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of RLT');

UPDATE rfp SET PO = ipo WHERE PO = ioldpo;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_client_attachment_date`(IN `iclientid` INT, IN `idate` VARCHAR(500), IN `icolumn` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN

SET @sql = CONCAT('UPDATE `client_principal` 
SET `', icolumn, '` = \'', idate, '\' WHERE `ClientID` = ', iclientid);
    PREPARE stmt FROM @sql;
    EXECUTE stmt;
    DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
    
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_clientinfo`(IN `iclientid` INT, IN `cresidence` VARCHAR(500), IN `cmailingadd` VARCHAR(500), IN `cstat` VARCHAR(500), IN `ctzen` VARCHAR(500), IN `bday` DATE, IN `bplace` VARCHAR(500), IN `gder` VARCHAR(500), IN `fb` VARCHAR(500), IN `vber` VARCHAR(500), IN `twt` VARCHAR(500), IN `wchat` VARCHAR(500), IN `ig` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibbm` VARCHAR(500), IN `wapp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(500), IN `tele` VARCHAR(500), IN `cp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iothers` VARCHAR(500), IN `ctsstat` VARCHAR(500), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipersonalattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `isignatureattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `tinattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `itinid` VARCHAR(500), IN `passportattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `passportnumb` VARCHAR(500), IN `iplaceissued` VARCHAR(500), IN `iexpirationdate` DATE, IN `idriverlicense` VARCHAR(500), IN `sssgsis` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprcid` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifreeid` VARCHAR(500), IN `bcertificate` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipicture` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE client_principal SET CompleteResidence = cresidence, CompleteMailingAdd = cmailingadd, CivilStatus = cstat ,Citizenship = ctzen , Birthdate = bday , Birthplace = bplace , Gender = gder , Facebook = fb , Viber = vber , Twitter = twt, WeChat = wchat , Instagram = ig, BBM = ibbm , WhatsApp = wapp , Email = iemail, Telephone = tele ,  Cellphone = cp , Others = iothers , CTSStatus = ctsstat , Remarks = iremarks , PersonalAttachment = ipersonalattachment, SignatureAttachment = isignatureattachment , Tin_Attachment = tinattachment , TinID = itinid , Passport_Attachment = passportattachment , PassportNumber = passportnumb , PlaceIssued = iplaceissued , ExpirationDate = iexpirationdate , DriverLicense = idriverlicense, Sss_Gsis = sssgsis , PrcID = iprcid , FreeID = ifreeid , BirthCertificate = bcertificate, Picture = ipicture WHERE ClientID = iclientid;


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_clientprincipal_documents`(IN `iclientid` INT, IN `ipersonalattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `isignatureattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `tinattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `passportattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `idriverlicense` VARCHAR(500), IN `isssgsis` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprcid` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifreeid` VARCHAR(500), IN `bcertificate` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE client_principal SET PersonalAttachment = ipersonalattachment, SignatureAttachment = isignatureattachment , Tin_Attachment = tinattachment ,  Passport_Attachment = passportattachment , DriverLicense = idriverlicense, Sss_Gsis = isssgsis , PrcID = iprcid , FreeID = ifreeid , BirthCertificate = bcertificate WHERE ClientID = iclientid;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_co_businessinfo`(IN `iid` INT, IN `icompany` VARCHAR(500), IN `iposition` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaddress` VARCHAR(500), IN `itelephone` VARCHAR(500), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifax` VARCHAR(500), IN `iclientid` INT, IN `icoprincipal_id` INT)

UPDATE client_co_businiessprincipal SET CompanyOrganization = icompany, Position = iposition, OfficeAddress = iaddress, TelNo = itelephone, Email = iemail, FaxNum = ifax, ClientID = iclientid, ID_CoPrincipal = icoprincipal_id WHERE ID = iid;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_co_clientinfo`(IN `copiid` INT, IN `lastna` VARCHAR(500), IN `firstna` VARCHAR(500), IN `middlena` VARCHAR(500), IN `cresidence` VARCHAR(500), IN `cmailingadd` VARCHAR(500), IN `cstat` VARCHAR(500), IN `ctzen` VARCHAR(500), IN `bday` DATE, IN `bplace` VARCHAR(500), IN `gder` VARCHAR(500), IN `fb` VARCHAR(500), IN `vber` VARCHAR(500), IN `twt` VARCHAR(500), IN `wchat` VARCHAR(500), IN `ig` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibbm` VARCHAR(500), IN `wapp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(500), IN `tele` VARCHAR(500), IN `cp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iothers` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipersonalattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `isignatureattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `tinattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `itinid` VARCHAR(500), IN `passportattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `passportnumb` VARCHAR(500), IN `iplaceissued` VARCHAR(500), IN `iexpirationdate` DATE, IN `idriverlicense` VARCHAR(500), IN `sssgsis` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprcid` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifreeid` VARCHAR(500), IN `bcertificate` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipicture` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE client_co_principal SET CompleteResidence = cresidence, LastName = lastna, FirstName = firstna, MiddleName = middlena, CompleteMailingAdd = cmailingadd, CivilStatus = cstat, Citizenship = ctzen, Birthdate = bday, Birthplace = bplace, Gender = gder, Facebook = fb, Viber = vber, Twitter = twt, WeChat = wchat, Instagram = ig, BBM = ibbm, WhatsApp = wapp, Email = iemail, Telephone = tele,  Cellphone = cp, Others = iothers, PersonalAttachment = ipersonalattachment, SignatureCardAttachment = isignatureattachment, Tin_Attachment = tinattachment, TinID = itinid , Passport_Attachment = passportattachment, PassportNumber = passportnumb, PlaceIssued = iplaceissued, ExpirationDate = iexpirationdate, DriverLicense = idriverlicense, Sss_Gsis = sssgsis, PrcID = iprcid, FreeID = ifreeid, BirthCertificate = bcertificate, Picture = ipicture WHERE ID = copiid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_collection`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `iorno` VARCHAR(50), IN `mop` VARCHAR(50), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `ibankname` VARCHAR(50), IN `icheckno` VARCHAR(50), IN `icheckdate` DATE, IN `iremdate` DATE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
UPDATE collection00 SET ORDate = idate, ORNo = iorno, ModeOfPayment = mop, Amount = iamount, BankName = ibankname, CheckNo = icheckno, CheckDate = icheckdate, RemittanceDate = iremdate, Attachment = iattachment WHERE PaymentID = iid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_collection_amort_payment`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ipayment_principal` DOUBLE, IN `ipayment_transfer` DOUBLE, IN `ipayment_vat` DOUBLE, IN `ipayment_hotelfinishing` DOUBLE, IN `ipayment_total` DOUBLE, IN `ipaymentid` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance_principal` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance_transfermisc` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance_vat` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance_hotelfinishing` DOUBLE, IN `ibalance_total` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
UPDATE collection_amort SET Payment_Principal = ipayment_principal, Payment_TransferMisc = ipayment_transfer, Payment_Vat = ipayment_vat, Payment_HotelFinishing = ipayment_hotelfinishing, Payment_Total = ipayment_total, Status = 'Paid', PaymentID = ipaymentid, Principal = ibalance_principal, TransferMisc = ibalance_transfermisc, Vat = ibalance_vat, HotelFinishing = ibalance_hotelfinishing, Total = ibalance_total WHERE id = iid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_cv`(IN `icvid` INT, IN `icv` VARCHAR(50), IN `icheckdate` DATE, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `icharge` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibank` INT, IN `icheckno` VARCHAR(500), IN `icompany` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `iamountword` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ivendor` VARCHAR(500), IN `iref` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT, IN `ioverride_check` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE cv  SET CV = icv, CheckDate = icheckdate, Remarks = iremarks, Payee = ipayee, Company = icharge, Bank = ibank, CheckNo = icheckno, ChargeTo = icompany, Amount = iamount, Words = iamountword, Vendor = ivendor, Ref = iref, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence, Approved = 'Pending', LCCSigned = 'Pending', Override_Check = ioverride_check, ForRelease = 0 WHERE CVID = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_cv_RFP`(IN `icvid` INT, IN `irfpstring` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE `cv` 
SET `RFP` = irfpstring
WHERE `cv`.`CVID` = icvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_cv_apv`(IN `iapvid` INT, IN `icv` INT)

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_debit_credit_apv`(IN `iapvid` INT, IN `iapv` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE apv_debit SET APVID = iapvid, APV = iapv WHERE APV = '' AND LoginID = iloginid
;
UPDATE apv_credit SET APVID = iapvid, APV = iapv WHERE APV = '' AND LoginID = iloginid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_debit_credit_cv`(IN icvid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE cv_debit SET CVID = icvid WHERE CVID = 0;
UPDATE cv_credit SET CVID = icvid WHERE CVID = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_declined_change_order`(IN `iclientid` INT, IN `isalesid` INT, IN `edate` DATE, IN `changeunitowner` VARCHAR(1000), IN `changeunitassumed` VARCHAR(1000), IN `changeinfo` VARCHAR(1000), IN `addunit` VARCHAR(1000), IN `upunit` VARCHAR(1000), IN `downunit` VARCHAR(1000), IN `reviselayout` VARCHAR(1000), IN `discount` VARCHAR(1000), IN `duedate` VARCHAR(1000), IN `refund` VARCHAR(1000), IN `cancel` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iothers` VARCHAR(1000), IN `parking` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iattach` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iid` INT, IN `itype` VARCHAR(500), IN `icoprincipal` VARCHAR(500), IN `ideclined_column` VARCHAR(50))
    NO SQL
BEGIN
SET @clientid = iclientid;
SET @salesid = isalesid;
SET @changeunitownerassumed = changeunitassumed;
SET @effectivitydate = edate;
SET @changeunitowner = changeunitowner;
SET @changeownerotherinfo = changeinfo;
SET @additionalunit = addunit;
SET @upgradeunit = upunit;
SET @downgradeunit = downunit;
SET @reviselayoutreq = reviselayout;
SET @additionaldiscount = discount;
SET @changeduedate = duedate;
SET @requestrefund = refund;
SET @cancellation = cancel;
SET @others = iothers;
SET @parkingslot = parking;
SET @attachment = iattach;
SET @type = itype;
SET @coprincipal = icoprincipal;
SET @column = ideclined_column;
SET @id = iid;

SET @sqlstm = CONCAT("UPDATE `change_order` SET `ClientID` = ",@clientid,", `SalesID` = ",@salesid,", `ChangeUnitOwnerAssumed` = """,@changeunitownerassumed,""", `EffectivityDate` = """,@effectivitydate,""", `ChangeUnitOwner` = """,@changeunitowner,""", `ChangeOwnerOthersInfo` = """,@changeownerotherinfo,""", `AdditionalUnit` = """,@additionalunit,""", `UpgradeOfUnit` = """,@upgradeunit,""", `DowngradeOfUnit` = """,@downgradeunit,""", `ReviseLayoutReq` = """,@reviselayoutreq,""", `AdditionalDiscount` = """,@additionaldiscount,""", `ChangeOfDueDate` = """,@changeduedate,""", `RequestForRefund` = """,@requestrefund,""", `Cancellation` = """,@cancellation,""", `Others` = """,@others,""", `ParkingSlot` = """,@parkingslot,""", `Attachment` = """,@attachment,""", `Type` = """,@type,""", `CoPrincipal` = """,@coprincipal,""", `",@column,"` = 'Pending' WHERE `ID`= ",@id,";");

PREPARE stmt FROM @sqlstm;
EXECUTE stmt;
DEALLOCATE PREPARE stmt;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_deduction`(in iid int, in iemployeeno varchar(50), in ipurpose varchar(100), in iamount double, in itype varchar(100), in iremarks varchar(500), in idtfrom date, in idtto date)
BEGIN
UPDATE deductions SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno, Purpose = ipurpose, Amount = iamount, Type = itype, Remarks = iremarks, dtFrom = idtfrom, dtTo = idtto WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_delete_SD`(IN `sdnew` INT, IN `sdold` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE login00 SET Deleted = 1 WHERE UserID = sdold ;

UPDATE login00 SET SD = sdnew WHERE SD = sdold AND Deleted = 0;

DELETE FROM round_robin WHERE AgentID = sdold;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_delete_SM`(IN `ismnew` INT, IN `ismold` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE login00 SET Deleted = 1 WHERE UserID = ismold ;

UPDATE login00 SET SM = ismnew WHERE SM = ismold AND Deleted = 0;

DELETE FROM round_robin WHERE AgentID = ismold;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_depositentry`(IN `iid` INT, IN `idepositdate` DATE, IN `icollectiondate` DATE, IN `iaccountname` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaccountno` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ioldcollectiondate` DATE, IN `iolddepositdate` DATE)
BEGIN
UPDATE parking_deposit SET DepositDate = idepositdate, CollectionDate = icollectiondate, AccountName = iaccountname, AccountNo = iaccountno, Amount = iamount, Attachment = iattachment WHERE id = iid;

UPDATE attendant_collection SET DepositDate = idepositdate, CollectionDate = icollectiondate WHERE CollectionDate = ioldcollectiondate AND DepositDate = iolddepositdate;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_employee`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipicture` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilastname` VARCHAR(100), IN `ifirstname` VARCHAR(100), IN `imiddlename` VARCHAR(100), IN `icontactno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihomeaddress` VARCHAR(2000), IN `isex` VARCHAR(10), IN `idatehired` DATE, IN `isss` VARCHAR(50), IN `itin` VARCHAR(50), IN `iphilhealth` VARCHAR(50), IN `iemergencyname` VARCHAR(100), IN `iemergencycontactno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idepartment` VARCHAR(100), IN `iclassification` VARCHAR(100), IN `ioldemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibirthdate` DATE, IN `irate` VARCHAR(100), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(100), IN `iposition` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaccountno` VARCHAR(100), IN `ibasic` DOUBLE, IN `iecola` DOUBLE, IN `iallowance` DOUBLE, IN `ilevel` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibank` VARCHAR(100), IN `iemail` VARCHAR(100), IN `iroh_from` TIME, IN `iroh_to` TIME, IN `imorning_hdoh_from` TIME, IN `imorning_hdoh_to` TIME, IN `iafternoon_hdoh_from` TIME, IN `iafternoon_hdoh_to` TIME, IN `isat_sched` VARCHAR(50), IN `isoh_from` TIME, IN `isoh_to` TIME, IN `ieoc` DATE, IN `ideductlate` INT, IN `irestday` VARCHAR(200), IN `ideductabsent` INT, IN `ideductgovtcontri` INT, IN `ideducttax` INT, IN `icompleterequirements` INT, IN `ihdmf` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihmo` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipolicyno` VARCHAR(100), IN `isupervisor` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE employees SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno, Picture = ipicture, LastName = ilastname, FirstName = ifirstname, MiddleName = imiddlename, ContactNo = icontactno, HomeAddress = ihomeaddress, Sex = isex, DateHired = idatehired, SSS = isss, TIN = itin, Philhealth = iphilhealth, Emergency_Name = iemergencyname, Emergency_ContactNo = iemergencycontactno, Department = idepartment, Classification = iclassification, Birthdate = ibirthdate, Rate = irate, Status = istatus, Position = iposition, AccountNo = iaccountno, Basic = ibasic, Ecola = iecola, Allowance = iallowance, Level = ilevel, Bank = ibank, Email = iemail, roh_from = iroh_from, roh_to = iroh_to, hdoh_morning_from = imorning_hdoh_from, hdoh_morning_to = imorning_hdoh_to, hdoh_afternoon_from = iafternoon_hdoh_from, hdoh_afternoon_to = iafternoon_hdoh_to, saturday_schedule = isat_sched, soh_from = isoh_from, soh_to = isoh_to, EOC = ieoc, DeductLate = ideductlate, RestDay = irestday, DeductAbsent = ideductabsent, DeductGovtContri = ideductgovtcontri, DeductTax = ideducttax, CompleteRequirements = icompleterequirements, HDMF = ihdmf, HMO = ihmo, PolicyNo = ipolicyno, Supervisor = isupervisor WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE login00 SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE time_logs SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE timelog_request SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE overtime SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE leave_request SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE time_keeping SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE payroll SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE employment_history SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno WHERE EmployeeNo = ioldemployeeno;

UPDATE commsspecs SET AgentID = iemployeeno WHERE AgentID = ioldemployeeno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_employee_status`(IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(100), IN `idate` DATE, IN `iposition` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibasic` DOUBLE, IN `iallowance` DOUBLE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO employment_history (EmployeeNo, Status, Date, Position, Basic, Allowance, Attachment) VALUES (iemployeeno, istatus, idate, iposition, ibasic, iallowance, iattachment);

UPDATE employees SET Status = istatus, Position = iposition, Basic = ibasic, Allowance = iallowance WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

BEGIN
UPDATE events SET Event = ievent, Date = idate, Time = itime, End_Date = iend_date WHERE EventID = ieventid;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_final_pay`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ipayrolldate` DATE, IN `iemployee` VARCHAR(50), IN `icof` DATE, IN `icot` DATE, IN `isalary` DOUBLE, IN `ixmaspay` DOUBLE, IN `ileavecredit` DOUBLE, IN `igov` DOUBLE, IN `isss` DOUBLE, IN `ihdmf` DOUBLE, IN `itax` DOUBLE, IN `icash` DOUBLE, IN `issurance` DOUBLE, IN `ibank` INT, IN `iothers` INT, IN `itotalamount` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE final_pay SET PayrollDate = ipayrolldate, Employee = iemployee, CutOff_From = icof, CutOff_To = icot, SalaryAmount = isalary, XmasPay = ixmaspay, LeaveCredit = ileavecredit, GovContrib = igov, SSSLoan = isss, HDMFLoan = ihdmf, TaxRefund = itax, CashAdv = icash, Insurance = issurance, BankLoan = ibank, Others = iothers, TotalAmount = itotalamount WHERE id = iid;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_floor_assignment`(IN `itrade` INT, IN `itradehead` INT, IN `icontractor` INT, IN `iunitid` INT, IN `ifloorid` INT)
BEGIN
INSERT INTO works (Trade, TradeHead, Contractor, UnitID, FloorID) VALUES (itrade, itradehead, icontractor, iunitid, ifloorid);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_holiday`(in iid int, in idate date, in iholiday varchar(500), in itype varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE holiday SET Date = idate, Holiday = iholiday, Type = itype WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_home_PendingIncentive_attachment`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ibua` VARCHAR(500), IN `icomputation` VARCHAR(500), IN `icontracttosell` VARCHAR(500), IN `icontracttosell2` VARCHAR(500), IN `idou` VARCHAR(500), IN `ispoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `idoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireqletter` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilayout` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlayout` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlayoutrep` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaoi` VARCHAR(500), IN `iseccert` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifinancialstatement` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibir` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilaws` VARCHAR(500), IN `imarriagecontract` VARCHAR(500), IN `ikyc_principal` VARCHAR(500), IN `ikyc_coprincipal` VARCHAR(500), IN `idpcf` VARCHAR(500), IN `inpv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE sale00 SET 

BUA = ibua, 
Computation = icomputation,
ContractToSell = icontracttosell,
ContractToSell2 = icontracttosell2,
DeedOfUndertaking = idou,
SpecialPowerOfAtty = ispoa,
DeedOfAssignment = idoa,
RequestLetter = ireqletter,
Layout = ilayout,
RevisedLayout = irevlayout,
RevisedLayoutReport = irevlayoutrep,
ArticleOfIncorporation = iaoi,
BoardResolutions_SecCert = iseccert,
FinancialStatement = ifinancialstatement,
CertificateOfRegistration_BIR = ibir,
ChangeOrder = ichangeorder,
ByLaws = ilaws,
MarriageContract = imarriagecontract,
KYC_Principal = ikyc_principal,
KYC_CoPrincipal = ikyc_coprincipal,
DataPrivacy = idpcf,
NPV = inpv
WHERE id = iid;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_liquidation_entries`(in iliquidation varchar(50), in iloginid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE liquidation_debit SET Liquidation = iliquidation WHERE Liquidation = ''  AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
UPDATE liquidation_credit SET Liquidation = iliquidation WHERE Liquidation = ''  AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_loan`(IN `iloanid` INT, IN `iemployeeno` VARCHAR(50), IN `iloantype` VARCHAR(100), IN `iloandate` DATE, IN `iloanamount` DOUBLE, IN `iterms` INT, IN `imonthly` DOUBLE, IN `irules` VARCHAR(100), IN `istart` DATE, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE loan_amort SET Deleted = 1 WHERE LoanID = iloanid;

UPDATE loans SET EmployeeNo = iemployeeno, LoanType = iloantype, LoanDate = iloandate, LoanAmount = iloanamount, Terms = iterms, Monthly = imonthly, Rules = irules, Start = istart, Remarks = iremarks WHERE LoanID = iloanid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_loan_active_status`(in iloanid int, in iactive int)
BEGIN
UPDATE loans SET Active = iactive WHERE LoanID = iloanid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_loan_paid_status`(in iloanid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE loans SET Paid = 1 WHERE LoanID = iloanid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_loan_payment`(IN `iloanid` INT, IN `ipayrolldate` DATE, IN `iamount` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
UPDATE loan_amort SET Payment = iamount WHERE LoanID = iloanid AND Date = ipayrolldate AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_mr_office`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `iapprove` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE mr SET Area = iremarks, Attachment = iattachment, TradeHeadApproved = iapprove, Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = istatus WHERE MR = imr;

INSERT INTO mr_tracker (MR, tDate, Process) VALUES (imr, idatetime, 'Modified');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_mr_status_po`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE mr SET Transaction = istatus WHERE MR = imr;

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, istatus);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_mr_table`(IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `icontractorcode` VARCHAR(100), IN `itypeid` INT, IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `ioldmr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idateneeded` DATE, IN `iproject` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE mr SET MR = imr, ContractorCode = icontractorcode, TypeID = itypeid, Area = iarea, DateNeeded = idateneeded, ProjectID = iproject, DateEdited = idatetime, TradeHeadApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Approval1 = 'Pending', Transaction = 'For Approval of QS', Status = 'Open', Attachment = iattachment, PurchasingLoginID = 0, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE MR = ioldmr;

UPDATE mr_details SET MR = imr, ContractorCode = icontractorcode WHERE MR = ioldmr;

UPDATE po SET RLTApproved = 'Cancelled', Approved = 'Cancelled', RLTReason = 'Edited M.R.', Reason = 'Edited M.R.' WHERE MR = ioldmr;

INSERT INTO mr_tracker (MR, tDate, Process) VALUES (imr, idatetime, 'Modified');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$
