CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_office_rfp`(IN `ict` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipart` VARCHAR(500), IN `idate` DATE, IN `imopr` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `idept` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `itype` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500), IN `ivat` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(3000), IN `ipayrolltype` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iewt` VARCHAR(50), IN `ifbads` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp
SET ChargeTo = ict, Particulars = ipart, DateRequired = idate, PaymentMode = imopr, Payee = ipayee, Amount = iamount, Department = idept, Attachment = iattachment, Vatable = ivat, Remarks = inote, PayrollType = ipayrolltype, Type2 = itype, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence, SSDApproval = 'Pending', OfficeHeadApproved = 'Pending', ExecApproved = 'Pending', RLTApproved = 'Pending', LCCApproved = 'Pending', Process = iprocess, AccountingApproved = 'Pending', Rejected = 0, SalesApproved = 'Pending', EWT = iewt, FB_Ads = ifbads WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_other_docs`(IN `isalesid` INT, IN `ibua` VARCHAR(500), IN `icomp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iconsell` VARCHAR(500), IN `iconsell2` VARCHAR(500), IN `idou` VARCHAR(500), IN `ispoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `idoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireq` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilayout` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlay` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlayrep` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaoi` VARCHAR(500), IN `isec` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifinance` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibir` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichange` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilaws` VARCHAR(500), IN `imarriage` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifili` INT, IN `iforeign` INT, IN `ikyc_principal` VARCHAR(500), IN `ikyc_coprincipal` VARCHAR(500), IN `idpcf` VARCHAR(500), IN `inpv` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE sale00 SET BUA = ibua, Computation = icomp, ContractToSell = iconsell, ContractToSell2 = iconsell2, DeedOfUndertaking = idou, SpecialPowerOfAtty = ispoa, DeedOfAssignment = idoa, RequestLetter = ireq, Layout = ilayout, RevisedLayout = irevlay, RevisedLayoutReport = irevlayrep, ArticleOfIncorporation = iaoi, BoardResolutions_SecCert = isec, FinancialStatement = ifinance, CertificateOfRegistration_BIR = ibir, ChangeOrder = ichange, ByLaws = ilaws, MarriageContract = imarriage, Filipino = ifili, Foreigner = iforeign, KYC_Principal = ikyc_principal, KYC_CoPrincipal = ikyc_coprincipal, DataPrivacy = idpcf, NPV = inpv WHERE id = isalesid;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_otherpo`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `icharge` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupplier` INT, IN `ideliverydate` DATE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `ivat` INT, IN `ioldpo` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(5000), IN `idiscount` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
UPDATE po SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier, DeliveryDate = ideliverydate, Terms = iterms, Days = idays, Vatable = ivat, ChargeTo = icharge, Date = idatetime, Area = iarea, Note = inote, Discount = idiscount WHERE PO = ioldpo;
UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier WHERE PO = ioldpo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_otherpo_attachment`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `icharge` VARCHAR(500), IN `isupplier` INT, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `ivat` INT, IN `ioldpo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `inote` VARCHAR(1000), IN `idiscount` DOUBLE, IN `ihandlingfee` DOUBLE, IN `itransaction` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE po SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier, Terms = iterms, Days = idays, Vatable = ivat, ChargeTo = icharge, Attachment = iattachment, Area = iarea, Note = inote, Discount = idiscount, PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Pending', PMApproval = 'Pending', RLTApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = itransaction, DateEdited = idatetime, HandlingFee = ihandlingfee, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE PO = ioldpo;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier WHERE PO = ioldpo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ioldpo, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, itransaction);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupplier WHERE PO = ioldpo;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ioldpo, idatetime, 'Modified');

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_payment_amort`(IN `isalesid` INT, IN `idate` DATE, IN `iprincipal` INT, IN `idiscount` INT, IN `iotherdiscount` INT, IN `irebate` INT, IN `itransfermisc` INT, IN `ivat` INT, IN `ihotelfinishing` INT, IN `itotal` INT, IN `iparticulars` VARCHAR(100), IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE collection_amort SET Deleted = 1
WHERE id = iid;

INSERT INTO collection_amort (SalesID, Date, Principal, Discount, OtherDiscount, Rebate, TransferMisc, Vat, HotelFinishing, Total, Particulars) VALUES (isalesid, idate, iprincipal, idiscount, iotherdiscount, irebate, itransfermisc, ivat, ihotelfinishing, itotal, iparticulars);

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_pcr`(IN `ipcr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iparticular` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ipurpose` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE petty_cash SET Particulars = iparticular, Purpose = ipurpose, Amount = iamount, Attachment = iattachment WHERE PCR = ipcr;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

UPDATE pettycash_replenishment SET Area = iarea, Date = idate, Amount = iamount, Attachment = iattachment WHERE id = iid;

UPDATE ticket_entry SET PlateNumber = iplateno WHERE ID = iticketid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_po_attachment`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `ihf` DOUBLE, IN `idis` DOUBLE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iattach_mr` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_canvas` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_quotatation` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(500), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE, IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT, IN `iold_po` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp, Vatable = ivat, HandlingFee = ihf, Discount = idis, Terms = iterms, Days = idays, Remarks = iremarks, Attachment_MR = iattach_mr, Attachment_CanvasSheet = iattach_canvas, Attachment_Quotation = iattach_quotatation, ChargeTo = ichargeto, Area = iarea, PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Pending', RLTApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = 'For Approval of Head', DateEdited = idatetime, Subject = isubject, InstallationFee = iinstallationfee, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE PO = iold_po AND Deleted = 0;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE PO = iold_po;

UPDATE dr_details SET PO = ipo WHERE PO = iold_po;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (iold_po, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of Head');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of Purchasing Head' WHERE MR = imr;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Closed' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) = 0;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Open' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) > 0;

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, 'Modified Purchase Order');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_po_details_balance`(IN `iid` INT, IN `ibalance` DOUBLE)
BEGIN
UPDATE po_details SET Balance = ibalance, DeliveryQty = ibalance WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_po_purchasing_head`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `isupp` INT, IN `ivat` BIT(1), IN `ihf` DOUBLE, IN `idis` DOUBLE, IN `iterms` VARCHAR(500), IN `idays` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iattach_mr` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_canvas` VARCHAR(500), IN `iattach_quotatation` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichargeto` VARCHAR(500), IN `iarea` VARCHAR(500), IN `isubject` VARCHAR(500), IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE, IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT, IN `iold_po` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE po
SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp, Vatable = ivat, HandlingFee = ihf, Discount = idis, Terms = iterms, Days = idays, Remarks = iremarks, Attachment_MR = iattach_mr, Attachment_CanvasSheet = iattach_canvas, Attachment_Quotation = iattach_quotatation, ChargeTo = ichargeto, Area = iarea, PurchasingHead_Approval = 'Approved', RLTApproved = 'Pending', Approved = 'Pending', Transaction = 'For Approval of RLT', DateEdited = idatetime, Subject = isubject, InstallationFee = iinstallationfee, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence WHERE PO = iold_po AND Deleted = 0;

UPDATE po_details SET PO = ipo, SupplierCode = isupp WHERE PO = iold_po;

UPDATE dr_details SET PO = ipo WHERE PO = iold_po;

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (iold_po, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'For Approval of RLT');

UPDATE mr SET Transaction = 'P.O. For Approval of RLT' WHERE MR = imr;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Closed' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) = 0;

UPDATE mr SET Status = 'Open' WHERE MR = imr AND (SELECT IFNULL(SUM(mr_details.Balance), 0) FROM mr_details WHERE mr_details.MR = imr AND mr_details.Deleted = 0) > 0;

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, 'Modified Purchase Order');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_po_status`(IN `ipo` VARCHAR(500), IN `itransaction` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE po SET Status = 'Closed', Transaction = itransaction WHERE PO = ipo;
UPDATE schedule_delivery SET Delivered = 1 WHERE PO = ipo;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
UPDATE employees SET BloodType = ibloodtype, Allergies = iallergies, Sports = isports,Medical_History = imedical_history, HomeAddress = iaddress, Emergency_Name = icontact_person, Emergency_ContactNo = icontact_number, Attending_Physician = iattending_physician, Physician_Contact = iphysician_contact WHERE EmployeeNo = iemployeeno;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_reservation`(IN `iid` INT, IN `iunit` VARCHAR(15), IN `ireservationdate` DATE, IN `iunitprice` DOUBLE, IN `ireservationfee` DOUBLE, IN `ihotelfinishing` VARCHAR(500), IN `iautodisc` DOUBLE, IN `ipromodisc` DOUBLE, IN `iadddisc` DOUBLE, IN `idiscname` VARCHAR(500), IN `ipaymade` DOUBLE, IN `idocsfee` DOUBLE, IN `iadddocs` VARCHAR(500), IN `ispotdate` DATE, IN `ispotdp` DOUBLE, IN `ispotamount` DOUBLE, IN `ispottrans` DOUBLE, IN `ispotvat` DOUBLE, IN `ispotdisc` DOUBLE, IN `idiscamount` DOUBLE, IN `iapplyspot` VARCHAR(500), IN `itransmisc` DOUBLE, IN `ivat` DOUBLE, IN `itotal` DOUBLE, IN `oldunitid` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipm_promodiscount` DOUBLE, IN `ipm_vat` DOUBLE, IN `ipm_transfer` DOUBLE, IN `iapply_promo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iapply_addtl` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibua` VARCHAR(500), IN `icomputation` VARCHAR(500), IN `icontracttosell` VARCHAR(500), IN `icontracttosell2` VARCHAR(500), IN `idou` VARCHAR(500), IN `ispoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `idoa` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireqletter` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilayout` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlayout` VARCHAR(500), IN `irevlayoutrep` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaoi` VARCHAR(500), IN `iseccert` VARCHAR(500), IN `ifinancialstatement` VARCHAR(500), IN `ibir` VARCHAR(500), IN `ichangeorder` VARCHAR(500), IN `ilaws` VARCHAR(500), IN `imarriagecontract` VARCHAR(500), IN `ikyc_principal` VARCHAR(500), IN `ikyc_coprincipal` VARCHAR(500), IN `idpcf` VARCHAR(500), IN `inpv` VARCHAR(500), IN `iprojectid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
UPDATE sale00 SET 
UnitID = iunit, 
ReservationDate = ireservationdate, 
UnitPrice = iunitprice, 
ReservationFee = ireservationfee, 
HotelFinishing = ihotelfinishing, 
AutoDiscount = iautodisc, 
PromoDiscount = ipromodisc, 
AddtlDiscount = iadddisc, 
DiscountName = idiscname, 
PaymentsMade = ipaymade, 
DocsFee = idocsfee, 
ApplyDocsFee = iadddocs, 
SpotDate = ispotdate, 
SpotDPPercent = ispotdp, 
SpotAmount = ispotamount, 
SpotTransFee = ispottrans, 
SpotVAT = ispotvat, 
SpotDiscount = ispotdisc,  
DiscountAmount = idiscamount, 
ApplySpotDiscount = iapplyspot, 
TransMiscFee = itransmisc, 
VAT = ivat, 
Total = itotal, 
PM_PromoDiscount = ipm_promodiscount, 
PM_VAT = ipm_vat, 
PM_Transfer = ipm_transfer, 
Apply_PromoDiscount = iapply_promo, 
Apply_AddtlDiscount = iapply_addtl, 

BUA = ibua, 
Computation = icomputation,
ContractToSell = icontracttosell,
ContractToSell2 = icontracttosell2,
DeedOfUndertaking = idou,
SpecialPowerOfAtty = ispoa,
DeedOfAssignment = idoa,
RequestLetter = ireqletter,
Layout = ilayout,
RevisedLayout = irevlayout,
RevisedLayoutReport = irevlayoutrep,
ArticleOfIncorporation = iaoi,
BoardResolutions_SecCert = iseccert,
FinancialStatement = ifinancialstatement,
CertificateOfRegistration_BIR = ibir,
ChangeOrder = ichangeorder,
ByLaws = ilaws,
MarriageContract = imarriagecontract,
KYC_Principal = ikyc_principal,
KYC_CoPrincipal = ikyc_coprincipal,
DataPrivacy = idpcf,
NPV = inpv, ProjectID = iprojectid
WHERE id = iid;

UPDATE unit_layout SET Available = 1 WHERE UnitID = oldunitid;

UPDATE unit_layout SET Available = 0 WHERE UnitID = iunit;

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iparticular` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatereq` DATE, IN `isidr` VARCHAR(1000), IN `imop` VARCHAR(500), IN `ivat` VARCHAR(500), IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `ihandf` DOUBLE, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(3000), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ipayee` VARCHAR(500), IN `ideadline` DATE, IN `iinstallationfee` DOUBLE, IN `imr` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `ichangeorder_sequence` INT, IN `ipo` VARCHAR(50), IN `iewt` VARCHAR(50), IN `ihead_approval` VARCHAR(50), IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp
SET Particulars = iparticular, DateRequired = idatereq, SI = isidr, PaymentMode = imop, Vatable = ivat, Amount = iamount, HandlingFee = ihandf, Remarks = iremarks, Attachment = iattachment, Payee = ipayee, Deadline = ideadline, InstallationFee = iinstallationfee, ChangeOrder_Sequence = ichangeorder_sequence, OfficeHeadApproved = ihead_approval, RLTApproved = 'Pending', ExecApproved = 'Pending', Process = iprocess, AccountingApproved = 'Pending', PO = ipo, Rejected = 0, EWT = iewt WHERE RFP = irfp;

CALL mr_status(imr, idatetime, 'Modified RFP');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, 'Modified RFP');

INSERT INTO po_tracker (PO, DateTime, Process) VALUES (ipo, idatetime, iprocess);

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Modified');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, iprocess);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_agents_fb_ads`(in irfp varchar(50), in iloginid int)
BEGIN
UPDATE agents_fb_ads SET RFP = irfp WHERE RFP = '' AND CreatedBy = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_apv`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `iapvid` INT, IN `idatecreated` DATETIME, IN `icomplete` INT, IN `ipendingdocument` VARCHAR(50), IN `iliquidation` INT, IN `ipd_remarks` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.AccountingApproved = 'Approved', rfp.AccountingApprovedDate = idatecreated, rfp.Process = 'For Approval of APV', mr.Transaction = 'For Approval of APV', rfp.APVID = iapvid, rfp.CompleteRequirements = icomplete, rfp.WithOriginalDocs = ipendingdocument, ForLiquidation = iliquidation, rfp.PD_Remarks = ipd_remarks, rfp.OnHold = 0 WHERE rfp.RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_attachment`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(500), IN `inewrfp` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE `rfp` SET 
	`Attachment`= inewrfp 
WHERE
	RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_requirements`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `icomplete` INT, IN `ipendingdocuments` VARCHAR(50), IN `ipd_remarks` VARCHAR(1000), IN `ifor_liquidation` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET CompleteRequirements = icomplete, WithOriginalDocs = ipendingdocuments, PD_Remarks = ipd_remarks, ForLiquidation = ifor_liquidation WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_status`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.Process = istatus, mr.Transaction = istatus WHERE rfp.RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, istatus);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfp_status_released`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `istatus` VARCHAR(500), IN `iliquidation_date` DATE, IN `ireimbursement` INT, IN `idatetime` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp LEFT JOIN mr ON rfp.MR = mr.MR SET rfp.Process = istatus, rfp.Liquidation_StartDate = iliquidation_date, rfp.Reimbursement = ireimbursement, rfp.Released = 1, rfp.Release_Date = idatetime, mr.Transaction = istatus WHERE rfp.RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, istatus);
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_rfpattachment`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `iarray` TEXT)
BEGIN
UPDATE `rfp` SET Attachment = iarray WHERE RFP = irfp;
END$$

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_supply_request`(IN `iid` INT, IN `inewqty` DOUBLE, IN `requestid` VARCHAR(500), IN `iloginid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN

UPDATE supply_request_details SET New_Qty = inewqty WHERE id = iid AND Deleted = 0 ;

UPDATE supply_request SET supply_request.iStatus = "Requested", supply_request.ApprovedBy = iloginid WHERE supply_request.RequestID = requestid AND supply_request.Deleted = 0;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_ticketentry`(IN `iid` INT, IN `iticketnumber` VARCHAR(50), IN `ivalidationpromo` VARCHAR(500), IN `iclass` VARCHAR(500), IN `iplatenumber` VARCHAR(500), IN `itimein` DATETIME, IN `itimeout` DATETIME, IN `inumberofhours` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibillinghour` INT, IN `ipaidamount` DOUBLE, IN `iparkingfee` DOUBLE, IN `ishortover` DOUBLE, IN `iparkingattendant` INT, IN `ilt` INT, IN `icollectiondate` DATE, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE ticket_entry SET TicketNumber = iticketnumber, CollectionDate = icollectiondate, ValidationPromo = ivalidationpromo, Class = iclass, PlateNumber = iplatenumber, TimeIN = itimein, TimeOUT = itimeout, NumberofHours = inumberofhours, BillingHour = ibillinghour, PaidAmount = ipaidamount, ParkingFee = iparkingfee, ShortOver = ishortover, Attendant_LoginID = iparkingattendant, Remarks = iremarks, LT = ilt, RegularRate = iparkingfee WHERE ID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_timelogrequest`(IN `iID` INT, IN `iDate` DATE, IN `iType` VARCHAR(10), IN `iTime` TIME, IN `iattachment` MEDIUMTEXT)
BEGIN
UPDATE timelog_request SET Date = iDate, Type = iType, Time = iTime, Attachment = iattachment WHERE ID = iID;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_title_req`(IN `ireqid` INT, IN `iproject` INT, IN `ititle` VARCHAR(100), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(1000), IN `iuserID` INT, IN `icurrdate` DATETIME)
BEGIN
UPDATE req_title 
SET 
	`TitleID`= ititle,
	`ProjectID`= iproject,
	`userID`= iuserID,
	`dateReq`= icurrdate,
	`Purpose`= iremarks
WHERE 
	`reqID` = ireqid;

UPDATE titles SET available = 1 WHERE TitleID = ititle;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_tk_adjustment`(IN `iid` INT, IN `iemployee` VARCHAR(50), IN `idays` DOUBLE, IN `idtfrom` DATE, IN `idtto` DATE, IN `itype` VARCHAR(50), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(100), IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE tk_adjustments SET EmployeeNo = iemployee, Days = idays, dtFrom = idtfrom, dtTo = idtto, Type = itype, Remarks = iremarks, Attachment = iattachment WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

UPDATE type SET Type = itrade WHERE TypeID = itradeid;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_transfer`(in itransferid int, in isource int, in idestination int)
BEGIN
UPDATE transfer_stocks SET TransferFrom = isource, TransferTo = idestination WHERE TransferID = itransferid;
UPDATE transfer_stocks_details SET TransferFrom = isource, TransferTo = idestination WHERE TransferID = itransferid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_transfer_details_transferid`(IN `itransferid` INT, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `isource` INT, IN `idestination` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE transfer_stocks_details SET TransferID = itransferid, TransferFrom = isource, TransferTo = idestination WHERE TransferID = 0 AND LoginID = iloginid AND Deleted = 0;
END$$

BEGIN
UPDATE transportation_schedule SET DriverAM = idriveram, DriverPM = idriverpm, AMTrip = iamtrip, PMTrip = ipmtrip, tTime = itime, DropoffTime = idropofftime WHERE LoginID = iloginid AND tDate = idate;

CREATE  PROCEDURE `update_treasury_apv`(IN `iapv` VARCHAR(50), IN `iapvid` INT, IN `iproject` VARCHAR(500), IN `iduedate` DATE, IN `iamount` DOUBLE, IN `iinv` VARCHAR(500), IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500), IN `iaccountspayable` DOUBLE, IN `idatecreated` DATE, IN `ipayee` varchar(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET APV = iapv, ChargeTo = iproject, DueDate = iduedate, Amount = iamount, INV = iinv, Remarks = iremarks, Balance = iaccountspayable, DateCreated = idatecreated, Payee = ipayee WHERE id = iapvid;

UPDATE apv_debit SET APV = iapv WHERE APVID = iapvid;
UPDATE apv_credit SET  APV = iapv WHERE APVID = iapvid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

BEGIN
UPDATE `release` SET ContractorCode = icontractorcode, RequestNo = irequestno, Remarks = iremarks, Completion = icompletion, ProjectID = iprojectid, Attachment = iattachment WHERE RequestNo = ioldrequestno;

UPDATE release_details SET RequestNo = irequestno, ContractorCode = icontractorcode WHERE RequestNo = ioldrequestno;
END$$

BEGIN

END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `upload_pending_documents`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50), IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iremarks` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
INSERT INTO pending_documents_rfp (id, RFP, DateCreated, LoginID, Process, Remarks) VALUES (iid, irfp, idatetime, iloginid, 'For Approval of Accounting', iremarks);

UPDATE rfp SET WithOriginalDocs = 'Done', Process = 'Pending Documents For Approval of Accounting' WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Uploaded Pending Documents');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Pending Documents For Approval of Accounting');


END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$

Attachment_MR = iattach_mr,

WHERE PO = ipo;
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_assign_unit`(IN `iunitid` INT, IN `itrade` INT, IN `itradehead` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(*), 0) AS totalcount FROM works WHERE UnitID = iunitid AND Trade = itrade AND TradeHead = itradehead AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_attendant_transaction`(in iloginid int)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM ticket_entry WHERE Parking_Code <> '' AND Attendant_LoginID = iloginid AND EndID = 0 AND Remarks <> 'RUNAWAY' AND Deleted = 0;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_cv_checknumber`(IN `ibank` INT, IN `icheckno` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE Bank = ibank AND CheckNo = icheckno ORDER BY DateCreated DESC LIMIT 1;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_cvnumber`(IN `icv` VARCHAR(50), IN `ibank` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM cv WHERE CV = icv AND Bank = ibank;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_pending_room_checklist`(in iunitid int)
BEGIN
SELECT room_checklist.* FROM room_checklist LEFT JOIN room_layout ON room_checklist.RoomID = room_layout.id WHERE room_layout.UnitID = iunitid AND room_checklist.Status = 'Pending' AND room_checklist.Deleted = 0;
END$$

CREATE  PROCEDURE `validate_releasebooklet`(IN `iseriesfrom` INT, IN `iseriesto` INT)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM release_booklet WHERE (SeriesFrom >= iseriesfrom AND SeriesFrom <= iseriesto) OR (SeriesTo >= iseriesfrom AND SeriesTo <= iseriesto);
END$$

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `verify_workers_overtime`(in iid int, in iloginid int, in idatetime datetime, in iremarks varchar(1000), in iattachment varchar(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE overtime SET Verified = 'Approved', Verified_Date = idatetime, VerifiedBy = iloginid, VerifiedRemarks = iremarks, VerifiedAttachment = iattachment, PMApproval = 'Approved' WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `viewed_count_auditmaterials`(IN `dtfrom` DATE, IN `dtto` DATE)
BEGIN
SELECT * FROM po WHERE Viewed_LCC = 1 AND Deleted = 0 AND RLTApproved = 'Approved' AND Approved = 'Approved' AND DATE(Date) >= dtfrom AND DATE(Date) <= dtto;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `void_payment`(IN `iid` INT)
    NO SQL
BEGIN
UPDATE collection00 SET Deleted = 1 WHERE PaymentID = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `w_req_load_ehs`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.PMApproved = 'Pending' AND `release`.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'EHS' ORDER BY `release`.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `w_req_load_pm`()
BEGIN
SELECT `release`.*, contractor00.Contractor, project.Project, employees.FirstName, employees.LastName FROM `release` LEFT JOIN contractor00 ON `release`.ContractorCode = contractor00.ContractorCode LEFT JOIN project ON `release`.`ProjectID` = project.ProjectID LEFT JOIN login00 ON `release`.`LoginID` = login00.UserID LEFT JOIN employees ON login00.EmployeeNo = employees.EmployeeNo WHERE `release`.QSApproved = 'Approved' AND `release`.PMApproved = 'Pending' AND `release`.Deleted = 0 AND login00.Department = 'Site Support' ORDER BY `release`.DateCreated DESC;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `wardrobe_to_follow`(IN `iid` VARCHAR(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE punchlisting SET Status = 'For Cleaning', WardrobeInstallation = 'To Follow' WHERE id = iid;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `withdraw_incentive`(IN `irfp` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iattachment` VARCHAR(1000))
BEGIN
UPDATE rfp SET Released = 1, Release_Date = idatetime, Withdraw_Incentive_Attachment = iattachment, Process = 'Complete' WHERE RFP = irfp;

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Withdrawn');

INSERT INTO rfp_tracker (RFP, DateTime, Process) VALUES (irfp, idatetime, 'Complete');
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `withdrawal_approve_qs`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(50), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT, IN `iprocess` VARCHAR(500))
BEGIN
UPDATE `release` SET  QSApproved = 'Approved',  QSApprovedDate = idatetime, QSID = iloginid, Process = iprocess WHERE RequestNo = irequestno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `withdrawal_cancel_qs`(IN `irequestno` VARCHAR(500), IN `ireason` VARCHAR(500), IN `idatetime` DATETIME, IN `iloginid` INT)
BEGIN
UPDATE `release` SET  QSApproved = 'Cancelled', QSRemarks = ireason, QSApprovedDate = idatetime, QSID = iloginid, Process = 'Cancelled' WHERE RequestNo = irequestno;

UPDATE release_details SET Cancelled = 1 WHERE RequestNo = irequestno;
END$$
DELIMITER ;

DELIMITER $$
CREATE  PROCEDURE `zero_apv_balance`(in iapv varchar(50))
BEGIN
UPDATE apv SET Balance = 0 WHERE APV = iapv;
END$$
DELIMITER ;
